search_text: K-level Reasoning for Zero-Shot Coordination in Hanabi Hanabi 中零样本协调的 K 级推理 The standard problem setting in cooperative multi-agent settings is self-play (SP), where the goal is to train a team of agents that works well together. However, optimal SP policies commonly contain arbitrary conventions ("handshakes") and are not compatible with other, independently trained agents or humans. This latter desiderata was recently formalized by Hu et al. 2020 as the zero-shot coordination (ZSC) setting and partially addressed with their Other-Play (OP) algorithm, which showed improved ZSC and human-AI performance in the card game Hanabi. OP assumes access to the symmetries of the environment and prevents agents from breaking these in a mutually incompatible way during training. However, as the authors point out, discovering symmetries for a given environment is a computationally hard problem. Instead, we show that through a simple adaption of k-level reasoning (KLR) Costa Gomes et al. 2006, synchronously training all levels, we can obtain competitive ZSC and ad-hoc teamplay performance in Hanabi, including when paired with a human-like proxy bot. We also introduce a new method, synchronous-k-level reasoning with a best response (SyKLRBR), which further improves performance on our synchronous KLR by co-training a best response. 协作多智能体设置中的标准问题设置是自我对弈（SP），其目标是训练一组能够很好地协同工作的智能体。然而，最优 SP 策略通常包含任意约定（“握手”），并且与其他独立训练的代理或人类不兼容。 Hu 等人最近正式确定了后一种需求。 2020 年作为零射击协调 (ZSC) 设置，并通过其他游戏 (OP) 算法部分解决，该算法在纸牌游戏 Hanabi 中显示出改进的 ZSC 和人类 AI 性能。 OP 假设可以访问环境的对称性，并防止智能体在训练期间以相互不兼容的方式破坏这些对称性。然而，正如作者指出的，发现给定环境的对称性是一个计算难题。相反，我们通过对 k 级推理 (KLR) Costa Gomes 等人的简单调整来证明这一点。 2006 年，同步训练所有级别，我们可以在 Hanabi 中获得有竞争力的 ZSC 和临时团队合作表现，包括与类人代理机器人配对时。我们还引入了一种新方法，即具有最佳响应的同步 k 级推理 (SyKLRBR)，它通过共同训练最佳响应进一步提高了同步 KLR 的性能。 本文提出了一种基于K级推理（KLR）的方法，用于在Hanabi纸牌游戏中实现零样本协调（ZSC）和即兴团队协作。 Brandon Cui,Hengyuan Hu,Luis Pineda,Jakob N. Foerster cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MA

authors_text: James Marien,Sam Leroux,Bart Dhoedt,Cedric De Boom
title: Audio-guided Album Cover Art Generation with Genetic Algorithms
title_zh: 使用遗传算法生成音频引导专辑封面艺术
abstract: Over 60,000 songs are released on Spotify every day, and the competition for the listener's attention is immense. In that regard, the importance of captivating and inviting cover art cannot be underestimated, because it is deeply entangled with a song's character and the artist's identity, and remains one of the most important gateways to lead people to discover music. However, designing cover art is a highly creative, lengthy and sometimes expensive process that can be daunting, especially for non-professional artists. For this reason, we propose a novel deep-learning framework to generate cover art guided by audio features. Inspired by VQGAN-CLIP, our approach is highly flexible because individual components can easily be replaced without the need for any retraining. This paper outlines the architectural details of our models and discusses the optimization challenges that emerge from them. More specifically, we will exploit genetic algorithms to overcome bad local minima and adversarial examples. We find that our framework can generate suitable cover art for most genres, and that the visual features adapt themselves to audio feature changes. Given these results, we believe that our framework paves the road for extensions and more advanced applications in audio-guided visual generation tasks.

In that regard, the importance of captivating and inviting cover art cannot be underestimated, because it is deeply entangled with a song's character and the artist's identity, and remains one of the most important gateways to lead people to discover music. However, designing cover art is a highly creative, lengthy and sometimes expensive process that can be daunting, especially for non-professional artists. For this reason, we propose a novel deep-learning framework to generate cover art guided by audio features. Inspired by VQGAN-CLIP, our approach is highly flexible because individual components can easily be replaced without the need for any retraining. This paper outlines the architectural details of our models and discusses the optimization challenges that emerge from them. More specifically, we will exploit genetic algorithms to overcome bad local minima and adversarial examples. We find that our framework can generate suitable cover art for most genres, and that the visual features adapt themselves to audio feature changes. Given these results, we believe that our framework paves the road for extensions and more advanced applications in audio-guided visual generation tasks.
abstract_zh: Spotify 每天发布超过 60,000 首歌曲，争夺听众注意力的竞争非常激烈。从这方面来说，迷人和诱人的封面艺术的重要性不容低估，因为它与歌曲的性格和艺术家的身份深深地纠缠在一起，并且仍然是引导人们发现音乐的最重要的门户之一。然而，设计封面艺术是一个极具创意、漫长且有时昂贵的过程，可能令人畏惧，尤其是对于非专业艺术家而言。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习框架来生成由音频特征引导的封面艺术。受 VQGAN-CLIP 的启发，我们的方法非常灵活，因为可以轻松更换各个组件，而无需任何重新训练。本文概述了我们模型的架构细节，并讨论了其中出现的优化挑战。更具体地说，我们将利用遗传算法来克服不良的局部最小值和对抗性示例。我们发现我们的框架可以为大多数类型生成合适的封面艺术，并且视觉特征可以适应音频特征的变化。鉴于这些结果，我们相信我们的框架为音频引导视觉生成任务中的扩展和更高级的应用铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于音频特征的深度学习框架，利用遗传算法生成专辑封面艺术。
AI.motivation: 由于Spotify等平台歌曲竞争激烈，吸引听众的封面艺术至关重要，但设计过程对非专业人士来说具有挑战性且耗时昂贵。
AI.method: 受VQGAN-CLIP启发，构建可灵活替换组件的深度学习框架，并采用遗传算法优化以避免局部最优和对抗样本问题。
AI.result: 框架能为多数音乐类型生成适配的封面艺术，视觉特征可随音频特征变化自适应调整。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为音频引导的视觉生成任务提供了可行方案，为后续扩展应用奠定了基础。

In that regard, the importance of captivating and inviting cover art cannot be underestimated, because it is deeply entangled with a song's character and the artist's identity, and remains one of the most important gateways to lead people to discover music. However, designing cover art is a highly creative, lengthy and sometimes expensive process that can be daunting, especially for non-professional artists. For this reason, we propose a novel deep-learning framework to generate cover art guided by audio features. Inspired by VQGAN-CLIP, our approach is highly flexible because individual components can easily be replaced without the need for any retraining. This paper outlines the architectural details of our models and discusses the optimization challenges that emerge from them. More specifically, we will exploit genetic algorithms to overcome bad local minima and adversarial examples. We find that our framework can generate suitable cover art for most genres, and that the visual features adapt themselves to audio feature changes. Given these results, we believe that our framework paves the road for extensions and more advanced applications in audio-guided visual generation tasks. authors_text: Marina O. Lisnichenko,Stanislav I. Protasov
title: Case study on quantum convolutional neural network scalability
title_zh: 量子卷积神经网络可扩展性案例研究
abstract: One of the crucial tasks in computer science is the processing time reduction of various data types, i.e., images, which is important for different fields -- from medicine and logistics to virtual shopping. Compared to classical computers, quantum computers are capable of parallel data processing, which reduces the data processing time. This quality of quantum computers inspired intensive research of the potential of quantum technologies applicability to real-life tasks. Some progress has already revealed on a smaller volumes of the input data. In this research effort, I aimed to increase the amount of input data (I used images from 2 x 2 to 8 x 8), while reducing the processing time, by way of skipping intermediate measurement steps. The hypothesis was that, for increased input data, the omitting of intermediate measurement steps after each quantum convolution layer will improve output metric results and accelerate data processing. To test the hypothesis, I performed experiments to chose the best activation function and its derivative in each network. The hypothesis was partly confirmed in terms of output mean squared error (MSE) -- it dropped from 0.25 in the result of classical convolutional neural network (CNN) training to 0.23 in the result of quantum convolutional neural network (QCNN) training. In terms of the training time, however, which was 1.5 minutes for CNN and 4 hours 37 minutes in the least lengthy training iteration, the hypothesis was rejected.
summary: One of the crucial tasks in computer science is the processing time reduction of various data types, i.e., images, which is important for different fields -- from medicine and logistics to virtual shopping. Compared to classical computers, quantum computers are capable of parallel data processing, which reduces the data processing time. This quality of quantum computers inspired intensive research of the potential of quantum technologies applicability to real-life tasks. Some progress has already revealed on a smaller volumes of the input data. In this research effort, I aimed to increase the amount of input data (I used images from 2 x 2 to 8 x 8), while reducing the processing time, by way of skipping intermediate measurement steps. The hypothesis was that, for increased input data, the omitting of intermediate measurement steps after each quantum convolution layer will improve output metric results and accelerate data processing. To test the hypothesis, I performed experiments to chose the best activation function and its derivative in each network. The hypothesis was partly confirmed in terms of output mean squared error (MSE) -- it dropped from 0.25 in the result of classical convolutional neural network (CNN) training to 0.23 in the result of quantum convolutional neural network (QCNN) training. In terms of the training time, however, which was 1.5 minutes for CNN and 4 hours 37 minutes in the least lengthy training iteration, the hypothesis was rejected.
abstract_zh: 计算机科学的关键任务之一是减少各种数据类型（即图像）的处理时间，这对于从医学、物流到虚拟购物等不同领域都很重要。与经典计算机相比，量子计算机能够并行数据处理，从而减少了数据处理时间。量子计算机的这种品质激发了人们对量子技术在现实生活任务中的应用潜力的深入研究。在输入数据量较小的情况下已经取得了一些进展。在这项研究工作中，我的目标是通过跳过中间测量步骤来增加输入数据量（我使用的图像从 2 x 2 到 8 x 8），同时减少处理时间。假设是，对于增加的输入数据，在每个量子卷积层之后省略中间测量步骤将改善输出度量结果并加速数据处理。为了检验这个假设，我进行了实验来选择每个网络中的最佳激活函数及其导数。该假设在输出均方误差（MSE）方面得到了部分证实——它从经典卷积神经网络（CNN）训练结果中的0.25下降到量子卷积神经网络（QCNN）训练结果中的0.23。然而，就训练时间而言，CNN 为 1.5 分钟，最短训练迭代为 4 小时 37 分钟，该假设被拒绝。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了量子卷积神经网络（QCNN）在处理更大规模输入数据时的可扩展性，通过跳过中间测量步骤以减少处理时间。
AI.motivation: 经典计算机处理图像等数据时存在时间瓶颈，量子计算机的并行性可能提升效率，但需验证其在更大数据量下的可行性。
AI.method: 通过实验选择最佳激活函数及导数，对比经典CNN与QCNN在不同输入尺寸（2x2至8x8图像）下的表现，跳过量子卷积层的中间测量步骤。
AI.result: QCNN的均方误差（MSE）从0.25降至0.23，但训练时间从1.5分钟激增至4小时37分钟，假设未被验证。
AI.conclusion: QCNN在精度上略有提升，但处理时间未达预期优化，需进一步研究量子算法与硬件的改进方案。

search_text: Case study on quantum convolutional neural network scalability 量子卷积神经网络可扩展性案例研究 One of the crucial tasks in computer science is the processing time reduction of various data types, i.e., images, which is important for different fields -- from medicine and logistics to virtual shopping. Compared to classical computers, quantum computers are capable of parallel data processing, which reduces the data processing time. This quality of quantum computers inspired intensive research of the potential of quantum technologies applicability to real-life tasks. Some progress has already revealed on a smaller volumes of the input data. In this research effort, I aimed to increase the amount of input data (I used images from 2 x 2 to 8 x 8), while reducing the processing time, by way of skipping intermediate measurement steps. The hypothesis was that, for increased input data, the omitting of intermediate measurement steps after each quantum convolution layer will improve output metric results and accelerate data processing. To test the hypothesis, I performed experiments to chose the best activation function and its derivative in each network. The hypothesis was partly confirmed in terms of output mean squared error (MSE) -- it dropped from 0.25 in the result of classical convolutional neural network (CNN) training to 0.23 in the result of quantum convolutional neural network (QCNN) training. In terms of the training time, however, which was 1.5 minutes for CNN and 4 hours 37 minutes in the least lengthy training iteration, the hypothesis was rejected. 计算机科学的关键任务之一是减少各种数据类型（即图像）的处理时间，这对于从医学、物流到虚拟购物等不同领域都很重要。与经典计算机相比，量子计算机能够并行数据处理，从而减少了数据处理时间。量子计算机的这种品质激发了人们对量子技术在现实生活任务中的应用潜力的深入研究。在输入数据量较小的情况下已经取得了一些进展。在这项研究工作中，我的目标是通过跳过中间测量步骤来增加输入数据量（我使用的图像从 2 x 2 到 8 x 8），同时减少处理时间。假设是，对于增加的输入数据，在每个量子卷积层之后省略中间测量步骤将改善输出度量结果并加速数据处理。为了检验这个假设，我进行了实验来选择每个网络中的最佳激活函数及其导数。该假设在输出均方误差（MSE）方面得到了部分证实——它从经典卷积神经网络（CNN）训练结果中的0.25下降到量子卷积神经网络（QCNN）训练结果中的0.23。然而，就训练时间而言，CNN 为 1.5 分钟，最短训练迭代为 4 小时 37 分钟，该假设被拒绝。 本论文研究了量子卷积神经网络（QCNN）在处理更大规模输入数据时的可扩展性，通过跳过中间测量步骤以减少处理时间。 Marina O. Lisnichenko,Stanislav I. Protasov cs.ET,cs.LG

authors_text: Raghuvansh R. Saxena,Noah Singer,Madhu Sudan,Santhoshini Velusamy
title: Streaming complexity of CSPs with randomly ordered constraints
title_zh: 具有随机排序约束的 CSP 的流复杂性
abstract: We initiate a study of the streaming complexity of constraint satisfaction problems (CSPs) when the constraints arrive in a random order. We show that there exists a CSP, namely $\textsf{Max-DICUT}$, for which random ordering makes a provable difference. Whereas a $4/9 \approx 0.445$ approximation of $\textsf{DICUT}$ requires $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ space with adversarial ordering, we show that with random ordering of constraints there exists a $0.48$-approximation algorithm that only needs $O(\log n)$ space. We also give new algorithms for $\textsf{Max-DICUT}$ in variants of the adversarial ordering setting. Specifically, we give a two-pass $O(\log n)$ space $0.48$-approximation algorithm for general graphs and a single-pass $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n})$ space $0.48$-approximation algorithm for bounded degree graphs. On the negative side, we prove that CSPs where the satisfying assignments of the constraints support a one-wise independent distribution require $Ω(\sqrt{n})$-space for any non-trivial approximation, even when the constraints are randomly ordered. This was previously known only for adversarially ordered constraints. Extending the results to randomly ordered constraints requires switching the hard instances from a union of random matchings to simple Erdös-Renyi random (hyper)graphs and extending tools that can perform Fourier analysis on such instances. The only CSP to have been considered previously with random ordering is $\textsf{Max-CUT}$ where the ordering is not known to change the approximability. Specifically it is known to be as hard to approximate with random ordering as with adversarial ordering, for $o(\sqrt{n})$ space algorithms. Our results show a richer variety of possibilities and motivate further study of CSPs with randomly ordered constraints.
summary: We initiate a study of the streaming complexity of constraint satisfaction problems (CSPs) when the constraints arrive in a random order. We show that there exists a CSP, namely $\textsf{Max-DICUT}$, for which random ordering makes a provable difference. Whereas a $4/9 \approx 0.445$ approximation of $\textsf{DICUT}$ requires $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ space with adversarial ordering, we show that with random ordering of constraints there exists a $0.48$-approximation algorithm that only needs $O(\log n)$ space. We also give new algorithms for $\textsf{Max-DICUT}$ in variants of the adversarial ordering setting. Specifically, we give a two-pass $O(\log n)$ space $0.48$-approximation algorithm for general graphs and a single-pass $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n})$ space $0.48$-approximation algorithm for bounded degree graphs. On the negative side, we prove that CSPs where the satisfying assignments of the constraints support a one-wise independent distribution require $Ω(\sqrt{n})$-space for any non-trivial approximation, even when the constraints are randomly ordered. This was previously known only for adversarially ordered constraints. Extending the results to randomly ordered constraints requires switching the hard instances from a union of random matchings to simple Erdös-Renyi random (hyper)graphs and extending tools that can perform Fourier analysis on such instances. The only CSP to have been considered previously with random ordering is $\textsf{Max-CUT}$ where the ordering is not known to change the approximability. Specifically it is known to be as hard to approximate with random ordering as with adversarial ordering, for $o(\sqrt{n})$ space algorithms. Our results show a richer variety of possibilities and motivate further study of CSPs with randomly ordered constraints.
abstract_zh: 我们开始研究当约束以随机顺序到达时约束满足问题（CSP）的流复杂性。我们证明存在一个 CSP，即 $\textsf{Max-DICUT}$，随机排序会产生可证明的差异。尽管 $\textsf{DICUT}$ 的 $4/9 \approx 0.445$ 近似需要具有对抗性排序的 $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ 空间，但我们表明，在约束随机排序的情况下，存在一个仅需要 $O(\log n)$ 空间的 $0.48$ 近似算法。我们还在对抗性排序设置的变体中给出了 $\textsf{Max-DICUT}$ 的新算法。具体来说，我们给出了一般图的两遍 $O(\log n)$ 空间 $0.48$ 近似算法和有界度图的单遍 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n})$ 空间 $0.48$ 近似算法。从消极的一面来看，我们证明，满足约束分配支持单向独立分布的 CSP 需要 $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ 空间来实现任何非平凡的近似，即使约束是随机排序的。此前，这一点仅针对对抗性有序约束而为人所知。将结果扩展到随机排序的约束需要将硬实例从随机匹配的并集切换为简单的 Erdös-Renyi 随机（超）图，并扩展可以对此类实例执行傅立叶分析的工具。之前考虑过随机排序的唯一 CSP 是 $\textsf{Max-CUT}$，其中未知排序会改变近似性。具体来说，对于 $o(\sqrt{n})$ 空间算法，随机排序与对抗排序一样难以近似。我们的结果显示了更丰富的可能性，并激发了对具有随机排序约束的 CSP 的进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在约束以随机顺序到达时，约束满足问题（CSP）的流式计算复杂度，重点分析了Max-DICUT问题的近似算法空间复杂度变化。
AI.motivation: 现有研究显示某些CSP在对抗性约束顺序下需要高空间复杂度，但随机顺序是否影响结果尚不明确。本文旨在探索随机顺序对CSP流式复杂度的影响，并以Max-DICUT为例进行验证。
AI.method: 通过构造Erdős-Rényi随机超图模型，结合傅里叶分析工具，设计针对随机顺序约束的近似算法，并对比对抗性顺序下的算法性能与下界证明。
AI.result: 发现随机顺序下Max-DICUT存在0.48近似率的O(log n)空间算法，而对抗性顺序需Ω(√n)空间；同时证明某些CSP在随机顺序下仍需Ω(√n)空间，且扩展了适用于随机超图的分析方法。
AI.conclusion: 随机约束顺序可显著降低部分CSP的流式计算空间需求，表明约束顺序对复杂度有重要影响，未来需进一步研究更多CSP的随机顺序特性。

authors_text: Ryo Eguchi,David Vacek,Cole Godzinski,Silvia Curry,Max Evans,Allison M. Okamura
title: Between-Tactor Display Using Dynamic Tactile Stimuli
title_zh: 使用动态触觉刺激的触手间显示
abstract: Display of illusory vibration locations between physical vibrotactile motors (tactors) placed on the skin has the potential to reduce the number of tactors in distributed tactile displays. This paper presents a between-tactor display method that uses dynamic tactile stimuli to generate illusory vibration locations. A belt with only 6 vibration motors displays 24 targets consisting of on-tactor and between-tactor locations. On-tactor locations are represented by simply vibrating the relevant single tactor. Between-tactor locations are displayed by adjusting the relative vibration amplitudes of two adjacent motors, with either (1) constant vibration amplitudes or (2) perturbed vibration amplitudes (creating local illusory motion). User testing showed that perturbations improve recognition accuracy for in-between tactor localization.
summary: Display of illusory vibration locations between physical vibrotactile motors (tactors) placed on the skin has the potential to reduce the number of tactors in distributed tactile displays. This paper presents a between-tactor display method that uses dynamic tactile stimuli to generate illusory vibration locations. A belt with only 6 vibration motors displays 24 targets consisting of on-tactor and between-tactor locations. On-tactor locations are represented by simply vibrating the relevant single tactor. Between-tactor locations are displayed by adjusting the relative vibration amplitudes of two adjacent motors, with either (1) constant vibration amplitudes or (2) perturbed vibration amplitudes (creating local illusory motion). User testing showed that perturbations improve recognition accuracy for in-between tactor localization.
abstract_zh: 显示放置在皮肤上的物理振动触觉电机（接触器）之间的虚幻振动位置有可能减少分布式触觉显示器中接触器的数量。本文提出了一种使用动态触觉刺激来生成虚幻振动位置的触觉器间显示方法。仅配备 6 个振动电机的传送带可显示 24 个目标，包括接触器上和接触器之间的位置。通过简单地振动相关的单个接触器来表示接触器上的位置。通过调整两个相邻电机的相对振动幅度来显示接触器之间的位置，其中（1）恒定振动幅度或（2）扰动振动幅度（创建局部虚幻运动）。用户测试表明，扰动提高了中间接触器定位的识别准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用动态触觉刺激在物理振动马达之间生成幻觉振动位置的触觉显示方法，以减少分布式触觉显示器中马达的数量。
AI.motivation: 通过减少触觉显示器中物理振动马达的数量，可降低设备成本并简化设计，同时保持定位精度。
AI.method: 使用仅含6个振动马达的腰带，通过调整相邻马达的振动幅度（恒定幅度或扰动幅度）来显示24个目标位置，其中扰动幅度可产生局部幻觉运动。
AI.result: 用户测试表明，扰动幅度方法显著提高了用户对马达间位置的识别准确性。
AI.conclusion: 动态触觉刺激（尤其是扰动幅度）能有效生成幻觉振动位置，为减少触觉显示器马达数量提供了可行方案。

method: 使用仅含6个振动马达的腰带，通过调整相邻马达的振动幅度（恒定幅度或扰动幅度）来显示24个目标位置，其中扰动幅度可产生局部幻觉运动。
result: 用户测试表明，扰动幅度方法显著提高了用户对马达间位置的识别准确性。
conclusion: 动态触觉刺激（尤其是扰动幅度）能有效生成幻觉振动位置，为减少触觉显示器马达数量提供了可行方案。
search_text: Between-Tactor Display Using Dynamic Tactile Stimuli 使用动态触觉刺激的触手间显示 Display of illusory vibration locations between physical vibrotactile motors (tactors) placed on the skin has the potential to reduce the number of tactors in distributed tactile displays. This paper presents a between-tactor display method that uses dynamic tactile stimuli to generate illusory vibration locations. A belt with only 6 vibration motors displays 24 targets consisting of on-tactor and between-tactor locations. On-tactor locations are represented by simply vibrating the relevant single tactor. Between-tactor locations are displayed by adjusting the relative vibration amplitudes of two adjacent motors, with either (1) constant vibration amplitudes or (2) perturbed vibration amplitudes (creating local illusory motion). User testing showed that perturbations improve recognition accuracy for in-between tactor localization. 显示放置在皮肤上的物理振动触觉电机（接触器）之间的虚幻振动位置有可能减少分布式触觉显示器中接触器的数量。本文提出了一种使用动态触觉刺激来生成虚幻振动位置的触觉器间显示方法。仅配备 6 个振动电机的传送带可显示 24 个目标，包括接触器上和接触器之间的位置。通过简单地振动相关的单个接触器来表示接触器上的位置。通过调整两个相邻电机的相对振动幅度来显示接触器之间的位置，其中（1）恒定振动幅度或（2）扰动振动幅度（创建局部虚幻运动）。用户测试表明，扰动提高了中间接触器定位的识别准确性。 本文提出一种利用动态触觉刺激在物理振动马达之间生成幻觉振动位置的触觉显示方法，以减少分布式触觉显示器中马达的数量。 Ryo Eguchi,David Vacek,Cole Godzinski,Silvia Curry,Max Evans,Allison M. Okamura cs.HC,cs.RO

authors_text: Zhang Jiayu
title: Design of VR Engine Assembly Teaching System
title_zh: VR发动机装配教学系统设计
abstract: Virtual reality(VR) is a hot research topic, and it has been effectively applied in military, education and other fields. The application prospect of virtual reality in education is very broad. It can effectively reduce labor cost, resource consumption, stimulate students' interest in learning, and improve students' knowledge level. New energy vehicles have also been widely promoted in recent years, and the production of new energy vehicles has played a key role in it. However, the teaching of car engine disassembly and assembly still retains a more traditional way. That's why applying VR technology has high significance. This project uses the Unity 3D engine to develop a VR-based engine teaching software, which aims to allow users to use VR headsets, handles and other accessories to simulate the disassembly and assembly of car engines in a virtual environment. We design a modular system framework and divided the software into two layers, the system layer and the function layer. The system layer includes a message system and a data configuration system. The functional layer includes the user interface system, disassembly and assembly function, and data module. In addition to fulfilling functional requirements , we used the Unity UPR tool to check out performance issues, and optimized product performance by turning off vertical sync and turning on static switches for some scene objects.

This project uses the Unity 3D engine to develop a VR-based engine teaching software, which aims to allow users to use VR headsets, handles and other accessories to simulate the disassembly and assembly of car engines in a virtual environment. We design a modular system framework and divided the software into two layers, the system layer and the function layer. The system layer includes a message system and a data configuration system. The functional layer includes the user interface system, disassembly and assembly function, and data module. In addition to fulfilling functional requirements , we used the Unity UPR tool to check out performance issues, and optimized product performance by turning off vertical sync and turning on static switches for some scene objects.
abstract_zh: 虚拟现实（VR）是一个研究热点，在军事、教育等领域得到了有效的应用。虚拟现实在教育中的应用前景非常广阔。可以有效降低劳动力成本、资源消耗，激发学生的学习兴趣，提高学生的知识水平。近年来新能源汽车也得到了广泛推广，新能源汽车的生产在其中发挥了关键作用。然而，汽车发动机拆装教学仍然保留着较为传统的方式。因此，应用VR技术具有非常重要的意义。本项目采用Unity 3D引擎开发一款基于VR的发动机教学软件，旨在让用户使用VR耳机、手柄等配件在虚拟环境中模拟汽车发动机的拆装。我们设计了模块化的系统框架，将软件分为系统层和功能层两层。系统层包括消息系统和数据配置系统。功能层包括用户界面系统、拆装功能、数据模块。除了满足功能需求外，我们还利用Unity UPR工具排查了性能问题，并通过关闭垂直同步、打开部分场景对象的静态开关来优化产品性能。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个基于虚拟现实（VR）技术的汽车发动机拆装教学系统，使用Unity 3D引擎开发，旨在通过虚拟环境模拟发动机拆装过程。
AI.motivation: 传统汽车发动机拆装教学方式存在成本高、资源消耗大等问题，而VR技术能有效降低教学成本、提升学生学习兴趣与知识水平，因此具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 采用Unity 3D引擎构建系统，设计分层架构（系统层与功能层），系统层包含消息系统和数据配置系统，功能层包含用户界面、拆装功能及数据模块，并通过UPR工具优化性能。
AI.result: 开发完成支持VR头显和手柄操作的发动机拆装教学软件，实现功能需求并通过性能优化提升系统运行效率。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效将VR技术应用于教育领域，验证了其在降低教学成本、提高学习效果方面的潜力，未来可进一步扩展功能与优化交互体验。

authors_text: Harshvardhan Anand,Nansi Begam,Richa Verma,Sourav Ghosh,Harichandana B. S. S,Sumit Kumar
title: LIP: Lightweight Intelligent Preprocessor for meaningful text-to-speech
title_zh: LIP：轻量级智能预处理器，用于有意义的文本转语音
comment: Best Paper Award recipient at IEEE CONECCT 2022 in "Consumer Technology" track. Accepted at the 8th IEEE International Conference on Electronics, Computing and Communication Technologies (CONECCT), July 8-10, 2022. Contains main paper and 4 additional pages of supplementary material
comments: Best Paper Award recipient at IEEE CONECCT 2022 in "Consumer Technology" track. Accepted at the 8th IEEE International Conference on Electronics, Computing and Communication Technologies (CONECCT), July 8-10, 2022. Contains main paper and 4 additional pages of supplementary material
abstract: Existing Text-to-Speech (TTS) systems need to read messages from the email which may have Personal Identifiable Information (PII) to text messages that can have a streak of emojis and punctuation. 92% of the world's online population use emoji with more than 10 billion emojis sent everyday. Lack of preprocessor leads to messages being read as-is including punctuation and infographics like emoticons. This problem worsens if there is a continuous sequence of punctuation/emojis that are quite common in real-world communications like messaging, Social Networking Site (SNS) interactions, etc. In this work, we aim to introduce a lightweight intelligent preprocessor (LIP) that can enhance the readability of a message before being passed downstream to existing TTS systems. We propose multiple sub-modules including: expanding contraction, censoring swear words, and masking of PII, as part of our preprocessor to enhance the readability of text. With a memory footprint of only 3.55 MB and inference time of 4 ms for up to 50-character text, our solution is suitable for real-time deployment. This work being the first of its kind, we try to benchmark with an open independent survey, the result of which shows 76.5% preference towards LIP enabled TTS engine as compared to standard TTS.

Lack of preprocessor leads to messages being read as-is including punctuation and infographics like emoticons. This problem worsens if there is a continuous sequence of punctuation/emojis that are quite common in real-world communications like messaging, Social Networking Site (SNS) interactions, etc. In this work, we aim to introduce a lightweight intelligent preprocessor (LIP) that can enhance the readability of a message before being passed downstream to existing TTS systems. We propose multiple sub-modules including: expanding contraction, censoring swear words, and masking of PII, as part of our preprocessor to enhance the readability of text. With a memory footprint of only 3.55 MB and inference time of 4 ms for up to 50-character text, our solution is suitable for real-time deployment. This work being the first of its kind, we try to benchmark with an open independent survey, the result of which shows 76.5% preference towards LIP enabled TTS engine as compared to standard TTS.
abstract_zh: 现有的文本转语音 (TTS) 系统需要将可能包含个人身份信息 (PII) 的电子邮件读取到可能包含表情符号和标点符号的文本消息。全球 92% 的网民使用表情符号，每天发送的表情符号超过 100 亿个。缺乏预处理器会导致消息按原样读取，包括标点符号和表情符号等信息图表。如果存在连续的标点符号/表情符号序列，这些标点符号/表情符号在现实世界的通信（如消息传递、社交网站 (SNS) 交互等）中非常常见，那么这个问题就会变得更糟。在这项工作中，我们的目标是引入一种轻量级智能预处理器 (LIP)，它可以在消息向下游传递到现有 TTS 系统之前增强消息的可读性。我们提出了多个子模块，包括：扩展收缩、审查脏话和 PII 屏蔽，作为我们预处理器的一部分，以增强文本的可读性。我们的解决方案的内存占用仅为 3.55 MB，最多 50 个字符的文本的推理时间为 4 毫秒，适合实时部署。这项工作是此类工作中的首例，我们尝试通过一项公开的独立调查进行基准测试，结果显示，与标准 TTS 相比，76.5% 的人更喜欢支持 LIP 的 TTS 引擎。

AI.tldr: 本文提出轻量级智能预处理器LIP，用于优化文本转语音（TTS）系统中包含敏感信息、表情符号和标点符号的文本处理，提升语音输出的可读性。
AI.motivation: 现有TTS系统无法有效处理包含个人身份信息（PII）、连续标点符号和表情符号的文本，导致输出内容可能泄露隐私或难以理解，影响用户体验。
AI.method: LIP包含三个子模块：展开缩写、审查脏话、屏蔽PII，并采用轻量级设计（内存占用3.55MB，50字符文本推理时间4ms），适合实时部署。
AI.result: 通过开放调查发现，76.5%的用户更偏好使用LIP优化后的TTS引擎，相较于标准TTS系统显著提升用户满意度。
AI.conclusion: LIP作为首个针对TTS预处理的轻量级方案，有效解决了敏感信息处理与文本可读性问题，为实时语音应用提供了可行优化路径。

We propose multiple sub-modules including: expanding contraction, censoring swear words, and masking of PII, as part of our preprocessor to enhance the readability of text. With a memory footprint of only 3.55 MB and inference time of 4 ms for up to 50-character text, our solution is suitable for real-time deployment. This work being the first of its kind, we try to benchmark with an open independent survey, the result of which shows 76.5% preference towards LIP enabled TTS engine as compared to standard TTS. 现有的文本转语音 (TTS) 系统需要将可能包含个人身份信息 (PII) 的电子邮件读取到可能包含表情符号和标点符号的文本消息。全球 92% 的网民使用表情符号，每天发送的表情符号超过 100 亿个。缺乏预处理器会导致消息按原样读取，包括标点符号和表情符号等信息图表。如果存在连续的标点符号/表情符号序列，这些标点符号/表情符号在现实世界的通信（如消息传递、社交网站 (SNS) 交互等）中非常常见，那么这个问题就会变得更糟。在这项工作中，我们的目标是引入一种轻量级智能预处理器 (LIP)，它可以在消息向下游传递到现有 TTS 系统之前增强消息的可读性。我们提出了多个子模块，包括：扩展收缩、审查脏话和 PII 屏蔽，作为我们预处理器的一部分，以增强文本的可读性。我们的解决方案的内存占用仅为 3.55 MB，最多 50 个字符的文本的推理时间为 4 毫秒，适合实时部署。这项工作是此类工作中的首例，我们尝试通过一项公开的独立调查进行基准测试，结果显示，与标准 TTS 相比，76.5% 的人更喜欢支持 LIP 的 TTS 引擎。 本文提出轻量级智能预处理器LIP，用于优化文本转语音（TTS）系统中包含敏感信息、表情符号和标点符号的文本处理，提升语音输出的可读性。 Harshvardhan Anand,Nansi Begam,Richa Verma,Sourav Ghosh,Harichandana B. S. S,Sumit Kumar cs.CL,cs.HC

authors_text: Justin Liu
title: A Novel Implementation of Machine Learning for the Efficient, Explainable Diagnosis of COVID-19 from Chest CT
title_zh: 机器学习的新颖实现，通过胸部 CT 对 COVID-19 进行高效、可解释的诊断
abstract: In a worldwide health crisis as exigent as COVID-19, there has become a pressing need for rapid, reliable diagnostics. Currently, popular testing methods such as reverse transcription polymerase chain reaction (RT-PCR) can have high false negative rates. Consequently, COVID-19 patients are not accurately identified nor treated quickly enough to prevent transmission of the virus. However, the recent rise of medical CT data has presented promising avenues, since CT manifestations contain key characteristics indicative of COVID-19. This study aimed to take a novel approach in the machine learning-based detection of COVID-19 from chest CT scans. First, the dataset utilized in this study was derived from three major sources, comprising a total of 17,698 chest CT slices across 923 patient cases. Image preprocessing algorithms were then developed to reduce noise by excluding irrelevant features. Transfer learning was also implemented with the EfficientNetB7 pre-trained model to provide a backbone architecture and save computational resources. Lastly, several explainability techniques were leveraged to qualitatively validate model performance by localizing infected regions and highlighting fine-grained pixel details. The proposed model attained an overall accuracy of 0.927 and a sensitivity of 0.958. Explainability measures showed that the model correctly distinguished between relevant, critical features pertaining to COVID-19 chest CT images and normal controls. Deep learning frameworks provide efficient, human-interpretable COVID-19 diagnostics that could complement radiologist decisions or serve as an alternative screening tool. Future endeavors may provide insight into infection severity, patient risk stratification, and prognosis.

Deep learning frameworks provide efficient, human-interpretable COVID-19 diagnostics that could complement radiologist decisions or serve as an alternative screening tool. Future endeavors may provide insight into infection severity, patient risk stratification, and prognosis.
abstract_zh: 在像 COVID-19 这样严峻的全球健康危机中，迫切需要快速、可靠的诊断。目前流行的检测方法，如逆转录聚合酶链反应（RT-PCR），假阴性率较高。因此，新冠肺炎 (COVID-19) 患者的识别和治疗速度不够快，无法防止病毒传播。然而，最近医学 CT 数据的兴起提供了有希望的途径，因为 CT 表现包含指示 COVID-19 的关键特征。本研究旨在采用一种基于机器学习的新颖方法，通过胸部 CT 扫描检测 COVID-19。首先，本研究中使用的数据集来自三个主要来源，包括 923 例患者的总共 17,698 张胸部 CT 切片。然后开发了图像预处理算法，通过排除不相关的特征来减少噪声。迁移学习还通过 EfficientNetB7 预训练模型实现，以提供骨干架构并节省计算资源。最后，利用多种可解释性技术通过定位受感染区域并突出显示细粒度像素细节来定性验证模型性能。该模型的总体准确度为 0.927，灵敏度为 0.958。可解释性措施表明，该模型正确地区分了与 COVID-19 胸部 CT 图像和正常对照相关的相关关键特征。深度学习框架提供高效、人类可解释的 COVID-19 诊断，可以补充放射科医生的决策或作为替代筛查工具。未来的努力可能会提供对感染严重程度、患者风险分层和预后的深入了解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于机器学习的高效、可解释的COVID-19胸部CT诊断方法。
AI.motivation: 当前RT-PCR检测存在高假阴性率，导致患者无法及时确诊和治疗，而胸部CT数据包含关键特征，亟需开发快速可靠的诊断方法。
AI.method: 整合三个来源的17,698张胸部CT切片数据，采用图像预处理算法降噪，结合EfficientNetB7迁移学习框架，并通过可解释性技术定位感染区域。
AI.result: 模型总体准确率达0.927，敏感性达0.958，可有效区分COVID-19与正常影像特征。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习框架可提供高效且可解释的诊断方案，辅助放射科医生决策或作为筛查工具，未来可拓展至感染严重程度评估等领域。

authors_text: Xiaoyi Dong,Jianmin Bao,Ting Zhang,Dongdong Chen,Weiming Zhang,Lu Yuan,Dong Chen,Fang Wen,Nenghai Yu
title: Bootstrapped Masked Autoencoders for Vision BERT Pretraining
title_zh: 用于视觉 BERT 预训练的自举屏蔽自动编码器
comment: ECCV 2022, code is available at https://github.com/LightDXY/BootMAE
comments: ECCV 2022, code is available at https://github.com/LightDXY/BootMAE
abstract: We propose bootstrapped masked autoencoders (BootMAE), a new approach for vision BERT pretraining. BootMAE improves the original masked autoencoders (MAE) with two core designs: 1) momentum encoder that provides online feature as extra BERT prediction targets; 2) target-aware decoder that tries to reduce the pressure on the encoder to memorize target-specific information in BERT pretraining. The first design is motivated by the observation that using a pretrained MAE to extract the features as the BERT prediction target for masked tokens can achieve better pretraining performance. Therefore, we add a momentum encoder in parallel with the original MAE encoder, which bootstraps the pretraining performance by using its own representation as the BERT prediction target. In the second design, we introduce target-specific information (e.g., pixel values of unmasked patches) from the encoder directly to the decoder to reduce the pressure on the encoder of memorizing the target-specific information. Thus, the encoder focuses on semantic modeling, which is the goal of BERT pretraining, and does not need to waste its capacity in memorizing the information of unmasked tokens related to the prediction target. Through extensive experiments, our BootMAE achieves $84.2\%$ Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K with ViT-B backbone, outperforming MAE by $+0.8\%$ under the same pre-training epochs. BootMAE also gets $+1.0$ mIoU improvements on semantic segmentation on ADE20K and $+1.3$ box AP, $+1.4$ mask AP improvement on object detection and segmentation on COCO dataset. Code is released at https://github.com/LightDXY/BootMAE.
summary: We propose bootstrapped masked autoencoders (BootMAE), a new approach for vision BERT pretraining. BootMAE improves the original masked autoencoders (MAE) with two core designs: 1) momentum encoder that provides online feature as extra BERT prediction targets; 2) target-aware decoder that tries to reduce the pressure on the encoder to memorize target-specific information in BERT pretraining. The first design is motivated by the observation that using a pretrained MAE to extract the features as the BERT prediction target for masked tokens can achieve better pretraining performance. Therefore, we add a momentum encoder in parallel with the original MAE encoder, which bootstraps the pretraining performance by using its own representation as the BERT prediction target. In the second design, we introduce target-specific information (e.g., pixel values of unmasked patches) from the encoder directly to the decoder to reduce the pressure on the encoder of memorizing the target-specific information. Thus, the encoder focuses on semantic modeling, which is the goal of BERT pretraining, and does not need to waste its capacity in memorizing the information of unmasked tokens related to the prediction target. Through extensive experiments, our BootMAE achieves $84.2\%$ Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K with ViT-B backbone, outperforming MAE by $+0.8\%$ under the same pre-training epochs. BootMAE also gets $+1.0$ mIoU improvements on semantic segmentation on ADE20K and $+1.3$ box AP, $+1.4$ mask AP improvement on object detection and segmentation on COCO dataset. Code is released at https://github.com/LightDXY/BootMAE.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了引导屏蔽自动编码器（BootMAE），这是一种视觉 BERT 预训练的新方法。 BootMAE 通过两个核心设计改进了原始的屏蔽自动编码器（MAE）：1）动量编码器，提供在线功能作为额外的 BERT 预测目标； 2）目标感知解码器，试图减轻编码器在 BERT 预训练中记忆目标特定信息的压力。第一个设计的动机是观察到使用预训练的 MAE 提取特征作为屏蔽标记的 BERT 预测目标可以实现更好的预训练性能。因此，我们添加了一个与原始 MAE 编码器并行的动量编码器，它通过使用自己的表示作为 BERT 预测目标来引导预训练性能。在第二种设计中，我们将目标特定信息（例如，未屏蔽补丁的像素值）从编码器直接引入到解码器，以减轻编码器记忆目标特定信息的压力。因此，编码器专注于语义建模，这是 BERT 预训练的目标，不需要浪费其能力来记忆与预测目标相关的未屏蔽标记的信息。通过大量实验，我们的 BootMAE 在具有 ViT-B 主干的 ImageNet-1K 上实现了 $84.2\%$ Top-1 准确率，在相同的预训练时期下比 MAE 高出 $+0.8\%$。 BootMAE 还在 ADE20K 上的语义分割上获得了 $+1​​.0$ mIoU 改进，在 COCO 数据集上的对象检测和分割上获得了 $+1​​.3$ box AP、$+1.4$ mask AP 改进。代码发布于 https://github.com/LightDXY/BootMAE。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BootMAE的新方法，通过改进掩码自编码器（MAE）来提升视觉BERT的预训练效果。
AI.motivation: 传统MAE在预训练时需让编码器同时处理语义建模和目标特定信息记忆，导致效率低下。作者观察到使用预训练MAE提取特征作为BERT预测目标能提升性能，因此提出BootMAE以优化这一过程。
AI.method: BootMAE包含两个核心设计：1）引入动量编码器，提供在线特征作为BERT预测目标；2）设计目标感知解码器，减少编码器对目标特定信息的记忆压力，使其专注于语义建模。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K数据集上，BootMAE使用ViT-B骨干网络达到84.2%的Top-1准确率，较MAE提升0.8%。在ADE20K、COCO等数据集上，分割和检测任务指标均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: BootMAE通过解耦编码器的语义建模与目标记忆任务，有效提升了视觉BERT预训练性能，实验结果验证了其在多个下游任务中的优越性。

conclusion: BootMAE通过解耦编码器的语义建模与目标记忆任务，有效提升了视觉BERT预训练性能，实验结果验证了其在多个下游任务中的优越性。
search_text: Bootstrapped Masked Autoencoders for Vision BERT Pretraining 用于视觉 BERT 预训练的自举屏蔽自动编码器 We propose bootstrapped masked autoencoders (BootMAE), a new approach for vision BERT pretraining. BootMAE improves the original masked autoencoders (MAE) with two core designs: 1) momentum encoder that provides online feature as extra BERT prediction targets; 2) target-aware decoder that tries to reduce the pressure on the encoder to memorize target-specific information in BERT pretraining. The first design is motivated by the observation that using a pretrained MAE to extract the features as the BERT prediction target for masked tokens can achieve better pretraining performance. Therefore, we add a momentum encoder in parallel with the original MAE encoder, which bootstraps the pretraining performance by using its own representation as the BERT prediction target. In the second design, we introduce target-specific information (e.g., pixel values of unmasked patches) from the encoder directly to the decoder to reduce the pressure on the encoder of memorizing the target-specific information. Thus, the encoder focuses on semantic modeling, which is the goal of BERT pretraining, and does not need to waste its capacity in memorizing the information of unmasked tokens related to the prediction target. Through extensive experiments, our BootMAE achieves $84.2\%$ Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K with ViT-B backbone, outperforming MAE by $+0.8\%$ under the same pre-training epochs. BootMAE also gets $+1.0$ mIoU improvements on semantic segmentation on ADE20K and $+1.3$ box AP, $+1.4$ mask AP improvement on object detection and segmentation on COCO dataset. Code is released at https://github.com/LightDXY/BootMAE. 我们提出了引导屏蔽自动编码器（BootMAE），这是一种视觉 BERT 预训练的新方法。 BootMAE 通过两个核心设计改进了原始的屏蔽自动编码器（MAE）：1）动量编码器，提供在线功能作为额外的 BERT 预测目标； 2）目标感知解码器，试图减轻编码器在 BERT 预训练中记忆目标特定信息的压力。第一个设计的动机是观察到使用预训练的 MAE 提取特征作为屏蔽标记的 BERT 预测目标可以实现更好的预训练性能。因此，我们添加了一个与原始 MAE 编码器并行的动量编码器，它通过使用自己的表示作为 BERT 预测目标来引导预训练性能。在第二种设计中，我们将目标特定信息（例如，未屏蔽补丁的像素值）从编码器直接引入到解码器，以减轻编码器记忆目标特定信息的压力。因此，编码器专注于语义建模，这是 BERT 预训练的目标，不需要浪费其能力来记忆与预测目标相关的未屏蔽标记的信息。通过大量实验，我们的 BootMAE 在具有 ViT-B 主干的 ImageNet-1K 上实现了 $84.2\%$ Top-1 准确率，在相同的预训练时期下比 MAE 高出 $+0.8\%$。 BootMAE 还在 ADE20K 上的语义分割上获得了 $+1​​.0$ mIoU 改进，在 COCO 数据集上的对象检测和分割上获得了 $+1​​.3$ box AP、$+1.4$ mask AP 改进。代码发布于 https://github.com/LightDXY/BootMAE。 本文提出了一种名为BootMAE的新方法，通过改进掩码自编码器（MAE）来提升视觉BERT的预训练效果。 Xiaoyi Dong,Jianmin Bao,Ting Zhang,Dongdong Chen,Weiming Zhang,Lu Yuan,Dong Chen,Fang Wen,Nenghai Yu cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ho Kei Cheng,Alexander G. Schwing
title: XMem: Long-Term Video Object Segmentation with an Atkinson-Shiffrin Memory Model
title_zh: XMem：使用 Atkinson-Shiffrin 内存模型进行长期视频对象分割
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Project page: https://hkchengrex.github.io/XMem
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Project page: https://hkchengrex.github.io/XMem
abstract: We present XMem, a video object segmentation architecture for long videos with unified feature memory stores inspired by the Atkinson-Shiffrin memory model. Prior work on video object segmentation typically only uses one type of feature memory. For videos longer than a minute, a single feature memory model tightly links memory consumption and accuracy. In contrast, following the Atkinson-Shiffrin model, we develop an architecture that incorporates multiple independent yet deeply-connected feature memory stores: a rapidly updated sensory memory, a high-resolution working memory, and a compact thus sustained long-term memory. Crucially, we develop a memory potentiation algorithm that routinely consolidates actively used working memory elements into the long-term memory, which avoids memory explosion and minimizes performance decay for long-term prediction. Combined with a new memory reading mechanism, XMem greatly exceeds state-of-the-art performance on long-video datasets while being on par with state-of-the-art methods (that do not work on long videos) on short-video datasets. Code is available at https://hkchengrex.github.io/XMem
summary: We present XMem, a video object segmentation architecture for long videos with unified feature memory stores inspired by the Atkinson-Shiffrin memory model. Prior work on video object segmentation typically only uses one type of feature memory. For videos longer than a minute, a single feature memory model tightly links memory consumption and accuracy. In contrast, following the Atkinson-Shiffrin model, we develop an architecture that incorporates multiple independent yet deeply-connected feature memory stores: a rapidly updated sensory memory, a high-resolution working memory, and a compact thus sustained long-term memory. Crucially, we develop a memory potentiation algorithm that routinely consolidates actively used working memory elements into the long-term memory, which avoids memory explosion and minimizes performance decay for long-term prediction. Combined with a new memory reading mechanism, XMem greatly exceeds state-of-the-art performance on long-video datasets while being on par with state-of-the-art methods (that do not work on long videos) on short-video datasets. Code is available at https://hkchengrex.github.io/XMem
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 XMem，这是一种适用于长视频的视频对象分割架构，具有受 Atkinson-Shiffrin 内存模型启发的统一特征内存存储。先前关于视频对象分割的工作通常仅使用一种类型的特征存储器。对于超过一分钟的视频，单一特征内存模型将内存消耗和准确性紧密联系起来。相比之下，遵循阿特金森-希夫林模型，我们开发了一种架构，其中包含多个独立但深度连接的特征记忆存储：快速更新的感觉记忆、高分辨率工作记忆和紧凑的持续长期记忆。至关重要的是，我们开发了一种记忆增强算法，可以将经常使用的工作记忆元素整合到长期记忆中，从而避免记忆爆炸并最大限度地减少长期预测的性能衰减。结合新的内存读取机制，XMem 大大超过了长视频数据集上最先进的性能，同时与短视频数据集上最先进的方法（不适用于长视频）相当。代码可在 https://hk Chengrex.github.io/XMem 获取

AI.tldr: 提出XMem架构，利用Atkinson-Shiffrin记忆模型解决长视频对象分割的挑战
AI.motivation: 现有方法在长视频中存在内存消耗与准确性权衡问题，需更高效的记忆管理机制
AI.method: 基于Atkinson-Shiffrin模型，设计多独立但深度连接的记忆存储，包括快速更新的感觉记忆、高分辨率工作记忆和紧凑的长期记忆，并开发记忆强化算法以合并常用元素到长期记忆
AI.result: 在长视频数据集上显著优于现有方法，在短视频数据集上表现相当
AI.conclusion: 多记忆存储与强化算法有效解决长视频分割中的内存与性能问题，推动视频分割技术发展

authors_text: Ruizhao Zhu,Pengkai Zhu,Samarth Mishra,Venkatesh Saligrama
title: Fine-grained Few-shot Recognition by Deep Object Parsing
title_zh: 通过深度对象解析进行细粒度少镜头识别
abstract: We propose a new method for fine-grained few-shot recognition via deep object parsing. In our framework, an object is made up of K distinct parts and for each part, we learn a dictionary of templates, which is shared across all instances and categories. An object is parsed by estimating the locations of these K parts and a set of active templates that can reconstruct the part features. We recognize test instances by comparing its active templates and the relative geometry of its part locations against those of the presented few-shot instances. Our method is end-to-end trainable to learn part templates on-top of a convolutional backbone. To combat visual distortions such as orientation, pose and size, we learn templates at multiple scales, and at test-time parse and match instances across these scales. We show that our method is competitive with the state-of-the-art, and by virtue of parsing enjoys interpretability as well.
summary: We propose a new method for fine-grained few-shot recognition via deep object parsing. In our framework, an object is made up of K distinct parts and for each part, we learn a dictionary of templates, which is shared across all instances and categories. An object is parsed by estimating the locations of these K parts and a set of active templates that can reconstruct the part features. We recognize test instances by comparing its active templates and the relative geometry of its part locations against those of the presented few-shot instances. Our method is end-to-end trainable to learn part templates on-top of a convolutional backbone. To combat visual distortions such as orientation, pose and size, we learn templates at multiple scales, and at test-time parse and match instances across these scales. We show that our method is competitive with the state-of-the-art, and by virtue of parsing enjoys interpretability as well.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种通过深度对象解析进行细粒度少样本识别的新方法。在我们的框架中，一个对象由 K 个不同的部分组成，对于每个部分，我们学习一个模板字典，该字典在所有实例和类别之间共享。通过估计这 K 个部件的位置以及一组可以重建部件特征的活动模板来解析对象。我们通过将其活动模板及其零件位置的相对几何形状与所呈现的少样本实例进行比较来识别测试实例。我们的方法是端到端可训练的，可以在卷积主干之上学习零件模板。为了对抗方向、姿势和大小等视觉扭曲，我们学习多个尺度的模板，并在测试时解析和匹配这些尺度的实例。我们表明，我们的方法与最先进的方法具有竞争力，并且凭借解析也具有可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过深度对象解析进行细粒度少样本识别的新方法。
AI.motivation: 传统少样本学习方法在处理细粒度分类时难以捕捉对象结构信息，缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: 将对象分解为K个部分，学习共享的模板字典，通过多尺度模板匹配和部分几何关系进行识别。
AI.result: 方法在基准数据集上达到与最先进方法相当的性能，并具有部分级可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 深度对象解析为细粒度少样本识别提供了结构化视角，在准确率和可解释性之间取得平衡。

authors_text: Yuanhan Zhang,Zhenfei Yin,Jing Shao,Ziwei Liu
title: Benchmarking Omni-Vision Representation through the Lens of Visual Realms
title_zh: 通过视觉领域的视角对全视觉表示进行基准测试
comment: In ECCV 2022; The project page at https://zhangyuanhan-ai.github.io/OmniBenchmark
comments: In ECCV 2022; The project page at https://zhangyuanhan-ai.github.io/OmniBenchmark
abstract: Though impressive performance has been achieved in specific visual realms (e.g. faces, dogs, and places), an omni-vision representation generalizing to many natural visual domains is highly desirable. But, existing benchmarks are biased and inefficient to evaluate the omni-vision representation -- these benchmarks either only include several specific realms, or cover most realms at the expense of subsuming numerous datasets that have extensive realm overlapping. In this paper, we propose Omni-Realm Benchmark (OmniBenchmark). It includes 21 realm-wise datasets with 7,372 concepts and 1,074,346 images. Without semantic overlapping, these datasets cover most visual realms comprehensively and meanwhile efficiently. In addition, we propose a new supervised contrastive learning framework, namely Relational Contrastive learning (ReCo), for a better omni-vision representation. Beyond pulling two instances from the same concept closer -- the typical supervised contrastive learning framework -- ReCo also pulls two instances from the same semantic realm closer, encoding the semantic relation between concepts, and facilitating omni-vision representation learning. We benchmark ReCo and other advances in omni-vision representation studies that are different in architectures (from CNNs to transformers) and in learning paradigms (from supervised learning to self-supervised learning) on OmniBenchmark. We illustrate the superior of ReCo to other supervised contrastive learning methods and reveal multiple practical observations to facilitate future research.

We illustrate the superior of ReCo to other supervised contrastive learning methods and reveal multiple practical observations to facilitate future research.

But, existing benchmarks are biased and inefficient to evaluate the omni-vision representation -- these benchmarks either only include several specific realms, or cover most realms at the expense of subsuming numerous datasets that have extensive realm overlapping.在本文中，我们提出了全域基准（OmniBenchmark）。它包括 21 个领域数据集，包含 7,372 个概念和 1,074,346 张图像。这些数据集没有语义重叠，全面且高效地覆盖了大多数视觉领域。 In addition, we propose a new supervised contrastive learning framework, namely Relational Contrastive learning (ReCo), for a better omni-vision representation. Beyond pulling two instances from the same concept closer -- the typical supervised contrastive learning framework -- ReCo also pulls two instances from the same semantic realm closer, encoding the semantic relation between concepts, and facilitating omni-vision representation learning. We benchmark ReCo and other advances in omni-vision representation studies that are different in architectures (from CNNs to transformers) and in learning paradigms (from supervised learning to self-supervised learning) on OmniBenchmark. We illustrate the superior of ReCo to other supervised contrastive learning methods and reveal multiple practical observations to facilitate future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OmniBenchmark基准测试和ReCo框架，以提升多视觉领域通用表示的学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉表示基准存在领域覆盖不全或数据集重叠严重的问题，难以有效评估跨领域泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建无语义重叠的21个领域数据集（7372个概念/107万张图像）并提出ReCo对比学习框架，通过同时拉近同概念与同语义领域的实例关系优化表示学习。
AI.result: ReCo在多种架构（CNN/Transformer）和学习范式（监督/自监督）中均优于现有监督对比学习方法，并揭示了多个实用研究观察。
AI.conclusion: OmniBenchmark和ReCo为全视觉领域表示研究提供了新基准和方法，推动跨领域表征学习的发展。

search_text: Benchmarking Omni-Vision Representation through the Lens of Visual Realms 通过视觉领域的视角对全视觉表示进行基准测试 Though impressive performance has been achieved in specific visual realms (e.g. faces, dogs, and places), an omni-vision representation generalizing to many natural visual domains is highly desirable. But, existing benchmarks are biased and inefficient to evaluate the omni-vision representation -- these benchmarks either only include several specific realms, or cover most realms at the expense of subsuming numerous datasets that have extensive realm overlapping. In this paper, we propose Omni-Realm Benchmark (OmniBenchmark). It includes 21 realm-wise datasets with 7,372 concepts and 1,074,346 images. Without semantic overlapping, these datasets cover most visual realms comprehensively and meanwhile efficiently. In addition, we propose a new supervised contrastive learning framework, namely Relational Contrastive learning (ReCo), for a better omni-vision representation. Beyond pulling two instances from the same concept closer -- the typical supervised contrastive learning framework -- ReCo also pulls two instances from the same semantic realm closer, encoding the semantic relation between concepts, and facilitating omni-vision representation learning. We benchmark ReCo and other advances in omni-vision representation studies that are different in architectures (from CNNs to transformers) and in learning paradigms (from supervised learning to self-supervised learning) on OmniBenchmark. We illustrate the superior of ReCo to other supervised contrastive learning methods and reveal multiple practical observations to facilitate future research. Beyond pulling two instances from the same concept closer -- the typical supervised contrastive learning framework -- ReCo also pulls two instances from the same semantic realm closer, encoding the semantic relation between concepts, and facilitating omni-vision representation learning. We benchmark ReCo and other advances in omni-vision representation studies that are different in architectures (from CNNs to transformers) and in learning paradigms (from supervised learning to self-supervised learning) on OmniBenchmark. We illustrate the superior of ReCo to other supervised contrastive learning methods and reveal multiple practical observations to facilitate future research. 本文提出OmniBenchmark基准测试和ReCo框架，以提升多视觉领域通用表示的学习效果。 Yuanhan Zhang,Zhenfei Yin,Jing Shao,Ziwei Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Zhaoxi Chen,Ziwei Liu
title: Relighting4D: Neural Relightable Human from Videos
title_zh: Relighting4D：视频中的神经可重新照明人类
comment: ECCV 2022; Project Page https://frozenburning.github.io/projects/relighting4d Codes are available at https://github.com/FrozenBurning/Relighting4D
comments: ECCV 2022; Project Page https://frozenburning.github.io/projects/relighting4d Codes are available at https://github.com/FrozenBurning/Relighting4D
abstract: Human relighting is a highly desirable yet challenging task. Existing works either require expensive one-light-at-a-time (OLAT) captured data using light stage or cannot freely change the viewpoints of the rendered body. In this work, we propose a principled framework, Relighting4D, that enables free-viewpoints relighting from only human videos under unknown illuminations. Our key insight is that the space-time varying geometry and reflectance of the human body can be decomposed as a set of neural fields of normal, occlusion, diffuse, and specular maps. These neural fields are further integrated into reflectance-aware physically based rendering, where each vertex in the neural field absorbs and reflects the light from the environment. The whole framework can be learned from videos in a self-supervised manner, with physically informed priors designed for regularization. Extensive experiments on both real and synthetic datasets demonstrate that our framework is capable of relighting dynamic human actors with free-viewpoints.
summary: Human relighting is a highly desirable yet challenging task. Existing works either require expensive one-light-at-a-time (OLAT) captured data using light stage or cannot freely change the viewpoints of the rendered body. In this work, we propose a principled framework, Relighting4D, that enables free-viewpoints relighting from only human videos under unknown illuminations. Our key insight is that the space-time varying geometry and reflectance of the human body can be decomposed as a set of neural fields of normal, occlusion, diffuse, and specular maps. These neural fields are further integrated into reflectance-aware physically based rendering, where each vertex in the neural field absorbs and reflects the light from the environment. The whole framework can be learned from videos in a self-supervised manner, with physically informed priors designed for regularization. Extensive experiments on both real and synthetic datasets demonstrate that our framework is capable of relighting dynamic human actors with free-viewpoints.
abstract_zh: 人类重新照明是一项非常理想但具有挑战性的任务。现有作品要么需要使用光舞台昂贵的一次一灯（OLAT）捕获数据，要么无法自由改变渲染身体的视点。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个原则框架 Relighting4D，它可以在未知照明下仅从人类视频中进行自由视点重新照明。我们的主要见解是，人体时空变化的几何形状和反射率可以分解为一组法线、遮挡、漫反射和镜面反射贴图的神经场。这些神经场进一步集成到基于反射感知的物理渲染中，其中神经场中的每个顶点吸收并反射来自环境的光。整个框架可以通过自我监督的方式从视频中学习，并具有为正则化而设计的物理信息先验。对真实数据集和合成数据集的大量实验表明，我们的框架能够以自由视角重新照亮动态人类演员。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的框架Relighting4D，能够从未知光照条件下的视频中实现人类的自由视角重光照。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么需要昂贵的单光源捕获数据（OLAT），要么无法自由改变渲染视角，难以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 通过将人体时空变化的几何和反射属性分解为法线、遮挡、漫反射和高光的神经场，结合物理基于渲染的反射感知模型，并利用物理先验知识进行自监督学习。
AI.result: 在真实和合成数据集上的实验表明，该框架能够实现动态人体在自由视角下的高质量重光照效果。
AI.conclusion: Relighting4D为无需OLAT数据的人体重光照任务提供了新方法，在保持视角自由度的同时实现了物理合理的渲染效果。

authors_text: Dingfeng Shi,Yujie Zhong,Qiong Cao,Jing Zhang,Lin Ma,Jia Li,Dacheng Tao
title: ReAct: Temporal Action Detection with Relational Queries
title_zh: ReAct：使用关系查询进行时间动作检测
abstract: This work aims at advancing temporal action detection (TAD) using an encoder-decoder framework with action queries, similar to DETR, which has shown great success in object detection. However, the framework suffers from several problems if directly applied to TAD: the insufficient exploration of inter-query relation in the decoder, the inadequate classification training due to a limited number of training samples, and the unreliable classification scores at inference. To this end, we first propose a relational attention mechanism in the decoder, which guides the attention among queries based on their relations. Moreover, we propose two losses to facilitate and stabilize the training of action classification. Lastly, we propose to predict the localization quality of each action query at inference in order to distinguish high-quality queries. The proposed method, named ReAct, achieves the state-of-the-art performance on THUMOS14, with much lower computational costs than previous methods. Besides, extensive ablation studies are conducted to verify the effectiveness of each proposed component. The code is available at https://github.com/sssste/React.
summary: This work aims at advancing temporal action detection (TAD) using an encoder-decoder framework with action queries, similar to DETR, which has shown great success in object detection. However, the framework suffers from several problems if directly applied to TAD: the insufficient exploration of inter-query relation in the decoder, the inadequate classification training due to a limited number of training samples, and the unreliable classification scores at inference. To this end, we first propose a relational attention mechanism in the decoder, which guides the attention among queries based on their relations. Moreover, we propose two losses to facilitate and stabilize the training of action classification. Lastly, we propose to predict the localization quality of each action query at inference in order to distinguish high-quality queries. The proposed method, named ReAct, achieves the state-of-the-art performance on THUMOS14, with much lower computational costs than previous methods. Besides, extensive ablation studies are conducted to verify the effectiveness of each proposed component. The code is available at https://github.com/sssste/React.
abstract_zh: 这项工作旨在使用带有动作查询的编码器-解码器框架来推进时间动作检测（TAD），类似于 DETR，DETR 在对象检测方面取得了巨大成功。然而，如果直接应用于TAD，该框架会遇到几个问题：解码器中对查询间关系的探索不足、由于训练样本数量有限导致分类训练不充分以及推理时分类分数不可靠。为此，我们首先在解码器中提出了一种关系注意机制，该机制根据查询之间的关系来指导查询之间的注意。此外，我们提出了两个损失来促进和稳定动作分类的训练。最后，我们建议在推理时预测每个动作查询的本地化质量，以区分高质量的查询。所提出的方法名为 ReAct，在 THUMOS14 上实现了最先进的性能，并且计算成本比以前的方法低得多。此外，还进行了广泛的消融研究，以验证每个提议组件的有效性。该代码可在 https://github.com/sssste/React 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReAct方法，通过改进编码器-解码器框架解决时序动作检测中的问题。
AI.motivation: 直接应用DETR框架到时序动作检测存在查询间关系探索不足、分类训练样本有限及推理时分类得分不可靠等问题。
AI.method: 设计关系注意力机制增强解码器中查询间交互，提出两种损失函数稳定训练，并在推理时预测动作查询的定位质量以筛选高质量查询。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14数据集上达到SOTA性能，计算成本显著低于先前方法，消融实验验证各组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: ReAct通过关系建模与质量预测有效解决了时序动作检测的关键挑战，实现了高效准确的检测性能。

search_text: ReAct: Temporal Action Detection with Relational Queries ReAct：使用关系查询进行时间动作检测 This work aims at advancing temporal action detection (TAD) using an encoder-decoder framework with action queries, similar to DETR, which has shown great success in object detection. However, the framework suffers from several problems if directly applied to TAD: the insufficient exploration of inter-query relation in the decoder, the inadequate classification training due to a limited number of training samples, and the unreliable classification scores at inference. To this end, we first propose a relational attention mechanism in the decoder, which guides the attention among queries based on their relations. Moreover, we propose two losses to facilitate and stabilize the training of action classification. Lastly, we propose to predict the localization quality of each action query at inference in order to distinguish high-quality queries. The proposed method, named ReAct, achieves the state-of-the-art performance on THUMOS14, with much lower computational costs than previous methods. Besides, extensive ablation studies are conducted to verify the effectiveness of each proposed component. The code is available at https://github.com/sssste/React. 这项工作旨在使用带有动作查询的编码器-解码器框架来推进时间动作检测（TAD），类似于 DETR，DETR 在对象检测方面取得了巨大成功。然而，如果直接应用于TAD，该框架会遇到几个问题：解码器中对查询间关系的探索不足、由于训练样本数量有限导致分类训练不充分以及推理时分类分数不可靠。为此，我们首先在解码器中提出了一种关系注意机制，该机制根据查询之间的关系来指导查询之间的注意。此外，我们提出了两个损失来促进和稳定动作分类的训练。最后，我们建议在推理时预测每个动作查询的本地化质量，以区分高质量的查询。所提出的方法名为 ReAct，在 THUMOS14 上实现了最先进的性能，并且计算成本比以前的方法低得多。此外，还进行了广泛的消融研究，以验证每个提议组件的有效性。该代码可在 https://github.com/sssste/React 获取。 本文提出ReAct方法，通过改进编码器-解码器框架解决时序动作检测中的问题。 Dingfeng Shi,Yujie Zhong,Qiong Cao,Jing Zhang,Lin Ma,Jia Li,Dacheng Tao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Felicia Lucke,Daniël Paulusma,Bernard Ries
title: Finding Matching Cuts in $H$-Free Graphs
title_zh: 在无 $H$ 的图中查找匹配割线
abstract: The NP-complete problem Matching Cut is to decide if a graph has a matching that is also an edge cut of the graph. We prove new complexity results for Matching Cut restricted to $H$-free graphs, that is, graphs that do not contain some fixed graph $H$ as an induced subgraph. We also prove new complexity results for two recently studied variants of Matching Cut, on $H$-free graphs. The first variant requires that the matching cut must be extendable to a perfect matching of the graph. The second variant requires the matching cut to be a perfect matching. In particular, we prove that there exists a small constant $r>0$ such that the first variant is NP-complete for $P_r$-free graphs. This addresses a question of Bouquet and Picouleau (arXiv, 2020). For all three problems, we give state-of-the-art summaries of their computational complexity for $H$-free graphs.
summary: The NP-complete problem Matching Cut is to decide if a graph has a matching that is also an edge cut of the graph. We prove new complexity results for Matching Cut restricted to $H$-free graphs, that is, graphs that do not contain some fixed graph $H$ as an induced subgraph. We also prove new complexity results for two recently studied variants of Matching Cut, on $H$-free graphs. The first variant requires that the matching cut must be extendable to a perfect matching of the graph. The second variant requires the matching cut to be a perfect matching. In particular, we prove that there exists a small constant $r>0$ such that the first variant is NP-complete for $P_r$-free graphs. This addresses a question of Bouquet and Picouleau (arXiv, 2020). For all three problems, we give state-of-the-art summaries of their computational complexity for $H$-free graphs.
abstract_zh: NP完全问题Matching Cut是决定一个图是否有一个匹配同时也是该图的边切割。我们证明了匹配切割的新复杂性结果仅限于无 $H$ 图，即不包含某些固定图 $H$ 作为诱导子图的图。我们还在无 $H$ 的图上证明了最近研究的两个 Matching Cut 变体的新复杂性结果。第一个变体要求匹配切割必须可扩展到图的完美匹配。第二种变体要求匹配的切割是完美匹配的。特别是，我们证明存在一个小常数 $r>0$，使得第一个变体对于 $P_r$-free 图来说是 NP 完全的。这解决了 Bouquet 和 Picouleau 的问题（arXiv，2020）。对于所有三个问题，我们给出了无 $H$ 图的计算复杂性的最新摘要。

AI.tldr: 研究在H-自由图中寻找匹配割的计算复杂性及其两个变体问题。
AI.motivation: Matching Cut问题是NP完全的，但其在特定图类（如H-自由图）中的复杂性尚不明确，需进一步探索以完善理论边界并解决开放问题。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与复杂性证明，结合图论与计算复杂性理论方法，针对H-自由图及两个变体问题进行分类讨论。
AI.result: 证明存在常数r>0使得变体问题在P_r-自由图中为NP完全，完善了三个问题在H-自由图中的复杂性状态总结。
AI.conclusion: 明确了匹配割相关问题在H-自由图中的复杂性分布，为后续研究提供了理论基础与方向指引。

authors_text: Marco Cotogni,Claudio Cusano
title: Explaining Image Enhancement Black-Box Methods through a Path Planning Based Algorithm
title_zh: 通过基于路径规划的算法解释图像增强黑盒方法
abstract: Nowadays, image-to-image translation methods, are the state of the art for the enhancement of natural images. Even if they usually show high performance in terms of accuracy, they often suffer from several limitations such as the generation of artifacts and the scalability to high resolutions. Moreover, their main drawback is the completely black-box approach that does not allow to provide the final user with any insight about the enhancement processes applied. In this paper we present a path planning algorithm which provides a step-by-step explanation of the output produced by state of the art enhancement methods, overcoming black-box limitation. This algorithm, called eXIE, uses a variant of the A* algorithm to emulate the enhancement process of another method through the application of an equivalent sequence of enhancing operators. We applied eXIE to explain the output of several state-of-the-art models trained on the Five-K dataset, obtaining sequences of enhancing operators able to produce very similar results in terms of performance and overcoming the huge limitation of poor interpretability of the best performing algorithms.
summary: Nowadays, image-to-image translation methods, are the state of the art for the enhancement of natural images. Even if they usually show high performance in terms of accuracy, they often suffer from several limitations such as the generation of artifacts and the scalability to high resolutions. Moreover, their main drawback is the completely black-box approach that does not allow to provide the final user with any insight about the enhancement processes applied. In this paper we present a path planning algorithm which provides a step-by-step explanation of the output produced by state of the art enhancement methods, overcoming black-box limitation. This algorithm, called eXIE, uses a variant of the A* algorithm to emulate the enhancement process of another method through the application of an equivalent sequence of enhancing operators. We applied eXIE to explain the output of several state-of-the-art models trained on the Five-K dataset, obtaining sequences of enhancing operators able to produce very similar results in terms of performance and overcoming the huge limitation of poor interpretability of the best performing algorithms.
abstract_zh: 如今，图像到图像的转换方法是增强自然图像的最先进技术。即使它们通常在准确性方面表现出高性能，但它们通常会受到一些限制，例如伪像的生成和高分辨率的可扩展性。此外，它们的主要缺点是完全黑盒方法，不允许向最终用户提供有关所应用的增强过程的任何见解。在本文中，我们提出了一种路径规划算法，它提供了对最先进的增强方法产生的输出的逐步解释，克服了黑盒限制。该算法称为 eXIE，使用 A* 算法的变体，通过应用等效的增强运算符序列来模拟另一种方法的增强过程。我们应用 eXIE 来解释在 Five-K 数据集上训练的几个最先进模型的输出，获得增强算子序列，能够在性能方面产生非常相似的结果，并克服最佳性能算法可解释性差的巨大限制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于路径规划的算法eXIE，用于解释图像增强黑盒方法的内部处理过程。
AI.motivation: 现有图像增强方法虽性能优异，但存在黑盒特性导致可解释性差、易生成伪影及高分辨率处理困难等问题。
AI.method: 设计改进型A*算法，通过生成等效增强操作序列模拟黑盒模型的增强过程，实现步骤级解释。
AI.result: 在Five-K数据集上验证，eXIE生成的增强序列可复现原方法性能，同时显著提升模型可解释性。
AI.conclusion: eXIE有效解决了图像增强黑盒模型的可解释性问题，为理解复杂模型决策提供了可行路径。

ai_content.conclusion: eXIE有效解决了图像增强黑盒模型的可解释性问题，为理解复杂模型决策提供了可行路径。

authors_text: Mehmet Yamaç,Mert Duman,İlke Adalıoğlu,Serkan Kiranyaz,Moncef Gabbouj
title: A Personalized Zero-Shot ECG Arrhythmia Monitoring System: From Sparse Representation Based Domain Adaption to Energy Efficient Abnormal Beat Detection for Practical ECG Surveillance
title_zh: 个性化零样本心电图心律失常监测系统：从基于稀疏表示的域适应到用于实际心电图监测的节能异常节拍检测
abstract: This paper proposes a low-cost and highly accurate ECG-monitoring system intended for personalized early arrhythmia detection for wearable mobile sensors. Earlier supervised approaches for personalized ECG monitoring require both abnormal and normal heartbeats for the training of the dedicated classifier. However, in a real-world scenario where the personalized algorithm is embedded in a wearable device, such training data is not available for healthy people with no cardiac disorder history. In this study, (i) we propose a null space analysis on the healthy signal space obtained via sparse dictionary learning, and investigate how a simple null space projection or alternatively regularized least squares-based classification methods can reduce the computational complexity, without sacrificing the detection accuracy, when compared to sparse representation-based classification. (ii) Then we introduce a sparse representation-based domain adaptation technique in order to project other existing users' abnormal and normal signals onto the new user's signal space, enabling us to train the dedicated classifier without having any abnormal heartbeat of the new user. Therefore, zero-shot learning can be achieved without the need for synthetic abnormal heartbeat generation. An extensive set of experiments performed on the benchmark MIT-BIH ECG dataset shows that when this domain adaptation-based training data generator is used with a simple 1-D CNN classifier, the method outperforms the prior work by a significant margin. (iii) Then, by combining (i) and (ii), we propose an ensemble classifier that further improves the performance. This approach for zero-shot arrhythmia detection achieves an average accuracy level of 98.2% and an F1-Score of 92.8%. Finally, a personalized energy-efficient ECG monitoring scheme is proposed using the above-mentioned innovations.
summary: This paper proposes a low-cost and highly accurate ECG-monitoring system intended for personalized early arrhythmia detection for wearable mobile sensors. Earlier supervised approaches for personalized ECG monitoring require both abnormal and normal heartbeats for the training of the dedicated classifier. However, in a real-world scenario where the personalized algorithm is embedded in a wearable device, such training data is not available for healthy people with no cardiac disorder history. In this study, (i) we propose a null space analysis on the healthy signal space obtained via sparse dictionary learning, and investigate how a simple null space projection or alternatively regularized least squares-based classification methods can reduce the computational complexity, without sacrificing the detection accuracy, when compared to sparse representation-based classification. (ii) Then we introduce a sparse representation-based domain adaptation technique in order to project other existing users' abnormal and normal signals onto the new user's signal space, enabling us to train the dedicated classifier without having any abnormal heartbeat of the new user. Therefore, zero-shot learning can be achieved without the need for synthetic abnormal heartbeat generation. An extensive set of experiments performed on the benchmark MIT-BIH ECG dataset shows that when this domain adaptation-based training data generator is used with a simple 1-D CNN classifier, the method outperforms the prior work by a significant margin. (iii) Then, by combining (i) and (ii), we propose an ensemble classifier that further improves the performance. This approach for zero-shot arrhythmia detection achieves an average accuracy level of 98.2% and an F1-Score of 92.8%. Finally, a personalized energy-efficient ECG monitoring scheme is proposed using the above-mentioned innovations.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种低成本且高精度的心电图监测系统，旨在用于可穿戴移动传感器的个性化早期心律失常检测。早期的个性化心电图监测监督方法需要异常和正常心跳来训练专用分类器。然而，在将个性化算法嵌入可穿戴设备的现实场景中，没有心脏病史的健康人无法获得此类训练数据。在本研究中，（i）我们提出对通过稀疏字典学习获得的健康信号空间进行零空间分析，并研究与基于稀疏表示的分类相比，简单的零空间投影或基于正则化最小二乘的分类方法如何能够降低计算复杂性，而不牺牲检测精度。 （ii）然后，我们引入基于稀疏表示的域自适应技术，以便将其他现有用户的异常和正常信号投影到新用户的信号空间上，使我们能够在新用户没有任何异常心跳的情况下训练专用分类器。因此，可以实现零样本学习，而不需要合成异常心跳生成。在基准 MIT-BIH ECG 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，当这种基于域适应的训练数据生成器与简单的一维 CNN 分类器一起使用时，该方法的性能显着优于之前的工作。 (iii)然后，通过结合(i)和(ii)，我们提出了一种进一步提高性能的集成分类器。这种零次心律失常检测方法的平均准确度为 98.2%，F1 分数为 92.8%。最后，利用上述创新提出了一种个性化节能心电监护方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种低成本、高精度的个性化心电图（ECG）监测系统，用于可穿戴设备中的无监督心律失常检测。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习方法需依赖正常与异常心跳数据训练分类器，但实际场景中健康用户缺乏异常数据，导致个性化算法难以部署。
AI.method: （i）通过稀疏字典学习分析健康信号空间，利用空域投影或正则化最小二乘法降低计算复杂度；（ii）引入基于稀疏表示的领域自适应技术，将其他用户信号映射至新用户空间，实现零样本学习；（iii）结合（i）和（ii）构建集成分类器。
AI.result: 在MIT-BIH数据集上，该方法平均准确率达98.2%，F1-Score为92.8%，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的零样本心律失常检测框架在保持高精度的同时降低计算成本，适用于可穿戴设备的个性化ECG监测。

search_text: A Personalized Zero-Shot ECG Arrhythmia Monitoring System: From Sparse Representation Based Domain Adaption to Energy Efficient Abnormal Beat Detection for Practical ECG Surveillance 个性化零样本心电图心律失常监测系统：从基于稀疏表示的域适应到用于实际心电图监测的节能异常节拍检测 This paper proposes a low-cost and highly accurate ECG-monitoring system intended for personalized early arrhythmia detection for wearable mobile sensors. Earlier supervised approaches for personalized ECG monitoring require both abnormal and normal heartbeats for the training of the dedicated classifier. However, in a real-world scenario where the personalized algorithm is embedded in a wearable device, such training data is not available for healthy people with no cardiac disorder history. In this study, (i) we propose a null space analysis on the healthy signal space obtained via sparse dictionary learning, and investigate how a simple null space projection or alternatively regularized least squares-based classification methods can reduce the computational complexity, without sacrificing the detection accuracy, when compared to sparse representation-based classification. (ii) Then we introduce a sparse representation-based domain adaptation technique in order to project other existing users' abnormal and normal signals onto the new user's signal space, enabling us to train the dedicated classifier without having any abnormal heartbeat of the new user. Therefore, zero-shot learning can be achieved without the need for synthetic abnormal heartbeat generation. An extensive set of experiments performed on the benchmark MIT-BIH ECG dataset shows that when this domain adaptation-based training data generator is used with a simple 1-D CNN classifier, the method outperforms the prior work by a significant margin. (iii) Then, by combining (i) and (ii), we propose an ensemble classifier that further improves the performance. This approach for zero-shot arrhythmia detection achieves an average accuracy level of 98.2% and an F1-Score of 92.8%. Finally, a personalized energy-efficient ECG monitoring scheme is proposed using the above-mentioned innovations. 本文提出了一种低成本且高精度的心电图监测系统，旨在用于可穿戴移动传感器的个性化早期心律失常检测。早期的个性化心电图监测监督方法需要异常和正常心跳来训练专用分类器。然而，在将个性化算法嵌入可穿戴设备的现实场景中，没有心脏病史的健康人无法获得此类训练数据。在本研究中，（i）我们提出对通过稀疏字典学习获得的健康信号空间进行零空间分析，并研究与基于稀疏表示的分类相比，简单的零空间投影或基于正则化最小二乘的分类方法如何能够降低计算复杂性，而不牺牲检测精度。 （ii）然后，我们引入基于稀疏表示的域自适应技术，以便将其他现有用户的异常和正常信号投影到新用户的信号空间上，使我们能够在新用户没有任何异常心跳的情况下训练专用分类器。因此，可以实现零样本学习，而不需要合成异常心跳生成。在基准 MIT-BIH ECG 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，当这种基于域适应的训练数据生成器与简单的一维 CNN 分类器一起使用时，该方法的性能显着优于之前的工作。 (iii)然后，通过结合(i)和(ii)，我们提出了一种进一步提高性能的集成分类器。这种零次心律失常检测方法的平均准确度为 98.2%，F1 分数为 92.8%。最后，利用上述创新提出了一种个性化节能心电监护方案。 本文提出一种低成本、高精度的个性化心电图（ECG）监测系统，用于可穿戴设备中的无监督心律失常检测。 Mehmet Yamaç,Mert Duman,İlke Adalıoğlu,Serkan Kiranyaz,Moncef Gabbouj cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Valentino Vito,Lim Yohanes Stefanus
title: An Asymmetric Contrastive Loss for Handling Imbalanced Datasets
title_zh: 处理不平衡数据集的不对称对比损失
abstract: Contrastive learning is a representation learning method performed by contrasting a sample to other similar samples so that they are brought closely together, forming clusters in the feature space. The learning process is typically conducted using a two-stage training architecture, and it utilizes the contrastive loss (CL) for its feature learning. Contrastive learning has been shown to be quite successful in handling imbalanced datasets, in which some classes are overrepresented while some others are underrepresented. However, previous studies have not specifically modified CL for imbalanced datasets. In this work, we introduce an asymmetric version of CL, referred to as ACL, in order to directly address the problem of class imbalance. In addition, we propose the asymmetric focal contrastive loss (AFCL) as a further generalization of both ACL and focal contrastive loss (FCL). Results on the FMNIST and ISIC 2018 imbalanced datasets show that AFCL is capable of outperforming CL and FCL in terms of both weighted and unweighted classification accuracies. In the appendix, we provide a full axiomatic treatment on entropy, along with complete proofs.
summary: Contrastive learning is a representation learning method performed by contrasting a sample to other similar samples so that they are brought closely together, forming clusters in the feature space. The learning process is typically conducted using a two-stage training architecture, and it utilizes the contrastive loss (CL) for its feature learning. Contrastive learning has been shown to be quite successful in handling imbalanced datasets, in which some classes are overrepresented while some others are underrepresented. However, previous studies have not specifically modified CL for imbalanced datasets. In this work, we introduce an asymmetric version of CL, referred to as ACL, in order to directly address the problem of class imbalance. In addition, we propose the asymmetric focal contrastive loss (AFCL) as a further generalization of both ACL and focal contrastive loss (FCL). Results on the FMNIST and ISIC 2018 imbalanced datasets show that AFCL is capable of outperforming CL and FCL in terms of both weighted and unweighted classification accuracies. In the appendix, we provide a full axiomatic treatment on entropy, along with complete proofs.
abstract_zh: 对比学习是一种表示学习方法，通过将一个样本与其他相似样本进行对比，使它们紧密地结合在一起，在特征空间中形成簇。学习过程通常使用两阶段训练架构进行，并利用对比损失（CL）进行特征学习。对比学习已被证明在处理不平衡数据集方面非常成功，其中某些类别的代表性过高，而另一些类别的代表性不足。然而，之前的研究并没有针对不平衡数据集专门修改 CL。在这项工作中，我们引入了 CL 的非对称版本，称为 ACL，以直接解决类不平衡问题。此外，我们提出不对称焦点对比损失（AFCL）作为 ACL 和焦点对比损失（FCL）的进一步推广。 FMNIST 和 ISIC 2018 不平衡数据集的结果表明，AFCL 在加权和未加权分类精度方面均优于 CL 和 FCL。在附录中，我们提供了对熵的完整公理化处理，以及完整的证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非对称对比损失（ACL）及其扩展版本非对称焦点对比损失（AFCL），以解决不平衡数据集中的类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法未针对不平衡数据集进行专门优化，导致在类别分布不均时表现不足。
AI.method: 设计非对称对比损失（ACL）直接处理类别不平衡，并进一步提出AFCL作为ACL与焦点对比损失（FCL）的通用化扩展。
AI.result: 在FMNIST和ISIC 2018不平衡数据集上，AFCL在加权和未加权分类准确率上均优于CL和FCL。
AI.conclusion: AFCL通过引入非对称机制有效缓解了不平衡数据集的类别分布偏差问题，为对比学习在不平衡场景下的应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Bin Yan,Yi Jiang,Peize Sun,Dong Wang,Zehuan Yuan,Ping Luo,Huchuan Lu
title: Towards Grand Unification of Object Tracking
title_zh: 迈向目标跟踪的大统一
abstract: We present a unified method, termed Unicorn, that can simultaneously solve four tracking problems (SOT, MOT, VOS, MOTS) with a single network using the same model parameters. Due to the fragmented definitions of the object tracking problem itself, most existing trackers are developed to address a single or part of tasks and overspecialize on the characteristics of specific tasks. By contrast, Unicorn provides a unified solution, adopting the same input, backbone, embedding, and head across all tracking tasks. For the first time, we accomplish the great unification of the tracking network architecture and learning paradigm. Unicorn performs on-par or better than its task-specific counterparts in 8 tracking datasets, including LaSOT, TrackingNet, MOT17, BDD100K, DAVIS16-17, MOTS20, and BDD100K MOTS. We believe that Unicorn will serve as a solid step towards the general vision model. Code is available at https://github.com/MasterBin-IIAU/Unicorn.
summary: We present a unified method, termed Unicorn, that can simultaneously solve four tracking problems (SOT, MOT, VOS, MOTS) with a single network using the same model parameters. Due to the fragmented definitions of the object tracking problem itself, most existing trackers are developed to address a single or part of tasks and overspecialize on the characteristics of specific tasks. By contrast, Unicorn provides a unified solution, adopting the same input, backbone, embedding, and head across all tracking tasks. For the first time, we accomplish the great unification of the tracking network architecture and learning paradigm. Unicorn performs on-par or better than its task-specific counterparts in 8 tracking datasets, including LaSOT, TrackingNet, MOT17, BDD100K, DAVIS16-17, MOTS20, and BDD100K MOTS. We believe that Unicorn will serve as a solid step towards the general vision model. Code is available at https://github.com/MasterBin-IIAU/Unicorn.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种称为 Unicorn 的统一方法，它可以使用相同的模型参数通过单个网络同时解决四个跟踪问题（SOT、MOT、VOS、MOTS）。由于目标跟踪问题本身的碎片化定义，大多数现有跟踪器都是为了解决单个或部分任务而开发的，并且过度专注于特定任务的特征。相比之下，Unicorn 提供了一个统一的解决方案，在所有跟踪任务中采用相同的输入、主干、嵌入和头部。我们第一次实现了跟踪网络架构和学习范式的大统一。 Unicorn 在 8 个跟踪数据集（包括 LaSOT、TrackingNet、MOT17、BDD100K、DAVIS16-17、MOTS20 和 BDD100K MOTS）中表现与特定任务对应物相当或更好。我们相信 Unicorn 将成为迈向通用视觉模型的坚实一步。代码可在 https://github.com/MasterBin-IIAU/Unicorn 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Unicorn的统一方法，能够通过单一网络同时解决四种跟踪问题（SOT、MOT、VOS、MOTS）。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪器通常针对单一任务或部分任务进行优化，导致解决方案碎片化，缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 采用统一的输入、主干网络、嵌入层和头部结构，跨所有跟踪任务共享模型参数。
AI.result: 在包括LaSOT、MOT17、DAVIS16-17等八个数据集上，性能与任务专用模型相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: Unicorn为通用视觉模型的发展提供了坚实的基础。

By contrast, Unicorn provides a unified solution, adopting the same input, backbone, embedding, and head across all tracking tasks.
