Unicorn performs on-par or better than its task-specific counterparts in 8 tracking datasets, including LaSOT, TrackingNet, MOT17, BDD100K, DAVIS16-17, MOTS20, and BDD100K MOTS. We believe that Unicorn will serve as a solid step towards the general vision model. Code is available at https://github.com/MasterBin-IIAU/Unicorn. 我们提出了一种称为 Unicorn 的统一方法，它可以使用相同的模型参数通过单个网络同时解决四个跟踪问题（SOT、MOT、VOS、MOTS）。由于目标跟踪问题本身的碎片化定义，大多数现有跟踪器都是为了解决单个或部分任务而开发的，并且过度专注于特定任务的特征。相比之下，Unicorn 提供了一个统一的解决方案，在所有跟踪任务中采用相同的输入、主干、嵌入和头部。我们第一次实现了跟踪网络架构和学习范式的大统一。 Unicorn 在 8 个跟踪数据集（包括 LaSOT、TrackingNet、MOT17、BDD100K、DAVIS16-17、MOTS20 和 BDD100K MOTS）中表现与特定任务对应物相当或更好。我们相信 Unicorn 将成为迈向通用视觉模型的坚实一步。代码可在 https://github.com/MasterBin-IIAU/Unicorn 获取。 本文提出一种名为Unicorn的统一方法，能够通过单一网络同时解决四种跟踪问题（SOT、MOT、VOS、MOTS）。 Bin Yan,Yi Jiang,Peize Sun,Dong Wang,Zehuan Yuan,Ping Luo,Huchuan Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Tien Do,Khiem Vuong,Hyun Soo Park
title: Egocentric Scene Understanding via Multimodal Spatial Rectifier
title_zh: 通过多模态空间整流器进行以自我为中心的场景理解
comment: Appearing in the Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2022
comments: Appearing in the Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2022
abstract: In this paper, we study a problem of egocentric scene understanding, i.e., predicting depths and surface normals from an egocentric image. Egocentric scene understanding poses unprecedented challenges: (1) due to large head movements, the images are taken from non-canonical viewpoints (i.e., tilted images) where existing models of geometry prediction do not apply; (2) dynamic foreground objects including hands constitute a large proportion of visual scenes. These challenges limit the performance of the existing models learned from large indoor datasets, such as ScanNet and NYUv2, which comprise predominantly upright images of static scenes. We present a multimodal spatial rectifier that stabilizes the egocentric images to a set of reference directions, which allows learning a coherent visual representation. Unlike unimodal spatial rectifier that often produces excessive perspective warp for egocentric images, the multimodal spatial rectifier learns from multiple directions that can minimize the impact of the perspective warp. To learn visual representations of the dynamic foreground objects, we present a new dataset called EDINA (Egocentric Depth on everyday INdoor Activities) that comprises more than 500K synchronized RGBD frames and gravity directions. Equipped with the multimodal spatial rectifier and the EDINA dataset, our proposed method on single-view depth and surface normal estimation significantly outperforms the baselines not only on our EDINA dataset, but also on other popular egocentric datasets, such as First Person Hand Action (FPHA) and EPIC-KITCHENS.

Egocentric scene understanding poses unprecedented challenges: (1) due to large head movements, the images are taken from non-canonical viewpoints (i.e., tilted images) where existing models of geometry prediction do not apply; (2) dynamic foreground objects including hands constitute a large proportion of visual scenes. These challenges limit the performance of the existing models learned from large indoor datasets, such as ScanNet and NYUv2, which comprise predominantly upright images of static scenes. We present a multimodal spatial rectifier that stabilizes the egocentric images to a set of reference directions, which allows learning a coherent visual representation. Unlike unimodal spatial rectifier that often produces excessive perspective warp for egocentric images, the multimodal spatial rectifier learns from multiple directions that can minimize the impact of the perspective warp. To learn visual representations of the dynamic foreground objects, we present a new dataset called EDINA (Egocentric Depth on everyday INdoor Activities) that comprises more than 500K synchronized RGBD frames and gravity directions. Equipped with the multimodal spatial rectifier and the EDINA dataset, our proposed method on single-view depth and surface normal estimation significantly outperforms the baselines not only on our EDINA dataset, but also on other popular egocentric datasets, such as First Person Hand Action (FPHA) and EPIC-KITCHENS.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了以自我为中心的场景理解问题，即从以自我为中心的图像预测深度和表面法线。以自我为中心的场景理解提出了前所未有的挑战：（1）由于头部运动较大，图像是从非规范视点（即倾斜图像）拍摄的，现有的几何预测模型不适用； (2)包括手在内的动态前景物体构成视觉场景的很大比例。这些挑战限制了从大型室内数据集（例如 ScanNet 和 NYUv2）学习的现有模型的性能，这些数据集主要包含静态场景的直立图像。我们提出了一种多模态空间整流器，可以将自我中心图像稳定在一组参考方向上，从而可以学习连贯的视觉表示。与单模态空间整流器经常对以自我为中心的图像产生过多的透视扭曲不同，多模态空间整流器从多个方向学习，可以最大限度地减少透视扭曲的影响。为了学习动态前景对象的视觉表示，我们提出了一个名为 EDINA（日常室内活动的自我中心深度）的新数据集，其中包含超过 50 万个同步 RGBD 帧和重力方向。配备多模态空间整流器和 EDINA 数据集，我们提出的单视图深度和表面法线估计方法不仅在我们的 EDINA 数据集上显着优于基线，而且在其他流行的以自我为中心的数据集上也表现出色，例如第一人称手部动作 (FPHA) 和 EPIC-KITCHENS。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过多模态空间校正器解决第一视角场景理解问题，预测深度和表面法线。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以处理第一视角图像中的非标准视角和动态前景物体，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 提出多模态空间校正器稳定图像方向，并构建包含50万同步RGBD帧的EDINA数据集。
AI.result: 在EDINA及FPHA、EPIC-KITCHENS等数据集上，单视角深度和法线估计显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 多模态空间校正器与EDINA数据集有效解决了第一视角场景理解的挑战。

authors_text: Sidi Yaya Arnaud Yarga,Jean Rouat,Sean U. N. Wood
title: Efficient spike encoding algorithms for neuromorphic speech recognition
title_zh: 用于神经形态语音识别的高效尖峰编码算法
comment: Accepted to International Conference on Neuromorphic Systems (ICONS 2022)
comments: Accepted to International Conference on Neuromorphic Systems (ICONS 2022)
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNN) are known to be very effective for neuromorphic processor implementations, achieving orders of magnitude improvements in energy efficiency and computational latency over traditional deep learning approaches. Comparable algorithmic performance was recently made possible as well with the adaptation of supervised training algorithms to the context of SNN. However, information including audio, video, and other sensor-derived data are typically encoded as real-valued signals that are not well-suited to SNN, preventing the network from leveraging spike timing information. Efficient encoding from real-valued signals to spikes is therefore critical and significantly impacts the performance of the overall system. To efficiently encode signals into spikes, both the preservation of information relevant to the task at hand as well as the density of the encoded spikes must be considered. In this paper, we study four spike encoding methods in the context of a speaker independent digit classification system: Send on Delta, Time to First Spike, Leaky Integrate and Fire Neuron and Bens Spiker Algorithm. We first show that all encoding methods yield higher classification accuracy using significantly fewer spikes when encoding a bio-inspired cochleagram as opposed to a traditional short-time Fourier transform. We then show that two Send On Delta variants result in classification results comparable with a state of the art deep convolutional neural network baseline, while simultaneously reducing the encoded bit rate. Finally, we show that several encoding methods result in improved performance over the conventional deep learning baseline in certain cases, further demonstrating the power of spike encoding algorithms in the encoding of real-valued signals and that neuromorphic implementation has the potential to outperform state of the art techniques.

Comparable algorithmic performance was recently made possible as well with the adaptation of supervised training algorithms to the context of SNN. However, information including audio, video, and other sensor-derived data are typically encoded as real-valued signals that are not well-suited to SNN, preventing the network from leveraging spike timing information. Efficient encoding from real-valued signals to spikes is therefore critical and significantly impacts the performance of the overall system. To efficiently encode signals into spikes, both the preservation of information relevant to the task at hand as well as the density of the encoded spikes must be considered. In this paper, we study four spike encoding methods in the context of a speaker independent digit classification system: Send on Delta, Time to First Spike, Leaky Integrate and Fire Neuron and Bens Spiker Algorithm. We first show that all encoding methods yield higher classification accuracy using significantly fewer spikes when encoding a bio-inspired cochleagram as opposed to a traditional short-time Fourier transform. We then show that two Send On Delta variants result in classification results comparable with a state of the art deep convolutional neural network baseline, while simultaneously reducing the encoded bit rate. Finally, we show that several encoding methods result in improved performance over the conventional deep learning baseline in certain cases, further demonstrating the power of spike encoding algorithms in the encoding of real-valued signals and that neuromorphic implementation has the potential to outperform state of the art techniques.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 对于神经形态处理器实现非常有效，与传统深度学习方法相比，在能源效率和计算延迟方面实现了数量级的改进。最近，通过将监督训练算法适应 SNN 环境，可比较的算法性能也成为可能。然而，包括音频、视频和其他传感器衍生数据在内的信息通常被编码为不太适合 SNN 的实值信号，从而阻止网络利用尖峰时序信息。因此，从实值信号到尖峰的有效编码至关重要，并且会显着影响整个系统的性能。为了有效地将信号编码为尖峰，必须考虑与当前任务相关的信息的保存以及编码尖峰的密度。在本文中，我们在独立于说话人的数字分类系统的背景下研究了四种尖峰编码方法：Send on Delta、Time to First Spike、Leaky Integrate、Fire Neuron 和 Bens Spiker 算法。我们首先表明，与传统的短时傅里叶变换相比，在对仿生耳蜗图进行编码时，所有编码方法都使用显着更少的尖峰来产生更高的分类精度。然后，我们展示了两种 Send On Delta 变体产生的分类结果与最先进的深度卷积神经网络基线相当，同时降低了编码比特率。最后，我们表明，在某些情况下，几种编码方法可以提高传统深度学习基线的性能，进一步证明尖峰编码算法在实值信号编码中的强大功能，并且神经形态实现有可能超越最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了四种尖峰编码方法在语音识别系统中的效率，旨在提升神经形态处理器的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法在处理传感器数据时效率低下，而尖峰神经网络（SNN）虽具能效优势，但缺乏高效的实值信号到尖峰的编码方法。
AI.method: 对比分析Send on Delta、Time to First Spike、Leaky Integrate and Fire及Bens Spiker Algorithm四种编码方法在说话人无关数字分类任务中的表现。
AI.result: 生物启发式耳图编码显著提升分类准确率并减少尖峰数量；两种Send On Delta变体在降低比特率的同时达到CNN基线水平；部分方法在特定场景下超越传统深度学习基线。
AI.conclusion: 尖峰编码算法能有效提升实值信号处理效率，神经形态实现有望超越现有技术。

Finally, we show that several encoding methods result in improved performance over the conventional deep learning baseline in certain cases, further demonstrating the power of spike encoding algorithms in the encoding of real-valued signals and that neuromorphic implementation has the potential to outperform state of the art techniques. 众所周知，尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 对于神经形态处理器实现非常有效，与传统深度学习方法相比，在能源效率和计算延迟方面实现了数量级的改进。最近，通过将监督训练算法适应 SNN 环境，可比较的算法性能也成为可能。然而，包括音频、视频和其他传感器衍生数据在内的信息通常被编码为不太适合 SNN 的实值信号，从而阻止网络利用尖峰时序信息。因此，从实值信号到尖峰的有效编码至关重要，并且会显着影响整个系统的性能。为了有效地将信号编码为尖峰，必须考虑与当前任务相关的信息的保存以及编码尖峰的密度。在本文中，我们在独立于说话人的数字分类系统的背景下研究了四种尖峰编码方法：Send on Delta、Time to First Spike、Leaky Integrate、Fire Neuron 和 Bens Spiker 算法。我们首先表明，与传统的短时傅里叶变换相比，在对仿生耳蜗图进行编码时，所有编码方法都使用显着更少的尖峰来产生更高的分类精度。然后，我们展示了两种 Send On Delta 变体产生的分类结果与最先进的深度卷积神经网络基线相当，同时降低了编码比特率。最后，我们表明，在某些情况下，几种编码方法可以提高传统深度学习基线的性能，进一步证明尖峰编码算法在实值信号编码中的强大功能，并且神经形态实现有可能超越最先进的技术。 本文研究了四种尖峰编码方法在语音识别系统中的效率，旨在提升神经形态处理器的性能。 Sidi Yaya Arnaud Yarga,Jean Rouat,Sean U. N. Wood cs.NE,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Guy Blanc,Caleb Koch,Jane Lange,Li-Yang Tan
title: A Query-Optimal Algorithm for Finding Counterfactuals
title_zh: 用于查找反事实的查询最优算法
abstract: We design an algorithm for finding counterfactuals with strong theoretical guarantees on its performance. For any monotone model $f : X^d \to \{0,1\}$ and instance $x^\star$, our algorithm makes \[ {S(f)^{O(Δ_f(x^\star))}\cdot \log d}\] queries to $f$ and returns {an {\sl optimal}} counterfactual for $x^\star$: a nearest instance $x'$ to $x^\star$ for which $f(x')\ne f(x^\star)$. Here $S(f)$ is the sensitivity of $f$, a discrete analogue of the Lipschitz constant, and $Δ_f(x^\star)$ is the distance from $x^\star$ to its nearest counterfactuals. The previous best known query complexity was $d^{\,O(Δ_f(x^\star))}$, achievable by brute-force local search. We further prove a lower bound of $S(f)^{Ω(Δ_f(x^\star))} + Ω(\log d)$ on the query complexity of any algorithm, thereby showing that the guarantees of our algorithm are essentially optimal.
summary: We design an algorithm for finding counterfactuals with strong theoretical guarantees on its performance. For any monotone model $f : X^d \to \{0,1\}$ and instance $x^\star$, our algorithm makes \[ {S(f)^{O(Δ_f(x^\star))}\cdot \log d}\] queries to $f$ and returns {an {\sl optimal}} counterfactual for $x^\star$: a nearest instance $x'$ to $x^\star$ for which $f(x')\ne f(x^\star)$. Here $S(f)$ is the sensitivity of $f$, a discrete analogue of the Lipschitz constant, and $Δ_f(x^\star)$ is the distance from $x^\star$ to its nearest counterfactuals. The previous best known query complexity was $d^{\,O(Δ_f(x^\star))}$, achievable by brute-force local search. We further prove a lower bound of $S(f)^{Ω(Δ_f(x^\star))} + Ω(\log d)$ on the query complexity of any algorithm, thereby showing that the guarantees of our algorithm are essentially optimal.
abstract_zh: 我们设计了一种寻找反事实的算法，并对其性能提供了强有力的理论保证。对于任何单调模型 $f : X^d \to \{0,1\}$ 和实例 $x^\star$，我们的算法使 \[ {S(f)^{O(Δ_f(x^\star))}\cdot \log d}\] 查询 $f$ 并返回 $x^\star$ 的 {\sl 最优}} 反事实：最接近的实例 $x'$ 到 $x^\star$，其中$f(x')\ne f(x^\star)$。这里 $S(f)$ 是 $f$ 的敏感性，$f$ 是 Lipschitz 常数的离散模拟，而 $Δ_f(x^\star)$ 是从 $x^\star$ 到其最近的反事实的距离。之前最著名的查询复杂度是 $d^{\,O(Δ_f(x^\star))}$，可通过暴力本地搜索实现。我们进一步证明了任何算法的查询复杂度上 $S(f)^{Ω(Δ_f(x^\star))} + Ω(\log d)$ 的下界，从而表明我们的算法的保证本质上是最优的。

AI.tldr: 设计一种查询最优的算法，用于为单调布尔函数寻找最近的反事实（即距离给定实例最近的、输出不同的实例）。
AI.motivation: 反事实解释在可解释AI中至关重要，但现有算法要么缺乏理论保证，要么查询复杂度较高（如暴力局部搜索的d^{O(Δ)}），亟需更高效的算法。
AI.method: 提出基于敏感性S(f)和距离Δ的算法，通过S(f)^{O(Δ)}·log d次查询，利用单调函数的敏感性这一离散利普希茨常数，实现最优反事实搜索。
AI.result: 算法查询复杂度为S(f)^{O(Δ_f(x^*))}·log d，远优于此前d^{O(Δ)}的最好结果；同时证明下界为S(f)^{Ω(Δ_f(x^*))} + Ω(log d)，表明算法几乎最优。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在查询复杂度上达到了理论上界，反事实查找问题的查询复杂度本质上由模型的敏感性和到反事实的距离共同决定。

authors_text: Sauradip Nag,Xiatian Zhu,Yi-Zhe Song,Tao Xiang
title: Semi-Supervised Temporal Action Detection with Proposal-Free Masking
title_zh: 使用无提议掩蔽的半监督时间动作检测
abstract: Existing temporal action detection (TAD) methods rely on a large number of training data with segment-level annotations. Collecting and annotating such a training set is thus highly expensive and unscalable. Semi-supervised TAD (SS-TAD) alleviates this problem by leveraging unlabeled videos freely available at scale. However, SS-TAD is also a much more challenging problem than supervised TAD, and consequently much under-studied. Prior SS-TAD methods directly combine an existing proposal-based TAD method and a SSL method. Due to their sequential localization (e.g, proposal generation) and classification design, they are prone to proposal error propagation. To overcome this limitation, in this work we propose a novel Semi-supervised Temporal action detection model based on PropOsal-free Temporal mask (SPOT) with a parallel localization (mask generation) and classification architecture. Such a novel design effectively eliminates the dependence between localization and classification by cutting off the route for error propagation in-between. We further introduce an interaction mechanism between classification and localization for prediction refinement, and a new pretext task for self-supervised model pre-training. Extensive experiments on two standard benchmarks show that our SPOT outperforms state-of-the-art alternatives, often by a large margin. The PyTorch implementation of SPOT is available at https://github.com/sauradip/SPOT
summary: Existing temporal action detection (TAD) methods rely on a large number of training data with segment-level annotations. Collecting and annotating such a training set is thus highly expensive and unscalable. Semi-supervised TAD (SS-TAD) alleviates this problem by leveraging unlabeled videos freely available at scale. However, SS-TAD is also a much more challenging problem than supervised TAD, and consequently much under-studied. Prior SS-TAD methods directly combine an existing proposal-based TAD method and a SSL method. Due to their sequential localization (e.g, proposal generation) and classification design, they are prone to proposal error propagation. To overcome this limitation, in this work we propose a novel Semi-supervised Temporal action detection model based on PropOsal-free Temporal mask (SPOT) with a parallel localization (mask generation) and classification architecture. Such a novel design effectively eliminates the dependence between localization and classification by cutting off the route for error propagation in-between. We further introduce an interaction mechanism between classification and localization for prediction refinement, and a new pretext task for self-supervised model pre-training. Extensive experiments on two standard benchmarks show that our SPOT outperforms state-of-the-art alternatives, often by a large margin. The PyTorch implementation of SPOT is available at https://github.com/sauradip/SPOT
abstract_zh: 现有的时间动作检测（TAD）方法依赖于大量带有分段级注释的训练数据。因此，收集和注释这样的训练集非常昂贵且不可扩展。半监督 TAD (SS-TAD) 通过利用大规模免费提供的未标记视频来缓解这个问题。然而，SS-TAD 也是一个比监督 TAD 更具挑战性的问题，因此研究还不够充分。现有的SS-TAD方法直接结合了现有的基于提议的TAD方法和SSL方法。由于它们的顺序定位（例如，提案生成）和分类设计，它们很容易出现提案错误传播。为了克服这个限制，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于无 PropOsal 时间掩模（SPOT）的新型半监督时间动作检测模型，具有并行定位（掩模生成）和分类架构。这种新颖的设计通过切断两者之间的错误传播路径，有效地消除了定位和分类之间的依赖性。我们进一步引入了用于预测细化的分类和本地化之间的交互机制，以及用于自监督模型预训练的新借口任务。对两个标准基准的大量实验表明，我们的 SPOT 的性能优于最先进的替代方案，而且通常远远领先。 SPOT 的 PyTorch 实现位于 https://github.com/sauradip/SPOT

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需提案的半监督时间动作检测方法SPOT，通过并行定位和分类架构解决现有方法中的错误传播问题。
AI.motivation: 现有时间动作检测方法依赖大量标注数据，成本高昂且扩展性差；半监督方法虽利用未标注数据，但因提案生成与分类的串行设计易导致错误传播。
AI.method: 设计提案-free的SPOT框架，采用并行掩码生成与分类架构切断误差传播路径，并引入分类-定位交互机制及自监督预训练任务。
AI.result: 在两个标准数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，实现较大性能提升。
AI.conclusion: SPOT通过解耦定位与分类流程并增强模块间交互，有效解决了半监督时间动作检测中的关键挑战。

authors_text: Ishita Dasgupta,Andrew K. Lampinen,Stephanie C. Y. Chan,Hannah R. Sheahan,Antonia Creswell,Dharshan Kumaran,James L. McClelland,Felix Hill
title: Language models show human-like content effects on reasoning tasks
title_zh: 语言模型显示出类似人类的内容对推理任务的影响
abstract: Reasoning is a key ability for an intelligent system. Large language models (LMs) achieve above-chance performance on abstract reasoning tasks, but exhibit many imperfections. However, human abstract reasoning is also imperfect. For example, human reasoning is affected by our real-world knowledge and beliefs, and shows notable "content effects"; humans reason more reliably when the semantic content of a problem supports the correct logical inferences. These content-entangled reasoning patterns play a central role in debates about the fundamental nature of human intelligence. Here, we investigate whether language models $\unicode{x2014}$ whose prior expectations capture some aspects of human knowledge $\unicode{x2014}$ similarly mix content into their answers to logical problems. We explored this question across three logical reasoning tasks: natural language inference, judging the logical validity of syllogisms, and the Wason selection task. We evaluate state of the art large language models, as well as humans, and find that the language models reflect many of the same patterns observed in humans across these tasks $\unicode{x2014}$ like humans, models answer more accurately when the semantic content of a task supports the logical inferences. These parallels are reflected both in answer patterns, and in lower-level features like the relationship between model answer distributions and human response times. Our findings have implications for understanding both these cognitive effects in humans, and the factors that contribute to language model performance.

Here, we investigate whether language models $\unicode{x2014}$ whose prior expectations capture some aspects of human knowledge $\unicode{x2014}$ similarly mix content into their answers to logical problems. We explored this question across three logical reasoning tasks: natural language inference, judging the logical validity of syllogisms, and the Wason selection task. We evaluate state of the art large language models, as well as humans, and find that the language models reflect many of the same patterns observed in humans across these tasks $\unicode{x2014}$ like humans, models answer more accurately when the semantic content of a task supports the logical inferences. These parallels are reflected both in answer patterns, and in lower-level features like the relationship between model answer distributions and human response times. Our findings have implications for understanding both these cognitive effects in humans, and the factors that contribute to language model performance.
abstract_zh: 推理是智能系统的关键能力。大型语言模型 (LM) 在抽象推理任务上实现了超预期的性能，但也表现出许多缺陷。然而，人类的抽象推理也是不完美的。例如，人类的推理受到我们现实世界的知识和信念的影响，并表现出显着的“内容效应”；当问题的语义内容支持正确的逻辑推理时，人类的推理会更可靠。这些内容纠缠的推理模式在有关人类智能基本性质的争论中发挥着核心作用。在这里，我们研究其先验期望捕获人类知识 $\unicode{x2014}$ 某些方面的语言模型 $\unicode{x2014}$ 是否类似地将内容混合到其对逻辑问题的答案中。我们通过三个逻辑推理任务来探索这个问题：自然语言推理、判断三段论的逻辑有效性和华森选择任务。我们评估了最先进的大型语言模型以及人类，发现语言模型反映了在这些任务 $\unicode{x2014}$ 中在人类中观察到的许多相同模式，就像人类一样，当任务的语义内容支持逻辑推理时，模型会更准确地回答。这些相似之处既反映在答案模式中，也反映在较低级别的特征中，例如模型答案分布与人类响应时间之间的关系。我们的研究结果对于理解人类的这些认知效应以及影响语言模型性能的因素具有重要意义。

AI.tldr: 研究语言模型在逻辑推理任务中是否表现出类似人类的'内容效应'，即语义内容对推理结果的影响。
AI.motivation: 人类推理受现实知识影响存在内容效应，而语言模型的先验知识可能包含人类知识，需验证其是否具有类似的内容效应以理解认知机制和模型性能因素。
AI.method: 通过自然语言推理、三段论判断和Wason选择任务，评估语言模型与人类在语义内容支持逻辑推理时的表现差异，分析答案模式及模型分布与人类反应时间的关系。
AI.result: 语言模型在语义内容支持逻辑推理时准确率提升，与人类呈现相似模式，包括答案分布和反应时间相关性等低级特征的平行现象。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型表现出与人类相似的内容效应，揭示了其推理机制中知识与逻辑的交互作用，为理解人类认知和优化模型性能提供新视角。

authors_text: Maria Bustamante Madrid,Jeroen Famaey,Filip Lemic
title: Intelligent Reflective Surface vs. Mobile Relay-supported NLoS Avoidance in Indoor mmWave Networks
title_zh: 室内毫米波网络中智能反射表面与移动中继支持的 NLoS 规避
abstract: The 6th generation of wireless communication (6G) is envisioned to give rise to various technologies for improving the end-to-end communication performance, where the communication is envisioned to utilize wireless signals in the millimeter wave (mmWave) frequencies and above. Among others, these technologies comprise Intelligent Reflective Surfaces (IRSs) and Mobile Relays (MRs), whose envisaged roles include mitigating the negative effects of Non-Line-of-Sight (NLoS) connectivity, in particular at mmWave and higher frequencies. The core idea behind these technologies is to use cooperative networking where the source sends a signal to a repeater, in this case the IRS or the MR, which is upon reception forwarded to the destination. When comparing the two technologies, it is important to realize that the IRSs are primarily envisioned to be static entities attached to various objects in the environment such as walls and furniture. In contrast, the MRs will feature a higher degree of freedom, as they will be able to position themselves seamlessly in the environment. Based on the above assumptions, we derive an approach for determining the optimal position of the IRS and MR in indoor environments, i.e., the one that maximizes the end-to-end link quality between the source and the destination. We follow by capturing the communication quality indicators for both IRS- and MR-supported NLoS avoidance in indoor mmWave communication in a number of scenarios. Our results show that, from the end-to-end link quality perspective, the MRs generally outperform the IRSs, suggesting their utilization potential for throughput-optimized NLoS avoidance scenarios.

Among others, these technologies comprise Intelligent Reflective Surfaces (IRSs) and Mobile Relays (MRs), whose envisaged roles include mitigating the negative effects of Non-Line-of-Sight (NLoS) connectivity, in particular at mmWave and higher frequencies. The core idea behind these technologies is to use cooperative networking where the source sends a signal to a repeater, in this case the IRS or the MR, which is upon reception forwarded to the destination. When comparing the two technologies, it is important to realize that the IRSs are primarily envisioned to be static entities attached to various objects in the environment such as walls and furniture. In contrast, the MRs will feature a higher degree of freedom, as they will be able to position themselves seamlessly in the environment. Based on the above assumptions, we derive an approach for determining the optimal position of the IRS and MR in indoor environments, i.e., the one that maximizes the end-to-end link quality between the source and the destination. We follow by capturing the communication quality indicators for both IRS- and MR-supported NLoS avoidance in indoor mmWave communication in a number of scenarios. Our results show that, from the end-to-end link quality perspective, the MRs generally outperform the IRSs, suggesting their utilization potential for throughput-optimized NLoS avoidance scenarios.
abstract_zh: 第六代无线通信（6G）预计将催生各种技术来提高端到端通信性能，其中通信预计将利用毫米波（mmWave）频率及以上频率的无线信号。其中，这些技术包括智能反射表面（IRS）和移动中继（MR），其设想的作用包括减轻非视距（NLoS）连接的负面影响，特别是在毫米波和更高频率下。这些技术背后的核心思想是使用协作网络，其中源将信号发送到中继器（在本例中为 IRS 或 MR），信号在接收后转发到目的地。在比较这两种技术时，重要的是要认识到 IRS 主要被设想为附加到环境中各种物体（例如墙壁和家具）的静态实体。相比之下，MR 将具有更高的自由度，因为它们能够在环境中无缝定位自己。基于上述假设，我们推导出一种确定 IRS 和 MR 在室内环境中最佳位置的方法，即最大化源和目的地之间的端到端链路质量的方法。接下来，我们在多种场景下的室内毫米波通信中捕获 IRS 和 MR 支持的 NLoS 避免的通信质量指标。我们的结果表明，从端到端链路质量的角度来看，MR 通常优于 IRS，这表明它们在吞吐量优化的 NLoS 避免场景中具有利用潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了智能反射面（IRS）和移动中继（MR）在室内毫米波网络中避免非视距（NLoS）连接的效果，旨在确定哪种技术能更优地提升端到端链路质量。
AI.motivation: 6G通信依赖毫米波频段，但其易受NLoS影响。IRS和MR被视为潜在解决方案，需通过对比明确其性能差异以指导技术选型。
AI.method: 通过推导IRS和MR在室内环境中的最优部署位置模型，并在多种场景下量化评估其通信质量指标。
AI.result: 结果表明，从端到端链路质量角度看，移动中继（MR）普遍优于静态IRS，尤其在吞吐量优化的NLoS规避场景中表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: 移动中继凭借动态部署优势，在需高吞吐量的NLoS规避场景中比静态IRS更具应用潜力，但需权衡部署成本与性能收益。

authors_text: Sayash Kapoor,Arvind Narayanan
title: Leakage and the Reproducibility Crisis in ML-based Science
title_zh: 基于机器学习的科学中的泄漏和可重复性危机
abstract: The use of machine learning (ML) methods for prediction and forecasting has become widespread across the quantitative sciences. However, there are many known methodological pitfalls, including data leakage, in ML-based science. In this paper, we systematically investigate reproducibility issues in ML-based science. We show that data leakage is indeed a widespread problem and has led to severe reproducibility failures. Specifically, through a survey of literature in research communities that adopted ML methods, we find 17 fields where errors have been found, collectively affecting 329 papers and in some cases leading to wildly overoptimistic conclusions. Based on our survey, we present a fine-grained taxonomy of 8 types of leakage that range from textbook errors to open research problems. We argue for fundamental methodological changes to ML-based science so that cases of leakage can be caught before publication. To that end, we propose model info sheets for reporting scientific claims based on ML models that would address all types of leakage identified in our survey. To investigate the impact of reproducibility errors and the efficacy of model info sheets, we undertake a reproducibility study in a field where complex ML models are believed to vastly outperform older statistical models such as Logistic Regression (LR): civil war prediction. We find that all papers claiming the superior performance of complex ML models compared to LR models fail to reproduce due to data leakage, and complex ML models don't perform substantively better than decades-old LR models. While none of these errors could have been caught by reading the papers, model info sheets would enable the detection of leakage in each case.

However, there are many known methodological pitfalls, including data leakage, in ML-based science. In this paper, we systematically investigate reproducibility issues in ML-based science. We show that data leakage is indeed a widespread problem and has led to severe reproducibility failures. Specifically, through a survey of literature in research communities that adopted ML methods, we find 17 fields where errors have been found, collectively affecting 329 papers and in some cases leading to wildly overoptimistic conclusions. Based on our survey, we present a fine-grained taxonomy of 8 types of leakage that range from textbook errors to open research problems. We argue for fundamental methodological changes to ML-based science so that cases of leakage can be caught before publication. To that end, we propose model info sheets for reporting scientific claims based on ML models that would address all types of leakage identified in our survey. To investigate the impact of reproducibility errors and the efficacy of model info sheets, we undertake a reproducibility study in a field where complex ML models are believed to vastly outperform older statistical models such as Logistic Regression (LR): civil war prediction. We find that all papers claiming the superior performance of complex ML models compared to LR models fail to reproduce due to data leakage, and complex ML models don't perform substantively better than decades-old LR models. While none of these errors could have been caught by reading the papers, model info sheets would enable the detection of leakage in each case.
abstract_zh: 使用机器学习 (ML) 方法进行预测和预报已在定量科学领域得到广泛应用。然而，基于机器学习的科学存在许多已知的方法论缺陷，包括数据泄漏。在本文中，我们系统地研究了基于机器学习的科学中的可重复性问题。我们表明数据泄露确实是一个普遍存在的问题，并导致了严重的再现性失败。具体来说，通过对采用 ML 方法的研究社区的文献进行调查，我们发现 17 个领域存在错误，总共影响了 329 篇论文，在某些情况下导致了过于乐观的结论。根据我们的调查，我们提出了 8 种泄漏类型的细粒度分类，范围从教科书错误到开放研究问题。我们主张对基于机器学习的科学方法进行根本性的改变，以便在发表之前发现泄漏案例。为此，我们提出了模型信息表，用于报告基于机器学习模型的科学主张，这些模型将解决我们调查中发现的所有类型的泄漏。为了调查再现性错误的影响和模型信息表的有效性，我们在复杂的机器学习模型被认为远远优于旧的统计模型（例如逻辑回归（LR）：内战预测）的领域进行了再现性研究。我们发现，所有声称复杂 ML 模型比 LR 模型性能优越的论文都因数据泄漏而无法重现，而且复杂 ML 模型的性能并没有比几十年前的 LR 模型好得多。虽然这些错误都无法通过阅读论文来发现，但模型信息表可以在每种情况下检测泄漏。

AI.tldr: 本文系统调查了机器学习科学中的数据泄漏问题及其对可重复性的影响，并提出模型信息表作为解决方案。
AI.motivation: 机器学习在科学预测中广泛应用，但数据泄漏等方法论问题导致严重可重复性危机，需改进方法以确保结果可靠性。
AI.method: 通过文献调查分类泄漏类型，提出模型信息表，并在民事战争预测领域进行实证研究验证。
AI.result: 发现所有声称复杂ML模型优于传统模型的论文均因数据泄漏无法复现，且复杂模型实际效果并不优于传统模型。
AI.conclusion: 需改革机器学习科学方法论，采用模型信息表检测泄漏，确保研究结果的可靠性。

search_text: Leakage and the Reproducibility Crisis in ML-based Science 基于机器学习的科学中的泄漏和可重复性危机 The use of machine learning (ML) methods for prediction and forecasting has become widespread across the quantitative sciences. However, there are many known methodological pitfalls, including data leakage, in ML-based science. In this paper, we systematically investigate reproducibility issues in ML-based science. We show that data leakage is indeed a widespread problem and has led to severe reproducibility failures. Specifically, through a survey of literature in research communities that adopted ML methods, we find 17 fields where errors have been found, collectively affecting 329 papers and in some cases leading to wildly overoptimistic conclusions. Based on our survey, we present a fine-grained taxonomy of 8 types of leakage that range from textbook errors to open research problems. We argue for fundamental methodological changes to ML-based science so that cases of leakage can be caught before publication. To that end, we propose model info sheets for reporting scientific claims based on ML models that would address all types of leakage identified in our survey. To investigate the impact of reproducibility errors and the efficacy of model info sheets, we undertake a reproducibility study in a field where complex ML models are believed to vastly outperform older statistical models such as Logistic Regression (LR): civil war prediction. We find that all papers claiming the superior performance of complex ML models compared to LR models fail to reproduce due to data leakage, and complex ML models don't perform substantively better than decades-old LR models. While none of these errors could have been caught by reading the papers, model info sheets would enable the detection of leakage in each case. 使用机器学习 (ML) 方法进行预测和预报已在定量科学领域得到广泛应用。然而，基于机器学习的科学存在许多已知的方法论缺陷，包括数据泄漏。在本文中，我们系统地研究了基于机器学习的科学中的可重复性问题。我们表明数据泄露确实是一个普遍存在的问题，并导致了严重的再现性失败。具体来说，通过对采用 ML 方法的研究社区的文献进行调查，我们发现 17 个领域存在错误，总共影响了 329 篇论文，在某些情况下导致了过于乐观的结论。根据我们的调查，我们提出了 8 种泄漏类型的细粒度分类，范围从教科书错误到开放研究问题。我们主张对基于机器学习的科学方法进行根本性的改变，以便在发表之前发现泄漏案例。为此，我们提出了模型信息表，用于报告基于机器学习模型的科学主张，这些模型将解决我们调查中发现的所有类型的泄漏。为了调查再现性错误的影响和模型信息表的有效性，我们在复杂的机器学习模型被认为远远优于旧的统计模型（例如逻辑回归（LR）：内战预测）的领域进行了再现性研究。我们发现，所有声称复杂 ML 模型比 LR 模型性能优越的论文都因数据泄漏而无法重现，而且复杂 ML 模型的性能并没有比几十年前的 LR 模型好得多。虽然这些错误都无法通过阅读论文来发现，但模型信息表可以在每种情况下检测泄漏。 本文系统调查了机器学习科学中的数据泄漏问题及其对可重复性的影响，并提出模型信息表作为解决方案。 Sayash Kapoor,Arvind Narayanan cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ME

authors_text: Shibo Jie,Zhi-Hong Deng
title: Convolutional Bypasses Are Better Vision Transformer Adapters
title_zh: 卷积旁路是更好的视觉变压器适配器
abstract: The pretrain-then-finetune paradigm has been widely adopted in computer vision. But as the size of Vision Transformer (ViT) grows exponentially, the full finetuning becomes prohibitive in view of the heavier storage overhead. Motivated by parameter-efficient transfer learning (PETL) on language transformers, recent studies attempt to insert lightweight adaptation modules (e.g., adapter layers or prompt tokens) to pretrained ViT and only finetune these modules while the pretrained weights are frozen. However, these modules were originally proposed to finetune language models and did not take into account the prior knowledge specifically for visual tasks. In this paper, we propose to construct Convolutional Bypasses (Convpass) in ViT as adaptation modules, introducing only a small amount (less than 0.5% of model parameters) of trainable parameters to adapt the large ViT. Different from other PETL methods, Convpass benefits from the hard-coded inductive bias of convolutional layers and thus is more suitable for visual tasks, especially in the low-data regime. Experimental results on VTAB-1K benchmark and few-shot learning datasets show that Convpass outperforms current language-oriented adaptation modules, demonstrating the necessity to tailor vision-oriented adaptation modules for adapting vision models.
summary: The pretrain-then-finetune paradigm has been widely adopted in computer vision. But as the size of Vision Transformer (ViT) grows exponentially, the full finetuning becomes prohibitive in view of the heavier storage overhead. Motivated by parameter-efficient transfer learning (PETL) on language transformers, recent studies attempt to insert lightweight adaptation modules (e.g., adapter layers or prompt tokens) to pretrained ViT and only finetune these modules while the pretrained weights are frozen. However, these modules were originally proposed to finetune language models and did not take into account the prior knowledge specifically for visual tasks. In this paper, we propose to construct Convolutional Bypasses (Convpass) in ViT as adaptation modules, introducing only a small amount (less than 0.5% of model parameters) of trainable parameters to adapt the large ViT. Different from other PETL methods, Convpass benefits from the hard-coded inductive bias of convolutional layers and thus is more suitable for visual tasks, especially in the low-data regime. Experimental results on VTAB-1K benchmark and few-shot learning datasets show that Convpass outperforms current language-oriented adaptation modules, demonstrating the necessity to tailor vision-oriented adaptation modules for adapting vision models.
abstract_zh: 预训练然后微调范式已在计算机视觉中广泛采用。但随着 Vision Transformer (ViT) 的大小呈指数级增长，鉴于存储开销较大，全面的微调变得令人望而却步。受语言转换器参数高效迁移学习 (PETL) 的推动，最近的研究尝试将轻量级适应模块（例如适配器层或提示标记）插入到预训练的 ViT 中，并且仅在预训练权重冻结时微调这些模块。然而，这些模块最初是为了微调语言模型而提出的，并没有考虑专门针对视觉任务的先验知识。在本文中，我们建议在 ViT 中构建卷积旁路（Convpass）作为适应模块，仅引入少量（小于模型参数的 0.5%）可训练参数来适应大 ViT。与其他 PETL 方法不同，Convpass 受益于卷积层的硬编码归纳偏差，因此更适合视觉任务，尤其是在低数据情况下。 VTAB-1K 基准和小样本学习数据集上的实验结果表明，Convpass 优于当前面向语言的适应模块，这证明了定制面向视觉的适应模块以适应视觉模型的必要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Convpass的卷积旁路模块，用于在视觉Transformer（ViT）中实现参数高效的微调，仅需少量可训练参数即可适应大型ViT模型。
AI.motivation: 随着ViT规模扩大，全量微调因存储开销过大而不可行。现有基于语言模型的参数高效微调方法（如适配器层）未考虑视觉任务的先验知识，导致效果受限。
AI.method: 设计包含卷积层的Convpass模块，利用卷积的硬编码归纳偏置，仅引入不足0.5%参数进行微调，替代传统语言模型适配器。
AI.result: 在VTAB-1K基准和少样本学习数据集上，Convpass优于现有语言导向的适配模块，验证了其在低数据场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 视觉任务需要专门设计的适配模块，Convpass通过卷积结构的归纳偏置，为ViT微调提供了更优的参数高效解决方案。

authors_text: Wei-Ning Hsu,Bowen Shi
title: u-HuBERT: Unified Mixed-Modal Speech Pretraining And Zero-Shot Transfer to Unlabeled Modality
title_zh: u-HuBERT：统一混合模态语音预训练和零样本迁移到未标记模态
abstract: While audio-visual speech models can yield superior performance and robustness compared to audio-only models, their development and adoption are hindered by the lack of labeled and unlabeled audio-visual data and the cost to deploy one model per modality. In this paper, we present u-HuBERT, a self-supervised pre-training framework that can leverage both multimodal and unimodal speech with a unified masked cluster prediction objective. By utilizing modality dropout during pre-training, we demonstrate that a single fine-tuned model can achieve performance on par or better than the state-of-the-art modality-specific models. Moreover, our model fine-tuned only on audio can perform well with audio-visual and visual speech input, achieving zero-shot modality generalization for multiple speech processing tasks. In particular, our single model yields 1.2%/1.4%/27.2% speech recognition word error rate on LRS3 with audio-visual/audio/visual input. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/av_hubert
summary: While audio-visual speech models can yield superior performance and robustness compared to audio-only models, their development and adoption are hindered by the lack of labeled and unlabeled audio-visual data and the cost to deploy one model per modality. In this paper, we present u-HuBERT, a self-supervised pre-training framework that can leverage both multimodal and unimodal speech with a unified masked cluster prediction objective. By utilizing modality dropout during pre-training, we demonstrate that a single fine-tuned model can achieve performance on par or better than the state-of-the-art modality-specific models. Moreover, our model fine-tuned only on audio can perform well with audio-visual and visual speech input, achieving zero-shot modality generalization for multiple speech processing tasks. In particular, our single model yields 1.2%/1.4%/27.2% speech recognition word error rate on LRS3 with audio-visual/audio/visual input. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/av_hubert
abstract_zh: 虽然与纯音频模型相比，视听语音模型可以产生卓越的性能和鲁棒性，但由于缺乏标记和未标记的视听数据以及每种模态部署一个模型的成本，它们的开发和采用受到阻碍。在本文中，我们提出了 u-HuBERT，这是一种自监督预训练框架，可以利用多模态和单模态语音以及统一的屏蔽集群预测目标。通过在预训练期间利用模态 dropout，我们证明了单个微调模型可以实现与最先进的模态特定模型相当或更好的性能。此外，我们的模型仅针对音频进行微调，可以在视听和视觉语音输入中表现良好，实现多个语音处理任务的零样本模态泛化。特别是，我们的单一模型在具有视听/音频/视觉输入的 LRS3 上产生 1.2%/1.4%/27.2% 的语音识别单词错误率。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/facebookresearch/av_hubert 获取

search_text: u-HuBERT: Unified Mixed-Modal Speech Pretraining And Zero-Shot Transfer to Unlabeled Modality u-HuBERT：统一混合模态语音预训练和零样本迁移到未标记模态 While audio-visual speech models can yield superior performance and robustness compared to audio-only models, their development and adoption are hindered by the lack of labeled and unlabeled audio-visual data and the cost to deploy one model per modality. In this paper, we present u-HuBERT, a self-supervised pre-training framework that can leverage both multimodal and unimodal speech with a unified masked cluster prediction objective. By utilizing modality dropout during pre-training, we demonstrate that a single fine-tuned model can achieve performance on par or better than the state-of-the-art modality-specific models. Moreover, our model fine-tuned only on audio can perform well with audio-visual and visual speech input, achieving zero-shot modality generalization for multiple speech processing tasks. In particular, our single model yields 1.2%/1.4%/27.2% speech recognition word error rate on LRS3 with audio-visual/audio/visual input. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/av_hubert 虽然与纯音频模型相比，视听语音模型可以产生卓越的性能和鲁棒性，但由于缺乏标记和未标记的视听数据以及每种模态部署一个模型的成本，它们的开发和采用受到阻碍。在本文中，我们提出了 u-HuBERT，这是一种自监督预训练框架，可以利用多模态和单模态语音以及统一的屏蔽集群预测目标。通过在预训练期间利用模态 dropout，我们证明了单个微调模型可以实现与最先进的模态特定模型相当或更好的性能。此外，我们的模型仅针对音频进行微调，可以在视听和视觉语音输入中表现良好，实现多个语音处理任务的零样本模态泛化。特别是，我们的单一模型在具有视听/音频/视觉输入的 LRS3 上产生 1.2%/1.4%/27.2% 的语音识别单词错误率。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/facebookresearch/av_hubert 获取 本文提出u-HuBERT，一种统一的多模态语音预训练框架，通过掩码聚类预测目标结合多模态与单模态数据，实现零样本跨模态迁移。 Wei-Ning Hsu,Bowen Shi cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.SD,eess.AS,eess.IV

title: Developing a Series of AI Challenges for the United States Department of the Air Force
title_zh: 为美国空军部制定一系列人工智能挑战
abstract: Through a series of federal initiatives and orders, the U.S. Government has been making a concerted effort to ensure American leadership in AI. These broad strategy documents have influenced organizations such as the United States Department of the Air Force (DAF). The DAF-MIT AI Accelerator is an initiative between the DAF and MIT to bridge the gap between AI researchers and DAF mission requirements. Several projects supported by the DAF-MIT AI Accelerator are developing public challenge problems that address numerous Federal AI research priorities. These challenges target priorities by making large, AI-ready datasets publicly available, incentivizing open-source solutions, and creating a demand signal for dual use technologies that can stimulate further research. In this article, we describe these public challenges being developed and how their application contributes to scientific advances.
summary: Through a series of federal initiatives and orders, the U.S. Government has been making a concerted effort to ensure American leadership in AI. These broad strategy documents have influenced organizations such as the United States Department of the Air Force (DAF). The DAF-MIT AI Accelerator is an initiative between the DAF and MIT to bridge the gap between AI researchers and DAF mission requirements. Several projects supported by the DAF-MIT AI Accelerator are developing public challenge problems that address numerous Federal AI research priorities. These challenges target priorities by making large, AI-ready datasets publicly available, incentivizing open-source solutions, and creating a demand signal for dual use technologies that can stimulate further research. In this article, we describe these public challenges being developed and how their application contributes to scientific advances.
abstract_zh: 通过一系列联邦举措和命令，美国政府一直在共同努力确保美国在人工智能领域的领导地位。这些广泛的战略文件影响了美国空军 (DAF) 等组织。 DAF-MIT 人工智能加速器是 DAF 和 MIT 之间的一项计划，旨在弥合人工智能研究人员和 DAF 任务要求之间的差距。 DAF-MIT 人工智能加速器支持的几个项目正在开发解决众多联邦人工智能研究优先事项的公共挑战问题。这些挑战通过公开可用的大型人工智能数据集、激励开源解决方案以及为可以刺激进一步研究的双重用途技术创建需求信号来针对优先事项。在本文中，我们描述了这些正在开发的公共挑战以及它们的应用如何促进科学进步。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了美国空军部与麻省理工学院合作开发的一系列人工智能挑战，以促进AI研究和应用。
AI.motivation: 美国政府致力于保持在AI领域的领导地位，而空军部希望通过公开挑战推动AI技术的发展，满足其任务需求。
AI.method: 通过开发公开挑战，提供大规模AI数据集，激励开源解决方案，并推动双用途技术的研究。
AI.result: 描述了正在开发的公开挑战及其对科学进步的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 这些挑战有助于推动AI研究，并促进双用途技术的进一步发展。

authors_text: Hemang Chawla,Arnav Varma,Elahe Arani,Bahram Zonooz
title: Adversarial Attacks on Monocular Pose Estimation
title_zh: 对单眼姿势估计的对抗性攻击
comment: Accepted at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: Accepted at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: Advances in deep learning have resulted in steady progress in computer vision with improved accuracy on tasks such as object detection and semantic segmentation. Nevertheless, deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, thus presenting a challenge in reliable deployment. Two of the prominent tasks in 3D scene-understanding for robotics and advanced drive assistance systems are monocular depth and pose estimation, often learned together in an unsupervised manner. While studies evaluating the impact of adversarial attacks on monocular depth estimation exist, a systematic demonstration and analysis of adversarial perturbations against pose estimation are lacking. We show how additive imperceptible perturbations can not only change predictions to increase the trajectory drift but also catastrophically alter its geometry. We also study the relation between adversarial perturbations targeting monocular depth and pose estimation networks, as well as the transferability of perturbations to other networks with different architectures and losses. Our experiments show how the generated perturbations lead to notable errors in relative rotation and translation predictions and elucidate vulnerabilities of the networks.
summary: Advances in deep learning have resulted in steady progress in computer vision with improved accuracy on tasks such as object detection and semantic segmentation. Nevertheless, deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, thus presenting a challenge in reliable deployment. Two of the prominent tasks in 3D scene-understanding for robotics and advanced drive assistance systems are monocular depth and pose estimation, often learned together in an unsupervised manner. While studies evaluating the impact of adversarial attacks on monocular depth estimation exist, a systematic demonstration and analysis of adversarial perturbations against pose estimation are lacking. We show how additive imperceptible perturbations can not only change predictions to increase the trajectory drift but also catastrophically alter its geometry. We also study the relation between adversarial perturbations targeting monocular depth and pose estimation networks, as well as the transferability of perturbations to other networks with different architectures and losses. Our experiments show how the generated perturbations lead to notable errors in relative rotation and translation predictions and elucidate vulnerabilities of the networks.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的进步导致计算机视觉领域稳步进步，提高了目标检测和语义分割等任务的准确性。然而，深度神经网络容易受到对抗性攻击，因此对可靠部署提出了挑战。机器人和高级驾驶辅助系统的 3D 场景理解中的两个突出任务是单目深度和姿态估计，通常以无监督的方式一起学习。尽管存在评估对抗性攻击对单目深度估计影响的研究，但缺乏针对姿态估计的对抗性扰动的系统论证和分析。我们展示了附加的难以察觉的扰动不仅会改变预测以增加轨迹漂移，还会灾难性地改变其几何形状。我们还研究了针对单目深度和姿态估计网络的对抗性扰动之间的关系，以及扰动到具有不同架构和损失的其他网络的可转移性。我们的实验展示了生成的扰动如何导致相对旋转和平移预测中的显着错误，并阐明了网络的漏洞。

AI.tldr: 本文研究单目姿态估计中的对抗攻击方法，分析其对预测结果的影响。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在单目深度和姿态估计任务中存在对抗攻击漏洞，但针对姿态估计的系统性分析尚不充分。
AI.method: 通过添加不可察觉的微小扰动，分析其对姿态估计网络预测结果的影响，并研究扰动在不同网络架构间的迁移性。
AI.result: 实验表明扰动显著增加了轨迹漂移和几何畸变，导致旋转和平移预测误差，并揭示了网络结构和损失函数对攻击的敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 对抗攻击能有效破坏单目姿态估计系统，暴露了现有模型的脆弱性，需加强鲁棒性研究。

ai_content.result: 实验表明扰动显著增加了轨迹漂移和几何畸变，导致旋转和平移预测误差，并揭示了网络结构和损失函数对攻击的敏感性。
ai_content.conclusion: 对抗攻击能有效破坏单目姿态估计系统，暴露了现有模型的脆弱性，需加强鲁棒性研究。

motivation: 深度神经网络在单目深度和姿态估计任务中存在对抗攻击漏洞，但针对姿态估计的系统性分析尚不充分。
method: 通过添加不可察觉的微小扰动，分析其对姿态估计网络预测结果的影响，并研究扰动在不同网络架构间的迁移性。
result: 实验表明扰动显著增加了轨迹漂移和几何畸变，导致旋转和平移预测误差，并揭示了网络结构和损失函数对攻击的敏感性。
conclusion: 对抗攻击能有效破坏单目姿态估计系统，暴露了现有模型的脆弱性，需加强鲁棒性研究。
search_text: Adversarial Attacks on Monocular Pose Estimation 对单眼姿势估计的对抗性攻击 Advances in deep learning have resulted in steady progress in computer vision with improved accuracy on tasks such as object detection and semantic segmentation. Nevertheless, deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, thus presenting a challenge in reliable deployment. Two of the prominent tasks in 3D scene-understanding for robotics and advanced drive assistance systems are monocular depth and pose estimation, often learned together in an unsupervised manner. While studies evaluating the impact of adversarial attacks on monocular depth estimation exist, a systematic demonstration and analysis of adversarial perturbations against pose estimation are lacking. We show how additive imperceptible perturbations can not only change predictions to increase the trajectory drift but also catastrophically alter its geometry. We also study the relation between adversarial perturbations targeting monocular depth and pose estimation networks, as well as the transferability of perturbations to other networks with different architectures and losses. Our experiments show how the generated perturbations lead to notable errors in relative rotation and translation predictions and elucidate vulnerabilities of the networks. 深度学习的进步导致计算机视觉领域稳步进步，提高了目标检测和语义分割等任务的准确性。然而，深度神经网络容易受到对抗性攻击，因此对可靠部署提出了挑战。机器人和高级驾驶辅助系统的 3D 场景理解中的两个突出任务是单目深度和姿态估计，通常以无监督的方式一起学习。尽管存在评估对抗性攻击对单目深度估计影响的研究，但缺乏针对姿态估计的对抗性扰动的系统论证和分析。我们展示了附加的难以察觉的扰动不仅会改变预测以增加轨迹漂移，还会灾难性地改变其几何形状。我们还研究了针对单目深度和姿态估计网络的对抗性扰动之间的关系，以及扰动到具有不同架构和损失的其他网络的可转移性。我们的实验展示了生成的扰动如何导致相对旋转和平移预测中的显着错误，并阐明了网络的漏洞。 本文研究单目姿态估计中的对抗攻击方法，分析其对预测结果的影响。 Hemang Chawla,Arnav Varma,Elahe Arani,Bahram Zonooz cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Nasir Hayat,Krzysztof J. Geras,Farah E. Shamout
title: MedFuse: Multi-modal fusion with clinical time-series data and chest X-ray images
title_zh: MedFuse：与临床时间序列数据和胸部 X 射线图像的多模态融合
abstract: Multi-modal fusion approaches aim to integrate information from different data sources. Unlike natural datasets, such as in audio-visual applications, where samples consist of "paired" modalities, data in healthcare is often collected asynchronously. Hence, requiring the presence of all modalities for a given sample is not realistic for clinical tasks and significantly limits the size of the dataset during training. In this paper, we propose MedFuse, a conceptually simple yet promising LSTM-based fusion module that can accommodate uni-modal as well as multi-modal input. We evaluate the fusion method and introduce new benchmark results for in-hospital mortality prediction and phenotype classification, using clinical time-series data in the MIMIC-IV dataset and corresponding chest X-ray images in MIMIC-CXR. Compared to more complex multi-modal fusion strategies, MedFuse provides a performance improvement by a large margin on the fully paired test set. It also remains robust across the partially paired test set containing samples with missing chest X-ray images. We release our code for reproducibility and to enable the evaluation of competing models in the future.
summary: Multi-modal fusion approaches aim to integrate information from different data sources. Unlike natural datasets, such as in audio-visual applications, where samples consist of "paired" modalities, data in healthcare is often collected asynchronously. Hence, requiring the presence of all modalities for a given sample is not realistic for clinical tasks and significantly limits the size of the dataset during training. In this paper, we propose MedFuse, a conceptually simple yet promising LSTM-based fusion module that can accommodate uni-modal as well as multi-modal input. We evaluate the fusion method and introduce new benchmark results for in-hospital mortality prediction and phenotype classification, using clinical time-series data in the MIMIC-IV dataset and corresponding chest X-ray images in MIMIC-CXR. Compared to more complex multi-modal fusion strategies, MedFuse provides a performance improvement by a large margin on the fully paired test set. It also remains robust across the partially paired test set containing samples with missing chest X-ray images. We release our code for reproducibility and to enable the evaluation of competing models in the future.
abstract_zh: 多模态融合方法旨在整合来自不同数据源的信息。与自然数据集（例如在视听应用中，样本由“配对”模式组成）不同，医疗保健中的数据通常是异步收集的。因此，要求给定样本存在所有模式对于临床任务来说是不现实的，并且显着限制了训练期间数据集的大小。在本文中，我们提出了 MedFuse，这是一种概念上简单但有前途的基于 LSTM 的融合模块，可以适应单模态和多模态输入。我们使用 MIMIC-IV 数据集中的临床时间序列数据和 MIMIC-CXR 中相应的胸部 X 射线图像评估融合方法，并为院内死亡率预测和表型分类引入新的基准结果。与更复杂的多模态融合策略相比，MedFuse 在完全配对的测试集上提供了大幅的性能改进。它在包含缺失胸部 X 射线图像的样本的部分配对测试集中也保持稳健。我们发布了可重复性代码，以便将来能够评估竞争模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MedFuse，一种基于LSTM的多模态融合模块，用于整合临床时间序列数据和胸部X光图像，以提高医疗预测任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据通常异步采集，难以保证所有模态数据的完整性，传统多模态方法在数据不全时效果受限，需设计更鲁棒的融合策略。
AI.method: 开发MedFuse模块，基于LSTM处理临床时间序列数据和胸部X光图像，支持单模态和多模态输入，并在MIMIC-IV和MIMIC-CXR数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: MedFuse在完全配对测试集上显著优于复杂多模态方法，在部分配对测试集（含缺失X光图像）中仍保持鲁棒性，且开源代码以促进复现。
AI.conclusion: MedFuse为医疗异步多模态数据提供有效融合方案，在预测任务中展现优越性能，适用于临床实际场景中的数据不完整性问题。

authors_text: C. M. Downey,Xuhui Zhou,Leo Z. Liu,Shane Steinert-Threlkeld
title: Learning to translate by learning to communicate
title_zh: 通过学习沟通来学习翻译
comment: Camera-ready for 3rd Multilingual Representation Learning Workshop (MRL 2023)
comments: Camera-ready for 3rd Multilingual Representation Learning Workshop (MRL 2023)
abstract: We formulate and test a technique to use Emergent Communication (EC) with a pre-trained multilingual model to improve on modern Unsupervised NMT systems, especially for low-resource languages. It has been argued that the current dominant paradigm in NLP of pre-training on text-only corpora will not yield robust natural language understanding systems, and the need for grounded, goal-oriented, and interactive language learning has been high lighted. In our approach, we embed a multilingual model (mBART, Liu et al., 2020) into an EC image-reference game, in which the model is incentivized to use multilingual generations to accomplish a vision-grounded task. The hypothesis is that this will align multiple languages to a shared task space. We present two variants of EC Fine-Tuning (Steinert-Threlkeld et al., 2022), one of which outperforms a backtranslation-only baseline in all four languages investigated, including the low-resource language Nepali.
summary: We formulate and test a technique to use Emergent Communication (EC) with a pre-trained multilingual model to improve on modern Unsupervised NMT systems, especially for low-resource languages. It has been argued that the current dominant paradigm in NLP of pre-training on text-only corpora will not yield robust natural language understanding systems, and the need for grounded, goal-oriented, and interactive language learning has been high lighted. In our approach, we embed a multilingual model (mBART, Liu et al., 2020) into an EC image-reference game, in which the model is incentivized to use multilingual generations to accomplish a vision-grounded task. The hypothesis is that this will align multiple languages to a shared task space. We present two variants of EC Fine-Tuning (Steinert-Threlkeld et al., 2022), one of which outperforms a backtranslation-only baseline in all four languages investigated, including the low-resource language Nepali.
abstract_zh: 我们制定并测试了一种技术，将紧急通信 (EC) 与预训练的多语言模型结合使用，以改进现代无监督 NMT 系统，特别是对于资源匮乏的语言。有人认为，目前 NLP 中仅文本语料库预训练的主导范式不会产生强大的自然语言理解系统，并且强调了扎根、面向目标和交互式语言学习的需求。在我们的方法中，我们将多语言模型（mBART，Liu et al.，2020）嵌入到 EC 图像参考游戏中，其中模型被激励使用多语言生成来完成基于视觉的任务。假设这会将多种语言对齐到共享任务空间。我们提出了 EC 微调的两种变体（Steinert-Threlkeld 等人，2022），其中一种在所调查的所有四种语言（包括资源匮乏的语言尼泊尔语）中均优于仅反向翻译的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用多语言预训练模型结合新兴通信（EC）机制，提升无监督神经机器翻译（NMT）系统性能，尤其针对低资源语言的方法。
AI.motivation: 当前NLP领域依赖纯文本预训练的范式可能无法构建稳健的语言理解系统，需通过具身化、目标导向的交互式学习提升语言能力。
AI.method: 将多语言模型mBART嵌入图像参考游戏的EC框架，通过视觉任务激励模型生成多语言输出，对齐多语言到共享任务空间，并提出两种EC微调变体。
AI.result: 其中一种EC微调方法在四个语言（含低资源语言尼泊尔语）上均优于单纯回译基线。
AI.conclusion: EC机制能有效提升多语言翻译性能，尤其对低资源语言，验证了任务驱动的交互式学习在NMT中的潜力。

authors_text: Jiwan Kim,Minchang Kim,Yeong-Gil Shin,Minyoung Chung
title: Accurate Ground-Truth Depth Image Generation via Overfit Training of Point Cloud Registration using Local Frame Sets
title_zh: 通过使用局部帧集对点云配准进行过拟合训练，生成准确的地面实况深度图像
abstract: Accurate three-dimensional perception is a fundamental task in several computer vision applications. Recently, commercial RGB-depth (RGB-D) cameras have been widely adopted as single-view depth-sensing devices owing to their efficient depth-sensing abilities. However, the depth quality of most RGB-D sensors remains insufficient owing to the inherent noise from a single-view environment. Recently, several studies have focused on the single-view depth enhancement of RGB-D cameras. Recent research has proposed deep-learning-based approaches that typically train networks using high-quality supervised depth datasets, which indicates that the quality of the ground-truth (GT) depth dataset is a top-most important factor for accurate system; however, such high-quality GT datasets are difficult to obtain. In this study, we developed a novel method for high-quality GT depth generation based on an RGB-D stream dataset. First, we defined consecutive depth frames in a local spatial region as a local frame set. Then, the depth frames were aligned to a certain frame in the local frame set using an unsupervised point cloud registration scheme. The registration parameters were trained based on an overfit-training scheme, which was primarily used to construct a single GT depth image for each frame set. The final GT depth dataset was constructed using several local frame sets, and each local frame set was trained independently. The primary advantage of this study is that a high-quality GT depth dataset can be constructed under various scanning environments using only the RGB-D stream dataset. Moreover, our proposed method can be used as a new benchmark GT dataset for accurate performance evaluations. We evaluated our GT dataset on previously benchmarked GT depth datasets and demonstrated that our method is superior to state-of-the-art depth enhancement frameworks.

Recently, commercial RGB-depth (RGB-D) cameras have been widely adopted as single-view depth-sensing devices owing to their efficient depth-sensing abilities. However, the depth quality of most RGB-D sensors remains insufficient owing to the inherent noise from a single-view environment. Recently, several studies have focused on the single-view depth enhancement of RGB-D cameras. Recent research has proposed deep-learning-based approaches that typically train networks using high-quality supervised depth datasets, which indicates that the quality of the ground-truth (GT) depth dataset is a top-most important factor for accurate system; however, such high-quality GT datasets are difficult to obtain. In this study, we developed a novel method for high-quality GT depth generation based on an RGB-D stream dataset. Then, the depth frames were aligned to a certain frame in the local frame set using an unsupervised point cloud registration scheme. The registration parameters were trained based on an overfit-training scheme, which was primarily used to construct a single GT depth image for each frame set. The final GT depth dataset was constructed using several local frame sets, and each local frame set was trained independently. The primary advantage of this study is that a high-quality GT depth dataset can be constructed under various scanning environments using only the RGB-D stream dataset. Moreover, our proposed method can be used as a new benchmark GT dataset for accurate performance evaluations. We evaluated our GT dataset on previously benchmarked GT depth datasets and demonstrated that our method is superior to state-of-the-art depth enhancement frameworks.
abstract_zh: 准确的三维感知是多种计算机视觉应用中的一项基本任务。最近，商用RGB深度（RGB-D）相机由于其高效的深度感测能力而被广泛采用作为单视图深度感测设备。然而，由于单视图环境固有的噪声，大多数 RGB-D 传感器的深度质量仍然不足。最近，一些研究集中在 RGB-D 相机的单视图深度增强上。最近的研究提出了基于深度学习的方法，通常使用高质量的监督深度数据集来训练网络，这表明地面实况（GT）深度数据集的质量是准确系统的最重要因素；然而，如此高质量的 GT 数据集很难获得。在这项研究中，我们开发了一种基于 RGB-D 流数据集的高质量 GT 深度生成的新方法。首先，我们将局部空间区域中的连续深度帧定义为局部帧集。然后，使用无监督点云配准方案将深度帧与局部帧集中的特定帧对齐。配准参数基于过拟合训练方案进行训练，该方案主要用于为每个帧集构建单个 GT 深度图像。最终的GT深度数据集是使用多个局部帧集构建的，并且每个局部帧集都是独立训练的。本研究的主要优点是仅使用 RGB-D 流数据集就可以在各种扫描环境下构建高质量的 GT 深度数据集。此外，我们提出的方法可以用作新的基准 GT 数据集，以进行准确的性能评估。我们在之前基准化的 GT 深度数据集上评估了我们的 GT 数据集，并证明我们的方法优于最先进的深度增强框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于RGB-D流数据集生成高质量真实深度图像的方法，通过局部帧集的点云配准过拟合训练实现。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-D传感器因单视角噪声导致深度质量不足，而高质量真实深度数据集难以获取，制约了深度增强算法的发展。
AI.method: 定义连续深度帧为局部帧集，通过无监督点云配准方案对齐帧集内深度帧，利用过拟合训练生成单帧真实深度图像，最终整合多局部帧集构建完整数据集。
AI.result: 在基准数据集测试中，该方法生成的真实深度数据集优于现有最先进的深度增强框架。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可在多种扫描环境下仅依赖RGB-D流数据生成高质量真实深度数据集，为深度感知研究提供新基准。

Recently, commercial RGB-depth (RGB-D) cameras have been widely adopted as single-view depth-sensing devices owing to their efficient depth-sensing abilities. However, the depth quality of most RGB-D sensors remains insufficient owing to the inherent noise from a single-view environment. Recent research has proposed deep-learning-based approaches that typically train networks using high-quality supervised depth datasets, which indicates that the quality of the ground-truth (GT) depth dataset is a top-most important factor for accurate system; however, such high-quality GT datasets are difficult to obtain. In this study, we developed a novel method for high-quality GT depth generation based on an RGB-D stream dataset. First, we defined consecutive depth frames in a local spatial region as a local frame set. Then, the depth frames were aligned to a certain frame in the local frame set using an unsupervised point cloud registration scheme. The registration parameters were trained based on an overfit-training scheme, which was primarily used to construct a single GT depth image for each frame set. The final GT depth dataset was constructed using several local frame sets, and each local frame set was trained independently. The primary advantage of this study is that a high-quality GT depth dataset can be constructed under various scanning environments using only the RGB-D stream dataset. Moreover, our proposed method can be used as a new benchmark GT dataset for accurate performance evaluations. We evaluated our GT dataset on previously benchmarked GT depth datasets and demonstrated that our method is superior to state-of-the-art depth enhancement frameworks. 准确的三维感知是多种计算机视觉应用中的一项基本任务。最近，商用RGB深度（RGB-D）相机由于其高效的深度感测能力而被广泛采用作为单视图深度感测设备。然而，由于单视图环境固有的噪声，大多数 RGB-D 传感器的深度质量仍然不足。最近，一些研究集中在 RGB-D 相机的单视图深度增强上。最近的研究提出了基于深度学习的方法，通常使用高质量的监督深度数据集来训练网络，这表明地面实况（GT）深度数据集的质量是准确系统的最重要因素；然而，如此高质量的 GT 数据集很难获得。在这项研究中，我们开发了一种基于 RGB-D 流数据集的高质量 GT 深度生成的新方法。首先，我们将局部空间区域中的连续深度帧定义为局部帧集。然后，使用无监督点云配准方案将深度帧与局部帧集中的特定帧对齐。配准参数基于过拟合训练方案进行训练，该方案主要用于为每个帧集构建单个 GT 深度图像。最终的GT深度数据集是使用多个局部帧集构建的，并且每个局部帧集都是独立训练的。本研究的主要优点是仅使用 RGB-D 流数据集就可以在各种扫描环境下构建高质量的 GT 深度数据集。此外，我们提出的方法可以用作新的基准 GT 数据集，以进行准确的性能评估。我们在之前基准化的 GT 深度数据集上评估了我们的 GT 数据集，并证明我们的方法优于最先进的深度增强框架。 本文提出一种基于RGB-D流数据集生成高质量真实深度图像的方法，通过局部帧集的点云配准过拟合训练实现。 Jiwan Kim,Minchang Kim,Yeong-Gil Shin,Minyoung Chung cs.CV

authors_text: Phillip Rust,Jonas F. Lotz,Emanuele Bugliarello,Elizabeth Salesky,Miryam de Lhoneux,Desmond Elliott
title: Language Modelling with Pixels
title_zh: 像素语言建模
abstract: Language models are defined over a finite set of inputs, which creates a vocabulary bottleneck when we attempt to scale the number of supported languages. Tackling this bottleneck results in a trade-off between what can be represented in the embedding matrix and computational issues in the output layer. This paper introduces PIXEL, the Pixel-based Encoder of Language, which suffers from neither of these issues. PIXEL is a pretrained language model that renders text as images, making it possible to transfer representations across languages based on orthographic similarity or the co-activation of pixels. PIXEL is trained to reconstruct the pixels of masked patches instead of predicting a distribution over tokens. We pretrain the 86M parameter PIXEL model on the same English data as BERT and evaluate on syntactic and semantic tasks in typologically diverse languages, including various non-Latin scripts. We find that PIXEL substantially outperforms BERT on syntactic and semantic processing tasks on scripts that are not found in the pretraining data, but PIXEL is slightly weaker than BERT when working with Latin scripts. Furthermore, we find that PIXEL is more robust than BERT to orthographic attacks and linguistic code-switching, further confirming the benefits of modelling language with pixels.
summary: Language models are defined over a finite set of inputs, which creates a vocabulary bottleneck when we attempt to scale the number of supported languages. Tackling this bottleneck results in a trade-off between what can be represented in the embedding matrix and computational issues in the output layer. This paper introduces PIXEL, the Pixel-based Encoder of Language, which suffers from neither of these issues. PIXEL is a pretrained language model that renders text as images, making it possible to transfer representations across languages based on orthographic similarity or the co-activation of pixels. PIXEL is trained to reconstruct the pixels of masked patches instead of predicting a distribution over tokens. We pretrain the 86M parameter PIXEL model on the same English data as BERT and evaluate on syntactic and semantic tasks in typologically diverse languages, including various non-Latin scripts. We find that PIXEL substantially outperforms BERT on syntactic and semantic processing tasks on scripts that are not found in the pretraining data, but PIXEL is slightly weaker than BERT when working with Latin scripts. Furthermore, we find that PIXEL is more robust than BERT to orthographic attacks and linguistic code-switching, further confirming the benefits of modelling language with pixels.
abstract_zh: 语言模型是在有限的输入集上定义的，当我们尝试扩展支持的语言数量时，这会造成词汇瓶颈。解决这个瓶颈需要在嵌入矩阵中表示的内容和输出层中的计算问题之间进行权衡。本文介绍了 PIXEL，即基于像素的语言编码器，它没有遇到这些问题。 PIXEL 是一种预训练的语言模型，可将文本渲染为图像，从而可以根据字法相似性或像素的共同激活跨语言传输表示。 PIXEL 被训练来重建屏蔽补丁的像素，而不是预测令牌的分布。我们在与 BERT 相同的英语数据上预训练 86M 参数 PIXEL 模型，并评估不同类型语言（包括各种非拉丁文字）的句法和语义任务。我们发现，在预训练数据中未找到的脚本的句法和语义处理任务上，PIXEL 的表现明显优于 BERT，但在处理拉丁语脚本时，PIXEL 略弱于 BERT。此外，我们发现 PIXEL 对拼写攻击和语言代码转换比 BERT 更稳健，进一步证实了用像素建模语言的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PIXEL模型，通过将文本渲染为图像并重建像素块，解决多语言建模中的词汇瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 传统语言模型因依赖有限词汇集，在扩展多语言支持时面临嵌入矩阵与计算效率的权衡问题，尤其难以处理非拉丁脚本语言。
AI.method: 将文本转化为图像，训练模型重建被掩码的图像块而非预测token分布，使用86M参数在英文数据上预训练，并在多种语言任务中评估。
AI.result: PIXEL在非拉丁脚本语言的句法和语义任务中显著优于BERT，在拉丁脚本任务中略逊于BERT，且对正字法攻击和代码切换更鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 像素级建模有效突破多语言瓶颈，尤其适合非拉丁脚本语言，同时提升了模型的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Min Zhang,Siteng Huang,Wenbin Li,Donglin Wang
title: Tree Structure-Aware Few-Shot Image Classification via Hierarchical Aggregation
title_zh: 通过分层聚合进行树结构感知的少样本图像分类
comment: 22 pages, 9 figures and 4 tables Accepted by ECCV 2022
comments: 22 pages, 9 figures and 4 tables Accepted by ECCV 2022
abstract: In this paper, we mainly focus on the problem of how to learn additional feature representations for few-shot image classification through pretext tasks (e.g., rotation or color permutation and so on). This additional knowledge generated by pretext tasks can further improve the performance of few-shot learning (FSL) as it differs from human-annotated supervision (i.e., class labels of FSL tasks). To solve this problem, we present a plug-in Hierarchical Tree Structure-aware (HTS) method, which not only learns the relationship of FSL and pretext tasks, but more importantly, can adaptively select and aggregate feature representations generated by pretext tasks to maximize the performance of FSL tasks. A hierarchical tree constructing component and a gated selection aggregating component is introduced to construct the tree structure and find richer transferable knowledge that can rapidly adapt to novel classes with a few labeled images. Extensive experiments show that our HTS can significantly enhance multiple few-shot methods to achieve new state-of-the-art performance on four benchmark datasets. The code is available at: https://github.com/remiMZ/HTS-ECCV22.
summary: In this paper, we mainly focus on the problem of how to learn additional feature representations for few-shot image classification through pretext tasks (e.g., rotation or color permutation and so on). This additional knowledge generated by pretext tasks can further improve the performance of few-shot learning (FSL) as it differs from human-annotated supervision (i.e., class labels of FSL tasks). To solve this problem, we present a plug-in Hierarchical Tree Structure-aware (HTS) method, which not only learns the relationship of FSL and pretext tasks, but more importantly, can adaptively select and aggregate feature representations generated by pretext tasks to maximize the performance of FSL tasks. A hierarchical tree constructing component and a gated selection aggregating component is introduced to construct the tree structure and find richer transferable knowledge that can rapidly adapt to novel classes with a few labeled images. Extensive experiments show that our HTS can significantly enhance multiple few-shot methods to achieve new state-of-the-art performance on four benchmark datasets. The code is available at: https://github.com/remiMZ/HTS-ECCV22.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们主要关注如何通过借口任务（例如旋转或颜色排列等）学习少镜头图像分类的附加特征表示的问题。由借口任务生成的额外知识可以进一步提高小样本学习（FSL）的性能，因为它不同于人工注释的监督（即 FSL 任务的类标签）。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种插件式层次树结构感知（HTS）方法，该方法不仅可以学习FSL和借口任务的关系，更重要的是，可以自适应地选择和聚合借口任务生成的特征表示，以最大限度地提高FSL任务的性能。引入层次树构建组件和门控选择聚合组件来构建树结构并找到更丰富的可转移知识，这些知识可以快速适应具有少量标记图像的新类别。大量实验表明，我们的 HTS 可以显着增强多种小样本方法，从而在四个基准数据集上实现新的最先进的性能。该代码位于：https://github.com/remiMZ/HTS-ECCV22。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层聚合的树结构感知方法（HTS），通过预训练任务学习额外特征表示以提升少样本图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 少样本学习（FSL）依赖有限标注数据，而预训练任务（如旋转、颜色置换）生成的额外知识可补充人工标注监督，从而提升模型性能。
AI.method: 设计HTS方法，包含分层树构建组件和门控选择聚合组件，通过自适应聚合预训练任务的特征表示，构建树结构以挖掘可迁移知识。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上显著提升多种少样本方法性能，达到新状态-of-the-art水平，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: HTS通过有效整合预训练任务知识与分层结构，为少样本分类提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

search_text: Tree Structure-Aware Few-Shot Image Classification via Hierarchical Aggregation 通过分层聚合进行树结构感知的少样本图像分类 In this paper, we mainly focus on the problem of how to learn additional feature representations for few-shot image classification through pretext tasks (e.g., rotation or color permutation and so on). This additional knowledge generated by pretext tasks can further improve the performance of few-shot learning (FSL) as it differs from human-annotated supervision (i.e., class labels of FSL tasks). To solve this problem, we present a plug-in Hierarchical Tree Structure-aware (HTS) method, which not only learns the relationship of FSL and pretext tasks, but more importantly, can adaptively select and aggregate feature representations generated by pretext tasks to maximize the performance of FSL tasks. A hierarchical tree constructing component and a gated selection aggregating component is introduced to construct the tree structure and find richer transferable knowledge that can rapidly adapt to novel classes with a few labeled images. Extensive experiments show that our HTS can significantly enhance multiple few-shot methods to achieve new state-of-the-art performance on four benchmark datasets. The code is available at: https://github.com/remiMZ/HTS-ECCV22. 在本文中，我们主要关注如何通过借口任务（例如旋转或颜色排列等）学习少镜头图像分类的附加特征表示的问题。由借口任务生成的额外知识可以进一步提高小样本学习（FSL）的性能，因为它不同于人工注释的监督（即 FSL 任务的类标签）。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种插件式层次树结构感知（HTS）方法，该方法不仅可以学习FSL和借口任务的关系，更重要的是，可以自适应地选择和聚合借口任务生成的特征表示，以最大限度地提高FSL任务的性能。引入层次树构建组件和门控选择聚合组件来构建树结构并找到更丰富的可转移知识，这些知识可以快速适应具有少量标记图像的新类别。大量实验表明，我们的 HTS 可以显着增强多种小样本方法，从而在四个基准数据集上实现新的最先进的性能。该代码位于：https://github.com/remiMZ/HTS-ECCV22。 本文提出了一种基于分层聚合的树结构感知方法（HTS），通过预训练任务学习额外特征表示以提升少样本图像分类性能。 Min Zhang,Siteng Huang,Wenbin Li,Donglin Wang cs.CV

authors_text: A. René Geist,Jonathan Fiene,Naomi Tashiro,Zheng Jia,Sebastian Trimpe
title: The Wheelbot: A Jumping Reaction Wheel Unicycle
title_zh: Wheelbot：跳跃反应轮独轮车
comment: Erratum: In the initial publication, Equation (3) was wrong and has been corrected in this version. Equation (3) relates to the transform from averaged body rates ${}^{\text{B}}ω_i$ to Euler rates. Importantly, the results in this papers are not affected by the wrong transform. More details are found in the projects github repo: https://github.com/AndReGeist/wheelbot-v2.5

abstract: Combining off-the-shelf components with 3D-printing, the Wheelbot is a symmetric reaction wheel unicycle that can jump onto its wheels from any initial position. With non-holonomic and under-actuated dynamics, as well as two coupled unstable degrees of freedom, the Wheelbot provides a challenging platform for nonlinear and data-driven control research. This paper presents the Wheelbot's mechanical and electrical design, its estimation and control algorithms, as well as experiments demonstrating both self-erection and disturbance rejection while balancing.
summary: Combining off-the-shelf components with 3D-printing, the Wheelbot is a symmetric reaction wheel unicycle that can jump onto its wheels from any initial position. With non-holonomic and under-actuated dynamics, as well as two coupled unstable degrees of freedom, the Wheelbot provides a challenging platform for nonlinear and data-driven control research. This paper presents the Wheelbot's mechanical and electrical design, its estimation and control algorithms, as well as experiments demonstrating both self-erection and disturbance rejection while balancing.
abstract_zh: Wheelbot 将现成组件与 3D 打印相结合，是一款对称反应轮独轮车，可以从任何初始位置跳到轮子上。凭借非完整和欠驱动动力学以及两个耦合的不稳定自由度，Wheelbot 为非线性和数据驱动的控制研究提供了一个具有挑战性的平台。本文介绍了 Wheelbot 的机械和电气设计、其估计和控制算法，以及演示平衡时自安装和干扰抑制的实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Wheelbot的跳跃式反作用轮单轮车，通过机械设计和控制算法实现自立和抗干扰平衡。
AI.motivation: 针对非全息和欠驱动动力学系统中耦合不稳定自由度的控制难题，提供一个具有挑战性的实验平台。
AI.method: 结合现成组件与3D打印技术设计机械结构，开发基于估计与控制算法的非线性控制策略，并通过实验验证。
AI.result: 实验成功展示了Wheelbot的自立能力、动态跳跃性能及在平衡过程中的干扰抑制效果。
AI.conclusion: Wheelbot验证了复杂动力学系统控制算法的有效性，为非线性控制研究提供了可行的硬件平台。

authors_text: Mohsen Zand,Ali Etemad,Michael Greenspan
title: ObjectBox: From Centers to Boxes for Anchor-Free Object Detection
title_zh: ObjectBox：从中心到盒子进行无锚对象检测
abstract: We present ObjectBox, a novel single-stage anchor-free and highly generalizable object detection approach. As opposed to both existing anchor-based and anchor-free detectors, which are more biased toward specific object scales in their label assignments, we use only object center locations as positive samples and treat all objects equally in different feature levels regardless of the objects' sizes or shapes. Specifically, our label assignment strategy considers the object center locations as shape- and size-agnostic anchors in an anchor-free fashion, and allows learning to occur at all scales for every object. To support this, we define new regression targets as the distances from two corners of the center cell location to the four sides of the bounding box. Moreover, to handle scale-variant objects, we propose a tailored IoU loss to deal with boxes with different sizes. As a result, our proposed object detector does not need any dataset-dependent hyperparameters to be tuned across datasets. We evaluate our method on MS-COCO 2017 and PASCAL VOC 2012 datasets, and compare our results to state-of-the-art methods. We observe that ObjectBox performs favorably in comparison to prior works. Furthermore, we perform rigorous ablation experiments to evaluate different components of our method. Our code is available at: https://github.com/MohsenZand/ObjectBox.
summary: We present ObjectBox, a novel single-stage anchor-free and highly generalizable object detection approach. As opposed to both existing anchor-based and anchor-free detectors, which are more biased toward specific object scales in their label assignments, we use only object center locations as positive samples and treat all objects equally in different feature levels regardless of the objects' sizes or shapes. Specifically, our label assignment strategy considers the object center locations as shape- and size-agnostic anchors in an anchor-free fashion, and allows learning to occur at all scales for every object. To support this, we define new regression targets as the distances from two corners of the center cell location to the four sides of the bounding box. Moreover, to handle scale-variant objects, we propose a tailored IoU loss to deal with boxes with different sizes. As a result, our proposed object detector does not need any dataset-dependent hyperparameters to be tuned across datasets. We evaluate our method on MS-COCO 2017 and PASCAL VOC 2012 datasets, and compare our results to state-of-the-art methods. We observe that ObjectBox performs favorably in comparison to prior works. Furthermore, we perform rigorous ablation experiments to evaluate different components of our method. Our code is available at: https://github.com/MohsenZand/ObjectBox.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 ObjectBox，一种新颖的单阶段无锚且高度通用的对象检测方法。与现有的基于锚点和无锚点的检测器相比，它们在标签分配中更偏向于特定的对象尺度，我们仅使用对象中心位置作为正样本，并在不同的特征级别上平等地对待所有对象，无论对象的大小或形状如何。具体来说，我们的标签分配策略将对象中心位置视为与形状和大小无关的锚点，以无锚点的方式进行，并允许在每个对象的所有尺度上进行学习。为了支持这一点，我们将新的回归目标定义为从中心单元位置的两个角到边界框的四个边的距离。此外，为了处理尺度变化的物体，我们提出了一种定制的 IoU 损失来处理不同尺寸的盒子。因此，我们提出的对象检测器不需要跨数据集调整任何依赖于数据集的超参数。我们在 MS-COCO 2017 和 PASCAL VOC 2012 数据集上评估我们的方法，并将我们的结果与最先进的方法进行比较。我们观察到，与之前的作品相比，ObjectBox 的表现更加出色。此外，我们进行严格的消融实验来评估我们方法的不同组成部分。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/MohsenZand/ObjectBox。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的单阶段无锚框目标检测方法ObjectBox，通过中心点定位实现更通用的目标检测。
AI.motivation: 现有锚框和无锚框检测器在标签分配时偏向特定尺度，而ObjectBox通过仅使用目标中心点作为正样本，实现对不同尺度目标的公平处理。
AI.method: 以目标中心点为形状和尺度无关的锚点，定义基于中心单元到边界框四边距离的回归目标，并设计针对尺度变化的定制化IoU损失函数。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO 2017和PASCAL VOC 2012数据集上优于现有方法，且无需跨数据集调整超参数，消融实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: ObjectBox通过中心点驱动的统一尺度处理机制，实现了无需数据集特定调参的高泛化目标检测性能。

As opposed to both existing anchor-based and anchor-free detectors, which are more biased toward specific object scales in their label assignments, we use only object center locations as positive samples and treat all objects equally in different feature levels regardless of the objects' sizes or shapes. Specifically, our label assignment strategy considers the object center locations as shape- and size-agnostic anchors in an anchor-free fashion, and allows learning to occur at all scales for every object. To support this, we define new regression targets as the distances from two corners of the center cell location to the four sides of the bounding box.
