As a result, our proposed object detector does not need any dataset-dependent hyperparameters to be tuned across datasets. We evaluate our method on MS-COCO 2017 and PASCAL VOC 2012 datasets, and compare our results to state-of-the-art methods. We observe that ObjectBox performs favorably in comparison to prior works. Furthermore, we perform rigorous ablation experiments to evaluate different components of our method. Our code is available at: https://github.com/MohsenZand/ObjectBox. 我们提出了 ObjectBox，一种新颖的单阶段无锚且高度通用的对象检测方法。与现有的基于锚点和无锚点的检测器相比，它们在标签分配中更偏向于特定的对象尺度，我们仅使用对象中心位置作为正样本，并在不同的特征级别上平等地对待所有对象，无论对象的大小或形状如何。具体来说，我们的标签分配策略将对象中心位置视为与形状和大小无关的锚点，以无锚点的方式进行，并允许在每个对象的所有尺度上进行学习。为了支持这一点，我们将新的回归目标定义为从中心单元位置的两个角到边界框的四个边的距离。此外，为了处理尺度变化的物体，我们提出了一种定制的 IoU 损失来处理不同尺寸的盒子。因此，我们提出的对象检测器不需要跨数据集调整任何依赖于数据集的超参数。我们在 MS-COCO 2017 和 PASCAL VOC 2012 数据集上评估我们的方法，并将我们的结果与最先进的方法进行比较。我们观察到，与之前的作品相比，ObjectBox 的表现更加出色。此外，我们进行严格的消融实验来评估我们方法的不同组成部分。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/MohsenZand/ObjectBox。 本文提出了一种新型的单阶段无锚框目标检测方法ObjectBox，通过中心点定位实现更通用的目标检测。 Mohsen Zand,Ali Etemad,Michael Greenspan cs.CV

authors_text: Hao-Wen Dong,Ke Chen,Shlomo Dubnov,Julian McAuley,Taylor Berg-Kirkpatrick
title: Multitrack Music Transformer
title_zh: 多轨音乐转换器
comment: Accepted by ICASSP 2023. Demo: https://salu133445.github.io/mmt/ . Code: https://github.com/salu133445/mmt
comments: Accepted by ICASSP 2023. Demo: https://salu133445.github.io/mmt/ . Code: https://github.com/salu133445/mmt
abstract: Existing approaches for generating multitrack music with transformer models have been limited in terms of the number of instruments, the length of the music segments and slow inference. This is partly due to the memory requirements of the lengthy input sequences necessitated by existing representations. In this work, we propose a new multitrack music representation that allows a diverse set of instruments while keeping a short sequence length. Our proposed Multitrack Music Transformer (MMT) achieves comparable performance with state-of-the-art systems, landing in between two recently proposed models in a subjective listening test, while achieving substantial speedups and memory reductions over both, making the method attractive for real time improvisation or near real time creative applications. Further, we propose a new measure for analyzing musical self-attention and show that the trained model attends more to notes that form a consonant interval with the current note and to notes that are 4N beats away from the current step.
summary: Existing approaches for generating multitrack music with transformer models have been limited in terms of the number of instruments, the length of the music segments and slow inference. This is partly due to the memory requirements of the lengthy input sequences necessitated by existing representations. In this work, we propose a new multitrack music representation that allows a diverse set of instruments while keeping a short sequence length. Our proposed Multitrack Music Transformer (MMT) achieves comparable performance with state-of-the-art systems, landing in between two recently proposed models in a subjective listening test, while achieving substantial speedups and memory reductions over both, making the method attractive for real time improvisation or near real time creative applications. Further, we propose a new measure for analyzing musical self-attention and show that the trained model attends more to notes that form a consonant interval with the current note and to notes that are 4N beats away from the current step.
abstract_zh: 现有的使用 Transformer 模型生成多轨音乐的方法在乐器数量、音乐片段的长度和推理速度方面受到限制。这部分是由于现有表示所需的冗长输入序列的内存要求。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的多轨音乐表示形式，允许使用多种乐器，同时保持较短的序列长度。我们提出的多轨音乐变压器 (MMT) 实现了与最先进系统相当的性能，在主观听力测试中介于最近提出的两个模型之间，同时在两者上实现了显着的加速和内存减少，使得该方法对于实时即兴创作或近实时创意应用程序具有吸引力。此外，我们提出了一种分析音乐自我注意力的新方法，并表明训练后的模型更多地关注与当前音符形成辅音音程的音符以及距当前步骤 4N 节拍的音符。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型多轨音乐生成模型MMT，通过优化表示方法解决现有Transformer模型在乐器数量、音乐长度和推理速度方面的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的多轨音乐生成方法受限于长序列输入导致的高内存消耗，难以实现多样化乐器组合和实时应用。
AI.method: 设计新型多轨音乐表示方案缩短序列长度，结合Transformer架构构建MMT模型，并提出分析音乐自注意力的新指标。
AI.result: MMT在主观测试中表现优于现有模型，推理速度和内存占用显著降低，模型注意力机制显示其偏好和谐音程与特定节奏位置的音符。
AI.conclusion: MMT在生成效果与计算效率间取得平衡，适用于实时音乐创作场景，新分析方法为理解Transformer音乐生成机制提供理论支持。

authors_text: Chenghua Zeng,Huijuan Lu,Kanghao Chen,Ruixuan Wang,Wei-Shi Zheng
title: Learning Discriminative Representation via Metric Learning for Imbalanced Medical Image Classification
title_zh: 通过度量学习来学习不平衡医学图像分类的判别表示
abstract: Data imbalance between common and rare diseases during model training often causes intelligent diagnosis systems to have biased predictions towards common diseases. The state-of-the-art approaches apply a two-stage learning framework to alleviate the class-imbalance issue, where the first stage focuses on training of a general feature extractor and the second stage focuses on fine-tuning the classifier head for class rebalancing. However, existing two-stage approaches do not consider the fine-grained property between different diseases, often causing the first stage less effective for medical image classification than for natural image classification tasks. In this study, we propose embedding metric learning into the first stage of the two-stage framework specially to help the feature extractor learn to extract more discriminative feature representations. Extensive experiments mainly on three medical image datasets show that the proposed approach consistently outperforms existing onestage and two-stage approaches, suggesting that metric learning can be used as an effective plug-in component in the two-stage framework for fine-grained class-imbalanced image classification tasks.
summary: Data imbalance between common and rare diseases during model training often causes intelligent diagnosis systems to have biased predictions towards common diseases. The state-of-the-art approaches apply a two-stage learning framework to alleviate the class-imbalance issue, where the first stage focuses on training of a general feature extractor and the second stage focuses on fine-tuning the classifier head for class rebalancing. However, existing two-stage approaches do not consider the fine-grained property between different diseases, often causing the first stage less effective for medical image classification than for natural image classification tasks. In this study, we propose embedding metric learning into the first stage of the two-stage framework specially to help the feature extractor learn to extract more discriminative feature representations. Extensive experiments mainly on three medical image datasets show that the proposed approach consistently outperforms existing onestage and two-stage approaches, suggesting that metric learning can be used as an effective plug-in component in the two-stage framework for fine-grained class-imbalanced image classification tasks.
abstract_zh: Data imbalance between common and rare diseases during model training often causes intelligent diagnosis systems to have biased predictions towards common diseases. The state-of-the-art approaches apply a two-stage learning framework to alleviate the class-imbalance issue, where the first stage focuses on training of a general feature extractor and the second stage focuses on fine-tuning the classifier head for class rebalancing. However, existing two-stage approaches do not consider the fine-grained property between different diseases, often causing the first stage less effective for medical image classification than for natural image classification tasks.在本研究中，我们建议将度量学习嵌入到两阶段框架的第一阶段，专门帮助特征提取器学习提取更具辨别力的特征表示。 Extensive experiments mainly on three medical image datasets show that the proposed approach consistently outperforms existing onestage and two-stage approaches, suggesting that metric learning can be used as an effective plug-in component in the two-stage framework for fine-grained class-imbalanced image classification tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过在两阶段框架的第一阶段嵌入度量学习，解决医学图像分类中的类别不平衡问题，提升特征提取器的判别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有两阶段方法未考虑疾病间的细粒度差异，导致第一阶段特征提取器在医学图像分类任务中效果不佳，易偏向常见病。
AI.method: 将度量学习整合到两阶段框架的第一阶段，使特征提取器学习更具判别性的表示，以增强对罕见病的区分能力。
AI.result: 在三个医学图像数据集上实验表明，该方法在类别不平衡场景下优于现有的一阶段和两阶段方法。
AI.conclusion: 度量学习可作为有效插件组件嵌入两阶段框架，显著提升细粒度类别不平衡医学图像分类性能。

authors_text: Hamid Mousavi,Mohammad Loni,Mina Alibeigi,Masoud Daneshtalab
title: DASS: Differentiable Architecture Search for Sparse neural networks
title_zh: DASS：稀疏神经网络的可微架构搜索
abstract: The deployment of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) on edge devices is hindered by the substantial gap between performance requirements and available processing power. While recent research has made significant strides in developing pruning methods to build a sparse network for reducing the computing overhead of DNNs, there remains considerable accuracy loss, especially at high pruning ratios. We find that the architectures designed for dense networks by differentiable architecture search methods are ineffective when pruning mechanisms are applied to them. The main reason is that the current method does not support sparse architectures in their search space and uses a search objective that is made for dense networks and does not pay any attention to sparsity. In this paper, we propose a new method to search for sparsity-friendly neural architectures. We do this by adding two new sparse operations to the search space and modifying the search objective. We propose two novel parametric SparseConv and SparseLinear operations in order to expand the search space to include sparse operations. In particular, these operations make a flexible search space due to using sparse parametric versions of linear and convolution operations. The proposed search objective lets us train the architecture based on the sparsity of the search space operations. Quantitative analyses demonstrate that our search architectures outperform those used in the stateof-the-art sparse networks on the CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets. In terms of performance and hardware effectiveness, DASS increases the accuracy of the sparse version of MobileNet-v2 from 73.44% to 81.35% (+7.91% improvement) with 3.87x faster inference time.
summary: The deployment of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) on edge devices is hindered by the substantial gap between performance requirements and available processing power. While recent research has made significant strides in developing pruning methods to build a sparse network for reducing the computing overhead of DNNs, there remains considerable accuracy loss, especially at high pruning ratios. We find that the architectures designed for dense networks by differentiable architecture search methods are ineffective when pruning mechanisms are applied to them. The main reason is that the current method does not support sparse architectures in their search space and uses a search objective that is made for dense networks and does not pay any attention to sparsity. In this paper, we propose a new method to search for sparsity-friendly neural architectures. We do this by adding two new sparse operations to the search space and modifying the search objective. We propose two novel parametric SparseConv and SparseLinear operations in order to expand the search space to include sparse operations. In particular, these operations make a flexible search space due to using sparse parametric versions of linear and convolution operations. The proposed search objective lets us train the architecture based on the sparsity of the search space operations. Quantitative analyses demonstrate that our search architectures outperform those used in the stateof-the-art sparse networks on the CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets. In terms of performance and hardware effectiveness, DASS increases the accuracy of the sparse version of MobileNet-v2 from 73.44% to 81.35% (+7.91% improvement) with 3.87x faster inference time.
abstract_zh: 性能要求与可用处理能力之间的巨大差距阻碍了深度神经网络 (DNN) 在边缘设备上的部署。虽然最近的研究在开发剪枝方法以构建稀疏网络以减少 DNN 的计算开销方面取得了重大进展，但仍然存在相当大的精度损失，特别是在高剪枝率的情况下。我们发现，当应用剪枝机制时，通过可微架构搜索方法为密集网络设计的架构是无效的。主要原因是当前方法在其搜索空间中不支持稀疏架构，并且使用针对密集网络而设计的搜索目标，并且不关注稀疏性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法来搜索稀疏友好的神经架构。我们通过向搜索空间添加两个新的稀疏操作并修改搜索目标来实现这一点。我们提出了两种新颖的参数化 SparseConv 和 SparseLinear 操作，以扩展搜索空间以包含稀疏操作。特别是，由于使用线性和卷积运算的稀疏参数版本，这些运算形成了灵活的搜索空间。所提出的搜索目标让我们能够根据搜索空间操作的稀疏性来训练架构。定量分析表明，我们的搜索架构优于 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 数据集上最先进的稀疏网络中使用的搜索架构。在性能和硬件效率方面，DASS 将稀疏版本 MobileNet-v2 的准确率从 73.44% 提高到 81.35%（提高了 7.91%），推理时间加快了 3.87 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DASS方法，通过可微分架构搜索寻找适合稀疏神经网络的架构，以减少计算开销并提升精度。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法在高剪枝率下精度损失显著，且传统可微分架构搜索未考虑稀疏性，导致设计的密集网络架构在剪枝后表现不佳。
AI.method: 在搜索空间中引入稀疏卷积（SparseConv）和稀疏线性（SparseLinear）操作，并调整搜索目标以适配稀疏性，实现对稀疏架构的优化搜索。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet数据集上，DASS方法使稀疏MobileNet-v2精度从73.44%提升至81.35%，推理速度加快3.87倍。
AI.conclusion: DASS通过针对性设计的搜索空间和目标函数，有效提升了稀疏神经网络的精度与硬件效率，为边缘设备部署提供了更优方案。

search_text: DASS: Differentiable Architecture Search for Sparse neural networks DASS：稀疏神经网络的可微架构搜索 The deployment of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) on edge devices is hindered by the substantial gap between performance requirements and available processing power. While recent research has made significant strides in developing pruning methods to build a sparse network for reducing the computing overhead of DNNs, there remains considerable accuracy loss, especially at high pruning ratios. We find that the architectures designed for dense networks by differentiable architecture search methods are ineffective when pruning mechanisms are applied to them. The main reason is that the current method does not support sparse architectures in their search space and uses a search objective that is made for dense networks and does not pay any attention to sparsity. In this paper, we propose a new method to search for sparsity-friendly neural architectures. We do this by adding two new sparse operations to the search space and modifying the search objective. We propose two novel parametric SparseConv and SparseLinear operations in order to expand the search space to include sparse operations. In particular, these operations make a flexible search space due to using sparse parametric versions of linear and convolution operations. The proposed search objective lets us train the architecture based on the sparsity of the search space operations. Quantitative analyses demonstrate that our search architectures outperform those used in the stateof-the-art sparse networks on the CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets. In terms of performance and hardware effectiveness, DASS increases the accuracy of the sparse version of MobileNet-v2 from 73.44% to 81.35% (+7.91% improvement) with 3.87x faster inference time. 性能要求与可用处理能力之间的巨大差距阻碍了深度神经网络 (DNN) 在边缘设备上的部署。虽然最近的研究在开发剪枝方法以构建稀疏网络以减少 DNN 的计算开销方面取得了重大进展，但仍然存在相当大的精度损失，特别是在高剪枝率的情况下。我们发现，当应用剪枝机制时，通过可微架构搜索方法为密集网络设计的架构是无效的。主要原因是当前方法在其搜索空间中不支持稀疏架构，并且使用针对密集网络而设计的搜索目标，并且不关注稀疏性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法来搜索稀疏友好的神经架构。我们通过向搜索空间添加两个新的稀疏操作并修改搜索目标来实现这一点。我们提出了两种新颖的参数化 SparseConv 和 SparseLinear 操作，以扩展搜索空间以包含稀疏操作。特别是，由于使用线性和卷积运算的稀疏参数版本，这些运算形成了灵活的搜索空间。所提出的搜索目标让我们能够根据搜索空间操作的稀疏性来训练架构。定量分析表明，我们的搜索架构优于 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 数据集上最先进的稀疏网络中使用的搜索架构。在性能和硬件效率方面，DASS 将稀疏版本 MobileNet-v2 的准确率从 73.44% 提高到 81.35%（提高了 7.91%），推理时间加快了 3.87 倍。 本文提出DASS方法，通过可微分架构搜索寻找适合稀疏神经网络的架构，以减少计算开销并提升精度。 Hamid Mousavi,Mohammad Loni,Mina Alibeigi,Masoud Daneshtalab cs.CV

authors_text: Darwin Bautista,Rowel Atienza
title: Scene Text Recognition with Permuted Autoregressive Sequence Models
title_zh: 使用置换自回归序列模型进行场景文本识别
comment: Accepted at the 17th European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2022)
comments: Accepted at the 17th European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2022)
abstract: Context-aware STR methods typically use internal autoregressive (AR) language models (LM). Inherent limitations of AR models motivated two-stage methods which employ an external LM. The conditional independence of the external LM on the input image may cause it to erroneously rectify correct predictions, leading to significant inefficiencies. Our method, PARSeq, learns an ensemble of internal AR LMs with shared weights using Permutation Language Modeling. It unifies context-free non-AR and context-aware AR inference, and iterative refinement using bidirectional context. Using synthetic training data, PARSeq achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results in STR benchmarks (91.9% accuracy) and more challenging datasets. It establishes new SOTA results (96.0% accuracy) when trained on real data. PARSeq is optimal on accuracy vs parameter count, FLOPS, and latency because of its simple, unified structure and parallel token processing. Due to its extensive use of attention, it is robust on arbitrarily-oriented text which is common in real-world images. Code, pretrained weights, and data are available at: https://github.com/baudm/parseq.
summary: Context-aware STR methods typically use internal autoregressive (AR) language models (LM). Inherent limitations of AR models motivated two-stage methods which employ an external LM. The conditional independence of the external LM on the input image may cause it to erroneously rectify correct predictions, leading to significant inefficiencies. Our method, PARSeq, learns an ensemble of internal AR LMs with shared weights using Permutation Language Modeling. It unifies context-free non-AR and context-aware AR inference, and iterative refinement using bidirectional context. Using synthetic training data, PARSeq achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results in STR benchmarks (91.9% accuracy) and more challenging datasets. It establishes new SOTA results (96.0% accuracy) when trained on real data. PARSeq is optimal on accuracy vs parameter count, FLOPS, and latency because of its simple, unified structure and parallel token processing. Due to its extensive use of attention, it is robust on arbitrarily-oriented text which is common in real-world images. Code, pretrained weights, and data are available at: https://github.com/baudm/parseq.
abstract_zh: 上下文感知 STR 方法通常使用内部自回归 (AR) 语言模型 (LM)。 AR 模型的固有局限性激发了采用外部 LM 的两阶段方法。外部 LM 对输入图像的条件独立性可能会导致其错误地纠正正确的预测，从而导致显着的低效率。我们的方法 PARSeq 使用排列语言模型学习具有共享权重的内部 AR LM 集合。它统一了上下文无关的非 AR 和上下文感知的 AR 推理，以及使用双向上下文的迭代细化。使用合成训练数据，PARSeq 在 STR 基准（准确率 91.9%）和更具挑战性的数据集上取得了最先进的 (SOTA) 结果。当使用真实数据进行训练时，它建立了新的 SOTA 结果（准确度为 96.0%）。由于其简单、统一的结构和并行令牌处理，PARSeq 在精度与参数计数、FLOPS 和延迟方面是最佳的。由于其广泛使用注意力，它对现实世界图像中常见的任意方向的文本具有鲁棒性。代码、预训练权重和数据可从以下网址获取：https://github.com/baudm/parseq。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PARSeq的场景文本识别方法，利用排列语言模型来学习共享权重的内部自回归语言模型集合。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于自回归语言模型的场景文本识别方法存在局限性，而使用外部语言模型的方法可能因与输入图像条件独立而导致错误修正，从而影响效率。
AI.method: PARSeq通过排列语言建模学习共享权重的内部自回归语言模型集合，统一了无上下文的非自回归和有上下文的自回归推理，并使用双向上下文进行迭代优化。
AI.result: PARSeq在合成训练数据上实现了场景文本识别基准的最先进结果（91.9%准确率），在真实数据上则达到了96.0%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: PARSeq在准确率、参数数量、计算量和延迟方面表现优异，其结构简单统一且支持并行处理，适用于真实世界中任意方向的文本识别。

authors_text: Peng Yin,Haowen Lai,Shiqi Zhao,Ruohai Ge,Ji Zhang,Howie Choset,Sebastian Scherer
title: AutoMerge: A Framework for Map Assembling and Smoothing in City-scale Environments
title_zh: AutoMerge：城市规模环境中的地图组装和平滑框架
comment: 19 pages, 20 figures, IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO) 2023
comments: 19 pages, 20 figures, IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO) 2023
abstract: We present AutoMerge, a LiDAR data processing framework for assembling a large number of map segments into a complete map. Traditional large-scale map merging methods are fragile to incorrect data associations, and are primarily limited to working only offline. AutoMerge utilizes multi-perspective fusion and adaptive loop closure detection for accurate data associations, and it uses incremental merging to assemble large maps from individual trajectory segments given in random order and with no initial estimations. Furthermore, after assembling the segments, AutoMerge performs fine matching and pose-graph optimization to globally smooth the merged map. We demonstrate AutoMerge on both city-scale merging (120km) and campus-scale repeated merging (4.5km x 8). The experiments show that AutoMerge (i) surpasses the second- and third- best methods by 14% and 24% recall in segment retrieval, (ii) achieves comparable 3D mapping accuracy for 120 km large-scale map assembly, (iii) and it is robust to temporally-spaced revisits. To the best of our knowledge, AutoMerge is the first mapping approach that can merge hundreds of kilometers of individual segments without the aid of GPS.
summary: We present AutoMerge, a LiDAR data processing framework for assembling a large number of map segments into a complete map. Traditional large-scale map merging methods are fragile to incorrect data associations, and are primarily limited to working only offline. AutoMerge utilizes multi-perspective fusion and adaptive loop closure detection for accurate data associations, and it uses incremental merging to assemble large maps from individual trajectory segments given in random order and with no initial estimations. Furthermore, after assembling the segments, AutoMerge performs fine matching and pose-graph optimization to globally smooth the merged map. We demonstrate AutoMerge on both city-scale merging (120km) and campus-scale repeated merging (4.5km x 8). The experiments show that AutoMerge (i) surpasses the second- and third- best methods by 14% and 24% recall in segment retrieval, (ii) achieves comparable 3D mapping accuracy for 120 km large-scale map assembly, (iii) and it is robust to temporally-spaced revisits. To the best of our knowledge, AutoMerge is the first mapping approach that can merge hundreds of kilometers of individual segments without the aid of GPS.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 AutoMerge，一个 LiDAR 数据处理框架，用于将大量地图片段组装成完整的地图。传统的大规模地图合并方法对于不正确的数据关联很脆弱，并且主要仅限于离线工作。 AutoMerge 利用多视角融合和自适应闭环检测来实现准确的数据关联，并使用增量合并从以随机顺序给出的各个轨迹段组装大地图，并且没有初始估计。此外，在组装片段后，AutoMerge 执行精细匹配和位姿图优化，以全局平滑合并的地图。我们在城市规模合并（120 公里）和校园规模重复合并（4.5 公里 x 8）上演示了 AutoMerge。实验表明，AutoMerge (i) 在分段检索中分别以 14% 和 24% 的召回率超越了第二和第三好的方法，(ii) 在 120 公里大规模地图组合中实现了可比的 3D 绘图精度，(iii) 并且它对于时间间隔重访具有鲁棒性。据我们所知，AutoMerge 是第一种无需 GPS 辅助即可合并数百公里单独路段的地图绘制方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AutoMerge的框架，用于在城市规模环境中通过LiDAR数据将大量地图片段组装并平滑为完整地图。
AI.motivation: 传统大规模地图合并方法对错误数据关联敏感且依赖离线处理，且通常需要GPS辅助，难以应对无初始估计和随机顺序的轨迹片段。
AI.method: AutoMerge采用多视角融合与自适应闭环检测实现精确数据关联，通过增量合并处理无序轨迹片段，并利用细匹配和位姿图优化进行全局平滑。
AI.result: 实验表明，AutoMerge在片段召回率上优于次优方法14%-24%，实现了120公里大尺度地图的可比精度，并能鲁棒处理时间间隔重访数据。
AI.conclusion: AutoMerge是首个无需GPS即可合并数百公里级地图片段的框架，为大规模环境下的高效地图构建提供了新方案。

search_text: AutoMerge: A Framework for Map Assembling and Smoothing in City-scale Environments AutoMerge：城市规模环境中的地图组装和平滑框架 We present AutoMerge, a LiDAR data processing framework for assembling a large number of map segments into a complete map. Traditional large-scale map merging methods are fragile to incorrect data associations, and are primarily limited to working only offline. AutoMerge utilizes multi-perspective fusion and adaptive loop closure detection for accurate data associations, and it uses incremental merging to assemble large maps from individual trajectory segments given in random order and with no initial estimations. Furthermore, after assembling the segments, AutoMerge performs fine matching and pose-graph optimization to globally smooth the merged map. We demonstrate AutoMerge on both city-scale merging (120km) and campus-scale repeated merging (4.5km x 8). The experiments show that AutoMerge (i) surpasses the second- and third- best methods by 14% and 24% recall in segment retrieval, (ii) achieves comparable 3D mapping accuracy for 120 km large-scale map assembly, (iii) and it is robust to temporally-spaced revisits. To the best of our knowledge, AutoMerge is the first mapping approach that can merge hundreds of kilometers of individual segments without the aid of GPS. 我们推出了 AutoMerge，一个 LiDAR 数据处理框架，用于将大量地图片段组装成完整的地图。传统的大规模地图合并方法对于不正确的数据关联很脆弱，并且主要仅限于离线工作。 AutoMerge 利用多视角融合和自适应闭环检测来实现准确的数据关联，并使用增量合并从以随机顺序给出的各个轨迹段组装大地图，并且没有初始估计。此外，在组装片段后，AutoMerge 执行精细匹配和位姿图优化，以全局平滑合并的地图。我们在城市规模合并（120 公里）和校园规模重复合并（4.5 公里 x 8）上演示了 AutoMerge。实验表明，AutoMerge (i) 在分段检索中分别以 14% 和 24% 的召回率超越了第二和第三好的方法，(ii) 在 120 公里大规模地图组合中实现了可比的 3D 绘图精度，(iii) 并且它对于时间间隔重访具有鲁棒性。据我们所知，AutoMerge 是第一种无需 GPS 辅助即可合并数百公里单独路段的地图绘制方法。 本文提出了一种名为AutoMerge的框架，用于在城市规模环境中通过LiDAR数据将大量地图片段组装并平滑为完整地图。 Peng Yin,Haowen Lai,Shiqi Zhao,Ruohai Ge,Ji Zhang,Howie Choset,Sebastian Scherer cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Nilay Patel,Jeffrey Flanigan
title: Forming Trees with Treeformers
title_zh: 用 Treeformers 形成树
abstract: Human language is known to exhibit a nested, hierarchical structure, allowing us to form complex sentences out of smaller pieces. However, many state-of-the-art neural networks models such as Transformers have no explicit hierarchical structure in its architecture -- that is, they don't have an inductive bias toward hierarchical structure. Additionally, Transformers are known to perform poorly on compositional generalization tasks which require such structures. In this paper, we introduce Treeformer, a general-purpose encoder module inspired by the CKY algorithm which learns a composition operator and pooling function to construct hierarchical encodings for phrases and sentences. Our extensive experiments demonstrate the benefits of incorporating hierarchical structure into the Transformer and show significant improvements in compositional generalization as well as in downstream tasks such as machine translation, abstractive summarization, and various natural language understanding tasks.
summary: Human language is known to exhibit a nested, hierarchical structure, allowing us to form complex sentences out of smaller pieces. However, many state-of-the-art neural networks models such as Transformers have no explicit hierarchical structure in its architecture -- that is, they don't have an inductive bias toward hierarchical structure. Additionally, Transformers are known to perform poorly on compositional generalization tasks which require such structures. In this paper, we introduce Treeformer, a general-purpose encoder module inspired by the CKY algorithm which learns a composition operator and pooling function to construct hierarchical encodings for phrases and sentences. Our extensive experiments demonstrate the benefits of incorporating hierarchical structure into the Transformer and show significant improvements in compositional generalization as well as in downstream tasks such as machine translation, abstractive summarization, and various natural language understanding tasks.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，人类语言具有嵌套的层次结构，使我们能够用较小的片段组成复杂的句子。然而，许多最先进的神经网络模型（例如 Transformer）在其架构中没有明确的层次结构——也就是说，它们对层次结构没有归纳偏差。此外，众所周知，Transformers 在需要这种结构的组合泛化任务上表现不佳。在本文中，我们介绍了 Treeformer，这是一个受 CKY 算法启发的通用编码器模块，它学习组合运算符和池化函数来构建短语和句子的分层编码。我们广泛的实验证明了将分层结构合并到 Transformer 中的好处，并显示了组合泛化以及机器翻译、抽象摘要和各种自然语言理解任务等下游任务的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Treeformer模块，通过引入层次结构解决Transformer模型在组合泛化任务中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型缺乏显式层次结构，导致在需要组合泛化的自然语言处理任务中表现不佳。
AI.method: 基于CKY算法设计Treeformer，学习组合运算符和池化函数以构建层次化句子表示。
AI.result: 在机器翻译、摘要生成及多项NLU任务中实现显著性能提升，组合泛化能力增强。
AI.conclusion: 层次化结构能有效提升模型对组合性语言任务的处理能力，Treeformer为Transformer架构提供了可行改进方案。

authors_text: Yuankai Wu,Hongyu Yang,Yi Lin,Hong Liu
title: Spatiotemporal Propagation Learning for Network-Wide Flight Delay Prediction
title_zh: 用于全网络航班延误预测的时空传播学习
abstract: Demystifying the delay propagation mechanisms among multiple airports is fundamental to precise and interpretable delay prediction, which is crucial during decision-making for all aviation industry stakeholders. The principal challenge lies in effectively leveraging the spatiotemporal dependencies and exogenous factors related to the delay propagation. However, previous works only consider limited spatiotemporal patterns with few factors. To promote more comprehensive propagation modeling for delay prediction, we propose SpatioTemporal Propagation Network (STPN), a space-time separable graph convolutional network, which is novel in spatiotemporal dependency capturing. From the aspect of spatial relation modeling, we propose a multi-graph convolution model considering both geographic proximity and airline schedule. From the aspect of temporal dependency capturing, we propose a multi-head self-attentional mechanism that can be learned end-to-end and explicitly reason multiple kinds of temporal dependency of delay time series. We show that the joint spatial and temporal learning models yield a sum of the Kronecker product, which factors the spatiotemporal dependence into the sum of several spatial and temporal adjacency matrices. By this means, STPN allows cross-talk of spatial and temporal factors for modeling delay propagation. Furthermore, a squeeze and excitation module is added to each layer of STPN to boost meaningful spatiotemporal features. To this end, we apply STPN to multi-step ahead arrival and departure delay prediction in large-scale airport networks. To validate the effectiveness of our model, we experiment with two real-world delay datasets, including U.S and China flight delays; and we show that STPN outperforms state-of-the-art methods. In addition, counterfactuals produced by STPN show that it learns explainable delay propagation patterns.
summary: Demystifying the delay propagation mechanisms among multiple airports is fundamental to precise and interpretable delay prediction, which is crucial during decision-making for all aviation industry stakeholders. The principal challenge lies in effectively leveraging the spatiotemporal dependencies and exogenous factors related to the delay propagation. However, previous works only consider limited spatiotemporal patterns with few factors. To promote more comprehensive propagation modeling for delay prediction, we propose SpatioTemporal Propagation Network (STPN), a space-time separable graph convolutional network, which is novel in spatiotemporal dependency capturing. From the aspect of spatial relation modeling, we propose a multi-graph convolution model considering both geographic proximity and airline schedule. From the aspect of temporal dependency capturing, we propose a multi-head self-attentional mechanism that can be learned end-to-end and explicitly reason multiple kinds of temporal dependency of delay time series. We show that the joint spatial and temporal learning models yield a sum of the Kronecker product, which factors the spatiotemporal dependence into the sum of several spatial and temporal adjacency matrices. By this means, STPN allows cross-talk of spatial and temporal factors for modeling delay propagation. Furthermore, a squeeze and excitation module is added to each layer of STPN to boost meaningful spatiotemporal features. To this end, we apply STPN to multi-step ahead arrival and departure delay prediction in large-scale airport networks. To validate the effectiveness of our model, we experiment with two real-world delay datasets, including U.S and China flight delays; and we show that STPN outperforms state-of-the-art methods. In addition, counterfactuals produced by STPN show that it learns explainable delay propagation patterns.
abstract_zh: 揭秘多个机场之间的延误传播机制是精确且可解释的延误预测的基础，这对于所有航空业利益相关者的决策过程至关重要。主要挑战在于有效利用与延迟传播相关的时空依赖性和外生因素。然而，以前的工作只考虑了有限的时空模式，因素很少。为了促进更全面的延迟预测传播模型，我们提出了时空传播网络（STPN），这是一种时空可分离的图卷积网络，在时空依赖性捕获方面是新颖的。从空间关系建模的角度，我们提出了一种同时考虑地理邻近性和航班时刻表的多图卷积模型。从时间依赖性捕获方面，我们提出了一种多头自注意力机制，可以端到端学习并显式推理延迟时间序列的多种时间依赖性。我们表明，联合空间和时间学习模型产生克罗内克乘积之和，它将时空依赖性分解为多个空间和时间邻接矩阵的总和。通过这种方式，STPN 允许空间和时间因素的串扰来建模延迟传播。此外，STPN 的每一层都添加了挤压和激励模块，以增强有意义的时空特征。为此，我们将 STPN 应用于大型机场网络中的多步提前到达和出发延误预测。为了验证我们模型的有效性，我们对两个真实世界的延误数据集进行了实验，包括美国和中国的航班延误；我们证明 STPN 优于最先进的方法。此外，STPN 产生的反事实表明它学习了可解释的延迟传播模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时空传播学习的网络级航班延误预测方法，通过建模机场间的时空依赖关系提升预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未能全面捕捉航班延误传播中的时空依赖关系及外部因素，导致预测模型解释性不足且精度有限。
AI.method: 设计时空分离图卷积网络（STPN），结合多图卷积建模地理邻近性与航班时刻表，采用多头自注意力机制捕捉时间序列依赖，并通过Kronecker积分解时空关联矩阵。
AI.result: 在中美真实航班延误数据集上，STPN在多步预测任务中优于现有先进方法，且能生成可解释的延误传播反事实分析。
AI.conclusion: STPN通过显式建模时空交互机制，实现了更精准的网络级延误预测与可解释性分析，为航空决策提供支持。

motivation: 现有研究未能全面捕捉航班延误传播中的时空依赖关系及外部因素，导致预测模型解释性不足且精度有限。
method: 设计时空分离图卷积网络（STPN），结合多图卷积建模地理邻近性与航班时刻表，采用多头自注意力机制捕捉时间序列依赖，并通过Kronecker积分解时空关联矩阵。
result: 在中美真实航班延误数据集上，STPN在多步预测任务中优于现有先进方法，且能生成可解释的延误传播反事实分析。
conclusion: STPN通过显式建模时空交互机制，实现了更精准的网络级延误预测与可解释性分析，为航空决策提供支持。
search_text: Spatiotemporal Propagation Learning for Network-Wide Flight Delay Prediction 用于全网络航班延误预测的时空传播学习 Demystifying the delay propagation mechanisms among multiple airports is fundamental to precise and interpretable delay prediction, which is crucial during decision-making for all aviation industry stakeholders. The principal challenge lies in effectively leveraging the spatiotemporal dependencies and exogenous factors related to the delay propagation. However, previous works only consider limited spatiotemporal patterns with few factors. To promote more comprehensive propagation modeling for delay prediction, we propose SpatioTemporal Propagation Network (STPN), a space-time separable graph convolutional network, which is novel in spatiotemporal dependency capturing. From the aspect of spatial relation modeling, we propose a multi-graph convolution model considering both geographic proximity and airline schedule. From the aspect of temporal dependency capturing, we propose a multi-head self-attentional mechanism that can be learned end-to-end and explicitly reason multiple kinds of temporal dependency of delay time series. We show that the joint spatial and temporal learning models yield a sum of the Kronecker product, which factors the spatiotemporal dependence into the sum of several spatial and temporal adjacency matrices. By this means, STPN allows cross-talk of spatial and temporal factors for modeling delay propagation. Furthermore, a squeeze and excitation module is added to each layer of STPN to boost meaningful spatiotemporal features. To this end, we apply STPN to multi-step ahead arrival and departure delay prediction in large-scale airport networks. To validate the effectiveness of our model, we experiment with two real-world delay datasets, including U.S and China flight delays; and we show that STPN outperforms state-of-the-art methods. In addition, counterfactuals produced by STPN show that it learns explainable delay propagation patterns. 揭秘多个机场之间的延误传播机制是精确且可解释的延误预测的基础，这对于所有航空业利益相关者的决策过程至关重要。主要挑战在于有效利用与延迟传播相关的时空依赖性和外生因素。然而，以前的工作只考虑了有限的时空模式，因素很少。为了促进更全面的延迟预测传播模型，我们提出了时空传播网络（STPN），这是一种时空可分离的图卷积网络，在时空依赖性捕获方面是新颖的。从空间关系建模的角度，我们提出了一种同时考虑地理邻近性和航班时刻表的多图卷积模型。从时间依赖性捕获方面，我们提出了一种多头自注意力机制，可以端到端学习并显式推理延迟时间序列的多种时间依赖性。我们表明，联合空间和时间学习模型产生克罗内克乘积之和，它将时空依赖性分解为多个空间和时间邻接矩阵的总和。通过这种方式，STPN 允许空间和时间因素的串扰来建模延迟传播。此外，STPN 的每一层都添加了挤压和激励模块，以增强有意义的时空特征。为此，我们将 STPN 应用于大型机场网络中的多步提前到达和出发延误预测。为了验证我们模型的有效性，我们对两个真实世界的延误数据集进行了实验，包括美国和中国的航班延误；我们证明 STPN 优于最先进的方法。此外，STPN 产生的反事实表明它学习了可解释的延迟传播模式。 本文提出了一种基于时空传播学习的网络级航班延误预测方法，通过建模机场间的时空依赖关系提升预测精度。 Yuankai Wu,Hongyu Yang,Yi Lin,Hong Liu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Alice Baird,Panagiotis Tzirakis,Gauthier Gidel,Marco Jiralerspong,Eilif B. Muller,Kory Mathewson,Björn Schuller,Erik Cambria,Dacher Keltner,Alan Cowen
title: Proceedings of the ICML 2022 Expressive Vocalizations Workshop and Competition: Recognizing, Generating, and Personalizing Vocal Bursts
title_zh: ICML 2022 表达性发声研讨会和竞赛论文集：识别、生成和个性化声音突发
abstract: This is the Proceedings of the ICML Expressive Vocalization (ExVo) Competition. The ExVo competition focuses on understanding and generating vocal bursts: laughs, gasps, cries, and other non-verbal vocalizations that are central to emotional expression and communication. ExVo 2022, included three competition tracks using a large-scale dataset of 59,201 vocalizations from 1,702 speakers. The first, ExVo-MultiTask, requires participants to train a multi-task model to recognize expressed emotions and demographic traits from vocal bursts. The second, ExVo-Generate, requires participants to train a generative model that produces vocal bursts conveying ten different emotions. The third, ExVo-FewShot, requires participants to leverage few-shot learning incorporating speaker identity to train a model for the recognition of 10 emotions conveyed by vocal bursts.
summary: This is the Proceedings of the ICML Expressive Vocalization (ExVo) Competition. The ExVo competition focuses on understanding and generating vocal bursts: laughs, gasps, cries, and other non-verbal vocalizations that are central to emotional expression and communication. ExVo 2022, included three competition tracks using a large-scale dataset of 59,201 vocalizations from 1,702 speakers. The first, ExVo-MultiTask, requires participants to train a multi-task model to recognize expressed emotions and demographic traits from vocal bursts. The second, ExVo-Generate, requires participants to train a generative model that produces vocal bursts conveying ten different emotions. The third, ExVo-FewShot, requires participants to leverage few-shot learning incorporating speaker identity to train a model for the recognition of 10 emotions conveyed by vocal bursts.
abstract_zh: 这是 ICML 表达性发声 (ExVo) 比赛的记录。 ExVo 比赛的重点是理解和产生声音爆发：笑声、喘息、哭泣和其他对于情感表达和交流至关重要的非语言发声。 ExVo 2022 包括三个竞赛曲目，使用来自 1,702 名说话者的 59,201 种声音的大规模数据集。第一个是 ExVo-MultiTask，要求参与者训练一个多任务模型，以识别声音爆发中表达的情绪和人口特征。第二个是 ExVo-Generate，要求参与者训练一个生成模型，该模型可以产生传达十种不同情绪的声音爆发。第三个是 ExVo-FewShot，要求参与者利用结合说话者身份的小样本学习来训练一个模型，以识别由声音爆发传达的 10 种情绪。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了ICML 2022表达性发声（ExVo）竞赛，聚焦于识别、生成和个性化非语言性发声（如笑声、叹息等），包含三个竞赛任务。
AI.motivation: 非语言性发声在情感表达和人际沟通中具有重要作用，但相关研究仍面临情感识别、个性化生成及小样本学习等挑战。
AI.method: 竞赛包含三个赛道：1) 多任务模型识别情感与人口特征；2) 生成模型合成十种情绪发声；3) 基于说话人身份的小样本学习情绪识别。
AI.result: 提供了包含59,201个发声样本（来自1,702名说话人）的大型数据集，并评估了各赛道的参赛模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过竞赛推动了发声情感计算领域的发展，促进了多任务学习、生成模型及小样本学习方法在语音情感分析中的应用研究。

authors_text: Siyou Lin,Hongwen Zhang,Zerong Zheng,Ruizhi Shao,Yebin Liu
title: Learning Implicit Templates for Point-Based Clothed Human Modeling
title_zh: 学习基于点的穿着人体建模的隐式模板
abstract: We present FITE, a First-Implicit-Then-Explicit framework for modeling human avatars in clothing. Our framework first learns implicit surface templates representing the coarse clothing topology, and then employs the templates to guide the generation of point sets which further capture pose-dependent clothing deformations such as wrinkles. Our pipeline incorporates the merits of both implicit and explicit representations, namely, the ability to handle varying topology and the ability to efficiently capture fine details. We also propose diffused skinning to facilitate template training especially for loose clothing, and projection-based pose-encoding to extract pose information from mesh templates without predefined UV map or connectivity. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/jsnln/fite.
summary: We present FITE, a First-Implicit-Then-Explicit framework for modeling human avatars in clothing. Our framework first learns implicit surface templates representing the coarse clothing topology, and then employs the templates to guide the generation of point sets which further capture pose-dependent clothing deformations such as wrinkles. Our pipeline incorporates the merits of both implicit and explicit representations, namely, the ability to handle varying topology and the ability to efficiently capture fine details. We also propose diffused skinning to facilitate template training especially for loose clothing, and projection-based pose-encoding to extract pose information from mesh templates without predefined UV map or connectivity. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/jsnln/fite.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 FITE，一个先隐式后显式的框架，用于对服装中的人类化身进行建模。我们的框架首先学习表示粗糙服装拓扑的隐式表面模板，然后使用模板来指导点集的生成，进一步捕获与姿势相关的服装变形，例如皱纹。我们的管道结合了隐式和显式表示的优点，即处理变化拓扑的能力和有效捕获精细细节的能力。我们还提出了扩散蒙皮以促进模板训练，特别是对于宽松的衣服，以及基于投影的姿势编码以从网格模板中提取姿势信息，而无需预定义的 UV 贴图或连接性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/jsnln/fite 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FITE框架，通过结合隐式和显式表示方法，实现对穿衣人体的点云建模，以捕捉服装的拓扑结构和姿态依赖的变形细节。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理服装拓扑变化和细粒度变形（如褶皱）时存在局限，需一种兼顾拓扑灵活性与细节精度的建模方案。
AI.method: 分两阶段：首先学习隐式表面模板表示粗粒度服装拓扑，再生成点集捕捉细部变形；引入diffused skinning优化松散服装模板训练，采用基于投影的姿态编码提取网格模板的姿势信息。
AI.result: 方法在服装变形建模任务中表现出色，能有效生成具有真实褶皱细节的穿衣人体点云，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: FITE框架通过融合隐式与显式表示的优势，为穿衣人体建模提供了新思路，未来可进一步优化姿态编码与多尺度细节建模。

authors_text: Suhwan Cho,Heansung Lee,Minhyeok Lee,Chaewon Park,Sungjun Jang,Minjung Kim,Sangyoun Lee
title: Tackling Background Distraction in Video Object Segmentation
title_zh: 解决视频对象分割中的背景干扰问题
abstract: Semi-supervised video object segmentation (VOS) aims to densely track certain designated objects in videos. One of the main challenges in this task is the existence of background distractors that appear similar to the target objects. We propose three novel strategies to suppress such distractors: 1) a spatio-temporally diversified template construction scheme to obtain generalized properties of the target objects; 2) a learnable distance-scoring function to exclude spatially-distant distractors by exploiting the temporal consistency between two consecutive frames; 3) swap-and-attach augmentation to force each object to have unique features by providing training samples containing entangled objects. On all public benchmark datasets, our model achieves a comparable performance to contemporary state-of-the-art approaches, even with real-time performance. Qualitative results also demonstrate the superiority of our approach over existing methods. We believe our approach will be widely used for future VOS research.
summary: Semi-supervised video object segmentation (VOS) aims to densely track certain designated objects in videos. One of the main challenges in this task is the existence of background distractors that appear similar to the target objects. We propose three novel strategies to suppress such distractors: 1) a spatio-temporally diversified template construction scheme to obtain generalized properties of the target objects; 2) a learnable distance-scoring function to exclude spatially-distant distractors by exploiting the temporal consistency between two consecutive frames; 3) swap-and-attach augmentation to force each object to have unique features by providing training samples containing entangled objects. On all public benchmark datasets, our model achieves a comparable performance to contemporary state-of-the-art approaches, even with real-time performance. Qualitative results also demonstrate the superiority of our approach over existing methods. We believe our approach will be widely used for future VOS research.
abstract_zh: 半监督视频对象分割（VOS）旨在密集跟踪视频中的某些指定对象。这项任务的主要挑战之一是存在与目标对象相似的背景干扰物。我们提出了三种新颖的策略来抑制此类干扰：1）时空多样化的模板构造方案以获得目标对象的广义属性； 2）可学习的距离评分函数，通过利用两个连续帧之间的时间一致性来排除空间上距离较远的干扰因素； 3）交换并附加增强，通过提供包含纠缠对象的训练样本来强制每个对象具有独特的特征。在所有公共基准数据集上，我们的模型实现了与当代最先进方法相当的性能，即使是实时性能也是如此。定性结果还证明了我们的方法相对于现有方法的优越性。我们相信我们的方法将广泛用于未来的 VOS 研究。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决视频对象分割中的背景干扰问题，提出三种新策略以提升分割准确性。
AI.motivation: 半监督视频对象分割面临背景干扰物与目标对象相似的挑战，导致分割结果不准确。
AI.method: 提出三种方法：1）时空多样化模板构建；2）可学习距离评分函数；3）交换附加增强。
AI.result: 模型在公开数据集上表现与最先进方法相当，且具备实时性，定性结果优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为未来视频对象分割研究提供了有效解决方案，具有广泛应用前景。

authors_text: Ollie Ballinger
title: Insurgency as Complex Network: Image Co-Appearance and Hierarchy in the PKK
title_zh: 叛乱作为复杂的网络：库尔德工人党中的形象共现和等级制度
abstract: Despite a growing recognition of the importance of insurgent group structure on conflict outcomes, there is very little empirical research thereon. Though this problem is rooted in the inaccessibility of data on militant group structure, insurgents frequently publish large volumes of image data on the internet. In this paper, I develop a new methodology that leverages this abundant but underutilized source of data by automating the creation of a social network graph based on co-appearance in photographs using deep learning. Using a trove of 19,115 obituary images published online by the PKK, a Kurdish militant group in Turkey, I demonstrate that an individual's centrality in the resulting co-appearance network is closely correlated with their rank in the insurgent group.
summary: Despite a growing recognition of the importance of insurgent group structure on conflict outcomes, there is very little empirical research thereon. Though this problem is rooted in the inaccessibility of data on militant group structure, insurgents frequently publish large volumes of image data on the internet. In this paper, I develop a new methodology that leverages this abundant but underutilized source of data by automating the creation of a social network graph based on co-appearance in photographs using deep learning. Using a trove of 19,115 obituary images published online by the PKK, a Kurdish militant group in Turkey, I demonstrate that an individual's centrality in the resulting co-appearance network is closely correlated with their rank in the insurgent group.
abstract_zh: 尽管人们越来越认识到叛乱团体结构对冲突结果的重要性，但对此的实证研究却很少。尽管这个问题的根源在于武装团体结构的数据无法获取，但叛乱分子经常在互联网上发布大量图像数据。在本文中，我开发了一种新方法，通过使用深度学习自动创建基于照片中共同出现的社交网络图，从而利用这种丰富但未充分利用的数据源。我利用土耳其库尔德武装组织库尔德工人党 (PKK) 在网上发布的 19,115 张讣告图片，证明了个人在共同出现网络中的中心地位与其在叛乱组织中的地位密切相关。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析PKK发布的讣告图像中的人员共现关系，构建社交网络以推断叛乱组织的等级结构。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对叛乱组织结构的实证分析，而图像数据作为未被充分利用的信息源，可弥补传统数据获取困难的问题。
AI.method: 利用深度学习技术自动识别图像中人物并构建共现网络，通过分析节点中心性揭示组织层级关系。
AI.result: 个体在共现网络中的中心性与其实际职务等级呈显著正相关，验证了图像分析推断组织结构的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 图像共现分析为研究叛乱组织结构提供了可行的技术路径，拓展了冲突研究的数据来源与方法论工具。

authors_text: Carlo Mazzola,Francesco Rea,Alessandra Sciutti
title: Shared perception is different from individual perception: a new look on context dependency
title_zh: 共享感知不同于个人感知：对上下文依赖的新看法
comment: 14 pages, 9 figures, 1 table. IEEE Transactions on Cognitive and Developmental Systems, 2022
comments: 14 pages, 9 figures, 1 table. IEEE Transactions on Cognitive and Developmental Systems, 2022
abstract: Human perception is based on unconscious inference, where sensory input integrates with prior information. This phenomenon, known as context dependency, helps in facing the uncertainty of the external world with predictions built upon previous experience. On the other hand, human perceptual processes are inherently shaped by social interactions. However, how the mechanisms of context dependency are affected is to date unknown. If using previous experience - priors - is beneficial in individual settings, it could represent a problem in social scenarios where other agents might not have the same priors, causing a perceptual misalignment on the shared environment. The present study addresses this question. We studied context dependency in an interactive setting with a humanoid robot iCub that acted as a stimuli demonstrator. Participants reproduced the lengths shown by the robot in two conditions: one with iCub behaving socially and another with iCub acting as a mechanical arm. The different behavior of the robot significantly affected the use of prior in perception. Moreover, the social robot positively impacted perceptual performances by enhancing accuracy and reducing participants overall perceptual errors. Finally, the observed phenomenon has been modelled following a Bayesian approach to deepen and explore a new concept of shared perception.
summary: Human perception is based on unconscious inference, where sensory input integrates with prior information. This phenomenon, known as context dependency, helps in facing the uncertainty of the external world with predictions built upon previous experience. On the other hand, human perceptual processes are inherently shaped by social interactions. However, how the mechanisms of context dependency are affected is to date unknown. If using previous experience - priors - is beneficial in individual settings, it could represent a problem in social scenarios where other agents might not have the same priors, causing a perceptual misalignment on the shared environment. The present study addresses this question. We studied context dependency in an interactive setting with a humanoid robot iCub that acted as a stimuli demonstrator. Participants reproduced the lengths shown by the robot in two conditions: one with iCub behaving socially and another with iCub acting as a mechanical arm. The different behavior of the robot significantly affected the use of prior in perception. Moreover, the social robot positively impacted perceptual performances by enhancing accuracy and reducing participants overall perceptual errors. Finally, the observed phenomenon has been modelled following a Bayesian approach to deepen and explore a new concept of shared perception.
abstract_zh: 人类感知基于无意识推理，其中感官输入与先验信息相结合。这种现象被称为上下文依赖，有助于通过基于先前经验的预测来面对外部世界的不确定性。另一方面，人类的感知过程本质上是由社会互动塑造的。然而，上下文依赖机制如何受到影响迄今为止尚不清楚。如果使用以前的经验（先验）在个人设置中是有益的，那么它可能代表社交场景中的一个问题，其中其他智能体可能没有相同的先验，从而导致共享环境中的感知失调。本研究解决了这个问题。我们使用人形机器人 iCub 作为刺激演示器，研究了交互环境中的上下文依赖性。参与者在两种情况下重现了机器人显示的长度：一种是 iCub 进行社交行为，另一种是 iCub 充当机械臂。机器人的不同行为显着影响了感知中先验的使用。此外，社交机器人通过提高准确性和减少参与者的整体感知错误，对感知表现产生积极影响。最后，观察到的现象按照贝叶斯方法进行建模，以深化和探索共享感知的新概念。

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨共享感知与个体感知在上下文依赖性上的差异，研究社会互动如何影响人类感知机制。
AI.motivation: 虽然上下文依赖性有助于个体应对不确定性，但在社会场景中，他人可能具有不同先验信息，导致感知不一致，需明确社会互动对此的影响机制。
AI.method: 通过人形机器人iCub作为刺激演示者，让参与者在两种条件下（社会行为与机械臂行为）复制机器人展示的长度，并结合贝叶斯模型分析数据。
AI.result: 机器人行为显著影响先验信息的使用，社会机器人提升感知准确性并减少错误，贝叶斯模型成功模拟了共享感知现象。
AI.conclusion: 社会互动改变了上下文依赖机制，共享感知需引入新模型，贝叶斯框架为理解群体感知提供了理论基础。

Finally, the observed phenomenon has been modelled following a Bayesian approach to deepen and explore a new concept of shared perception. 人类感知基于无意识推理，其中感官输入与先验信息相结合。这种现象被称为上下文依赖，有助于通过基于先前经验的预测来面对外部世界的不确定性。另一方面，人类的感知过程本质上是由社会互动塑造的。然而，上下文依赖机制如何受到影响迄今为止尚不清楚。如果使用以前的经验（先验）在个人设置中是有益的，那么它可能代表社交场景中的一个问题，其中其他智能体可能没有相同的先验，从而导致共享环境中的感知失调。本研究解决了这个问题。我们使用人形机器人 iCub 作为刺激演示器，研究了交互环境中的上下文依赖性。参与者在两种情况下重现了机器人显示的长度：一种是 iCub 进行社交行为，另一种是 iCub 充当机械臂。机器人的不同行为显着影响了感知中先验的使用。此外，社交机器人通过提高准确性和减少参与者的整体感知错误，对感知表现产生积极影响。最后，观察到的现象按照贝叶斯方法进行建模，以深化和探索共享感知的新概念。 该论文探讨共享感知与个体感知在上下文依赖性上的差异，研究社会互动如何影响人类感知机制。 Carlo Mazzola,Francesco Rea,Alessandra Sciutti cs.RO

authors_text: Chenyang Qi,Junming Chen,Xin Yang,Qifeng Chen
title: Real-time Streaming Video Denoising with Bidirectional Buffers
title_zh: 使用双向缓冲区的实时流视频去噪
comment: Accepted to ACM MM 2022; Github link: https://github.com/ChenyangQiQi/BSVD ;
comments: Accepted to ACM MM 2022; Github link: https://github.com/ChenyangQiQi/BSVD ;
abstract: Video streams are delivered continuously to save the cost of storage and device memory. Real-time denoising algorithms are typically adopted on the user device to remove the noise involved during the shooting and transmission of video streams. However, sliding-window-based methods feed multiple input frames for a single output and lack computation efficiency. Recent multi-output inference works propagate the bidirectional temporal feature with a parallel or recurrent framework, which either suffers from performance drops on the temporal edges of clips or can not achieve online inference. In this paper, we propose a Bidirectional Streaming Video Denoising (BSVD) framework, to achieve high-fidelity real-time denoising for streaming videos with both past and future temporal receptive fields. The bidirectional temporal fusion for online inference is considered not applicable in the MoViNet. However, we introduce a novel Bidirectional Buffer Block as the core module of our BSVD, which makes it possible during our pipeline-style inference. In addition, our method is concise and flexible to be utilized in both non-blind and blind video denoising. We compare our model with various state-of-the-art video denoising models qualitatively and quantitatively on synthetic and real noise. Our method outperforms previous methods in terms of restoration fidelity and runtime. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/ChenyangQiQi/BSVD
summary: Video streams are delivered continuously to save the cost of storage and device memory. Real-time denoising algorithms are typically adopted on the user device to remove the noise involved during the shooting and transmission of video streams. However, sliding-window-based methods feed multiple input frames for a single output and lack computation efficiency. Recent multi-output inference works propagate the bidirectional temporal feature with a parallel or recurrent framework, which either suffers from performance drops on the temporal edges of clips or can not achieve online inference. In this paper, we propose a Bidirectional Streaming Video Denoising (BSVD) framework, to achieve high-fidelity real-time denoising for streaming videos with both past and future temporal receptive fields. The bidirectional temporal fusion for online inference is considered not applicable in the MoViNet. However, we introduce a novel Bidirectional Buffer Block as the core module of our BSVD, which makes it possible during our pipeline-style inference. In addition, our method is concise and flexible to be utilized in both non-blind and blind video denoising. We compare our model with various state-of-the-art video denoising models qualitatively and quantitatively on synthetic and real noise. Our method outperforms previous methods in terms of restoration fidelity and runtime. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/ChenyangQiQi/BSVD
abstract_zh: 视频流持续传输以节省存储和设备内存成本。用户设备上通常采用实时去噪算法来消除视频流拍摄和传输过程中涉及的噪声。然而，基于滑动窗口的方法为单个输出提供多个输入帧，并且缺乏计算效率。最近的多输出推理工作使用并行或循环框架传播双向时间特征，该框架要么遭受剪辑时间边缘的性能下降，要么无法实现在线推理。在本文中，我们提出了一种双向流视频去噪（BSVD）框架，以实现具有过去和未来时间感受野的流视频的高保真实时去噪。用于在线推理的双向时间融合被认为不适用于 MoViNet。然而，我们引入了一种新颖的双向缓冲区块作为 BSVD 的核心模块，这使得我们的管道式推理成为可能。此外，我们的方法简洁灵活，可用于非盲和盲视频去噪。我们将我们的模型与各种最先进的视频去噪模型在合成噪声和真实噪声上进行定性和定量比较。我们的方法在恢复保真度和运行时间方面优于以前的方法。我们的源代码公开在 https://github.com/ChenyangQiQi/BSVD

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双向缓冲区的实时流视频去噪框架（BSVD），通过结合过去和未来的时序信息提升去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 传统滑动窗口方法计算效率低，而现有双向推理方法在时序边缘性能下降或无法实现在线推理，需解决实时流视频去噪中的时序信息利用与计算效率矛盾。
AI.method: 设计双向缓冲区模块（Bidirectional Buffer Block），在流式推理中实现双向时序特征融合，支持非盲与盲去噪，并采用管道式推理架构提升效率。
AI.result: 在合成与真实噪声数据集上，BSVD在恢复保真度和运行时延指标上优于现有先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: BSVD框架通过双向缓冲机制有效解决了流视频去噪中的时序边缘问题，实现了高保真实时去噪，具有广泛的应用潜力。

Real-time denoising algorithms are typically adopted on the user device to remove the noise involved during the shooting and transmission of video streams. However, sliding-window-based methods feed multiple input frames for a single output and lack computation efficiency. Recent multi-output inference works propagate the bidirectional temporal feature with a parallel or recurrent framework, which either suffers from performance drops on the temporal edges of clips or can not achieve online inference. In this paper, we propose a Bidirectional Streaming Video Denoising (BSVD) framework, to achieve high-fidelity real-time denoising for streaming videos with both past and future temporal receptive fields. The bidirectional temporal fusion for online inference is considered not applicable in the MoViNet. However, we introduce a novel Bidirectional Buffer Block as the core module of our BSVD, which makes it possible during our pipeline-style inference. In addition, our method is concise and flexible to be utilized in both non-blind and blind video denoising. We compare our model with various state-of-the-art video denoising models qualitatively and quantitatively on synthetic and real noise. Our method outperforms previous methods in terms of restoration fidelity and runtime. authors_text: Lu Zeng,Sree Hari Krishnan Parthasarathi,Yuzong Liu,Alex Escott,Santosh Kumar Cheekatmalla,Nikko Strom,Shiv Vitaladevuni
title: Sub 8-Bit Quantization of Streaming Keyword Spotting Models for Embedded Chipsets
title_zh: 嵌入式芯片组的流式关键字识别模型的低于 8 位量化
abstract: We propose a novel 2-stage sub 8-bit quantization aware training algorithm for all components of a 250K parameter feedforward, streaming, state-free keyword spotting model. For the 1st-stage, we adapt a recently proposed quantization technique using a non-linear transformation with tanh(.) on dense layer weights. In the 2nd-stage, we use linear quantization methods on the rest of the network, including other parameters (bias, gain, batchnorm), inputs, and activations. We conduct large scale experiments, training on 26,000 hours of de-identified production, far-field and near-field audio data (evaluating on 4,000 hours of data). We organize our results in two embedded chipset settings: a) with commodity ARM NEON instruction set and 8-bit containers, we present accuracy, CPU, and memory results using sub 8-bit weights (4, 5, 8-bit) and 8-bit quantization of rest of the network; b) with off-the-shelf neural network accelerators, for a range of weight bit widths (1 and 5-bit), while presenting accuracy results, we project reduction in memory utilization. In both configurations, our results show that the proposed algorithm can achieve: a) parity with a full floating point model's operating point on a detection error tradeoff (DET) curve in terms of false detection rate (FDR) at false rejection rate (FRR); b) significant reduction in compute and memory, yielding up to 3 times improvement in CPU consumption and more than 4 times improvement in memory consumption.
summary: We propose a novel 2-stage sub 8-bit quantization aware training algorithm for all components of a 250K parameter feedforward, streaming, state-free keyword spotting model. For the 1st-stage, we adapt a recently proposed quantization technique using a non-linear transformation with tanh(.) on dense layer weights. In the 2nd-stage, we use linear quantization methods on the rest of the network, including other parameters (bias, gain, batchnorm), inputs, and activations. We conduct large scale experiments, training on 26,000 hours of de-identified production, far-field and near-field audio data (evaluating on 4,000 hours of data). We organize our results in two embedded chipset settings: a) with commodity ARM NEON instruction set and 8-bit containers, we present accuracy, CPU, and memory results using sub 8-bit weights (4, 5, 8-bit) and 8-bit quantization of rest of the network; b) with off-the-shelf neural network accelerators, for a range of weight bit widths (1 and 5-bit), while presenting accuracy results, we project reduction in memory utilization. In both configurations, our results show that the proposed algorithm can achieve: a) parity with a full floating point model's operating point on a detection error tradeoff (DET) curve in terms of false detection rate (FDR) at false rejection rate (FRR); b) significant reduction in compute and memory, yielding up to 3 times improvement in CPU consumption and more than 4 times improvement in memory consumption.
abstract_zh: 我们针对 250K 参数前馈、流式传输、无状态关键字识别模型的所有组件提出了一种新颖的 2 阶段亚 8 位量化感知训练算法。对于第一阶段，我们采用了最近提出的量化技术，在密集层权重上使用 tanh(.) 进行非线性变换。在第二阶段，我们对网络的其余部分使用线性量化方法，包括其他参数（偏差、增益、batchnorm）、输入和激活。我们进行大规模实验，对 26,000 小时的去识别化制作、远场和近场音频数据进行训练（对 4,000 小时的数据进行评估）。我们在两种嵌入式芯片组设置中组织我们的结果：a）使用商用 ARM NEON 指令集和 8 位容器，我们使用低于 8 位权重（4、5、8 位）和网络其余部分的 8 位量化来呈现准确性、CPU 和内存结果； b) 使用现成的神经网络加速器，对于一系列权重位宽度（1 和 5 位），在提供准确性结果的同时，我们预计会减少内存利用率。在这两种配置中，我们的结果表明，所提出的算法可以实现：a）在错误检测率（FDR）和错误拒绝率（FRR）方面，与检测误差权衡（DET）曲线上的全浮点模型工作点相同； b) 计算和内存显着减少，CPU 消耗提高了 3 倍，内存消耗提高了 4 倍以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段子8位量化算法，用于优化流式关键词识别模型在嵌入式芯片上的部署，以降低计算和内存消耗。
AI.motivation: 嵌入式设备资源有限，需在保持模型精度的同时显著减少计算量和内存占用，以实现高效实时关键词识别。
AI.method: 采用两阶段量化感知训练：第一阶段对全连接层权重使用tanh非线性变换量化，第二阶段对网络其他参数（偏置、增益、归一化等）及输入激活进行线性量化。
AI.result: 在ARM NEON和神经网络加速器两种嵌入式配置下，模型在检测误差折衷曲线（DET）上达到浮点模型精度水平，CPU消耗降低3倍，内存消耗降低4倍以上。
AI.conclusion: 该量化算法有效平衡了模型精度与资源消耗，为嵌入式设备部署轻量级关键词识别系统提供了可行方案。

We conduct large scale experiments, training on 26,000 hours of de-identified production, far-field and near-field audio data (evaluating on 4,000 hours of data). In both configurations, our results show that the proposed algorithm can achieve: a) parity with a full floating point model's operating point on a detection error tradeoff (DET) curve in terms of false detection rate (FDR) at false rejection rate (FRR); b) significant reduction in compute and memory, yielding up to 3 times improvement in CPU consumption and more than 4 times improvement in memory consumption. 我们针对 250K 参数前馈、流式传输、无状态关键字识别模型的所有组件提出了一种新颖的 2 阶段亚 8 位量化感知训练算法。对于第一阶段，我们采用了最近提出的量化技术，在密集层权重上使用 tanh(.) 进行非线性变换。在第二阶段，我们对网络的其余部分使用线性量化方法，包括其他参数（偏差、增益、batchnorm）、输入和激活。我们进行大规模实验，对 26,000 小时的去识别化制作、远场和近场音频数据进行训练（对 4,000 小时的数据进行评估）。我们在两种嵌入式芯片组设置中组织我们的结果：a）使用商用 ARM NEON 指令集和 8 位容器，我们使用低于 8 位权重（4、5、8 位）和网络其余部分的 8 位量化来呈现准确性、CPU 和内存结果； b) 使用现成的神经网络加速器，对于一系列权重位宽度（1 和 5 位），在提供准确性结果的同时，我们预计会减少内存利用率。在这两种配置中，我们的结果表明，所提出的算法可以实现：a）在错误检测率（FDR）和错误拒绝率（FRR）方面，与检测误差权衡（DET）曲线上的全浮点模型工作点相同； b) 计算和内存显着减少，CPU 消耗提高了 3 倍，内存消耗提高了 4 倍以上。 本文提出一种两阶段子8位量化算法，用于优化流式关键词识别模型在嵌入式芯片上的部署，以降低计算和内存消耗。 Lu Zeng,Sree Hari Krishnan Parthasarathi,Yuzong Liu,Alex Escott,Santosh Kumar Cheekatmalla,Nikko Strom,Shiv Vitaladevuni cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Md Jobair Hossain Faruk,Maria Valero,Hossain Shahriar
title: An Investigation on Non-Invasive Brain-Computer Interfaces: Emotiv Epoc+ Neuroheadset and Its Effectiveness
title_zh: 非侵入式脑机接口研究：Emotiv Epoc+ Neuroheadset 及其有效性
comment: ef:2021 IEEE 45th Annual Computers, Software, and Applications Conference (COMPSAC)
comments: ef:2021 IEEE 45th Annual Computers, Software, and Applications Conference (COMPSAC)
abstract: In this study, we illustrate the progress of BCI research and present scores of unveiled contemporary approaches. First, we explore a decoding natural speech approach that is designed to decode human speech directly from the human brain onto a digital screen introduced by Facebook Reality Lab and University of California San Francisco. Then, we study a recently presented visionary project to control the human brain using Brain-Machine Interfaces (BMI) approach. We also investigate well-known electroencephalography (EEG) based Emotiv Epoc+ Neuroheadset to identify six emotional parameters including engagement, excitement, focus, stress, relaxation, and interest using brain signals by experimenting the neuroheadset among three human subjects where we utilize two supervised learning classifiers, Naive Bayes and Linear Regression to show the accuracy and competency of the Epoc+ device and its associated applications in neurotechnological research. We present experimental studies and the demonstration indicates 69% and 62% improved accuracy for the aforementioned classifiers respectively in reading the performance matrices of the participants. We envision that non-invasive, insertable, and low-cost BCI approaches shall be the focal point for not only an alternative for patients with physical paralysis but also understanding the brain that would pave us to access and control the memories and brain somewhere very near.
summary: In this study, we illustrate the progress of BCI research and present scores of unveiled contemporary approaches. First, we explore a decoding natural speech approach that is designed to decode human speech directly from the human brain onto a digital screen introduced by Facebook Reality Lab and University of California San Francisco. Then, we study a recently presented visionary project to control the human brain using Brain-Machine Interfaces (BMI) approach. We also investigate well-known electroencephalography (EEG) based Emotiv Epoc+ Neuroheadset to identify six emotional parameters including engagement, excitement, focus, stress, relaxation, and interest using brain signals by experimenting the neuroheadset among three human subjects where we utilize two supervised learning classifiers, Naive Bayes and Linear Regression to show the accuracy and competency of the Epoc+ device and its associated applications in neurotechnological research. We present experimental studies and the demonstration indicates 69% and 62% improved accuracy for the aforementioned classifiers respectively in reading the performance matrices of the participants. We envision that non-invasive, insertable, and low-cost BCI approaches shall be the focal point for not only an alternative for patients with physical paralysis but also understanding the brain that would pave us to access and control the memories and brain somewhere very near.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们展示了 BCI 研究的进展，并展示了许多已公开的当代方法。首先，我们探索一种自然语音解码方法，该方法旨在将人类大脑中的人类语音直接解码到由 Facebook 现实实验室和加州大学旧金山分校推出的数字屏幕上。然后，我们研究了最近提出的一个利用脑机接口（BMI）方法控制人脑的富有远见的项目。我们还研究了著名的基于脑电图 (EEG) 的 Emotiv Epoc+ Neuroheadset，通过在三名人类受试者中实验神经耳机，使用大脑信号识别六种情绪参数，包括参与、兴奋、专注、压力、放松和兴趣，其中我们利用两个监督学习分类器、朴素贝叶斯和线性回归来展示 Epoc+ 设备及其在神经技术研究中的相关应用的准确性和能力。我们提出了实验研究，演示表明上述分类器在读取参与者的表现矩阵方面的准确度分别提高了 69% 和 62%。我们设想，非侵入性、可插入且低成本的脑机接口方法不仅将成为身体瘫痪患者的替代方案，而且将成为了解大脑的焦点，为我们访问和控制附近的记忆和大脑铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了非侵入式脑机接口设备Emotiv Epoc+在通过脑电图（EEG）识别六种情绪参数（如专注、压力、兴趣等）方面的有效性，并比较了两种监督学习分类器的性能。
AI.motivation: 探索非侵入式、低成本的脑机接口（BCI）技术，为瘫痪患者提供替代方案，并推动对大脑功能的理解与控制技术的发展。
AI.method: 使用Emotiv Epoc+神经头戴设备采集三名受试者的脑电信号，通过Naive Bayes和线性回归分类器识别情绪参数，并对比分类器的准确率。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，Naive Bayes分类器和线性回归分类器在情绪识别任务中分别达到69%和62%的准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: 非侵入式BCI技术（如Emotiv Epoc+）在情绪识别和神经科学研究中具有潜力，未来可能成为瘫痪患者辅助工具及大脑记忆控制的关键技术方向。

authors_text: Seong-A Park,Hyung-Chul Lee,Chul-Woo Jung,Hyun-Lim Yang
title: Attention mechanisms for physiological signal deep learning: which attention should we take?
title_zh: 生理信号深度学习的注意力机制：我们应该注意哪些？
abstract: Attention mechanisms are widely used to dramatically improve deep learning model performance in various fields. However, their general ability to improve the performance of physiological signal deep learning model is immature. In this study, we experimentally analyze four attention mechanisms (e.g., squeeze-and-excitation, non-local, convolutional block attention module, and multi-head self-attention) and three convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures (e.g., VGG, ResNet, and Inception) for two representative physiological signal prediction tasks: the classification for predicting hypotension and the regression for predicting cardiac output (CO). We evaluated multiple combinations for performance and convergence of physiological signal deep learning model. Accordingly, the CNN models with the spatial attention mechanism showed the best performance in the classification problem, whereas the channel attention mechanism achieved the lowest error in the regression problem. Moreover, the performance and convergence of the CNN models with attention mechanisms were better than stand-alone self-attention models in both problems. Hence, we verified that convolutional operation and attention mechanisms are complementary and provide faster convergence time, despite the stand-alone self-attention models requiring fewer parameters.
summary: Attention mechanisms are widely used to dramatically improve deep learning model performance in various fields. However, their general ability to improve the performance of physiological signal deep learning model is immature. In this study, we experimentally analyze four attention mechanisms (e.g., squeeze-and-excitation, non-local, convolutional block attention module, and multi-head self-attention) and three convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures (e.g., VGG, ResNet, and Inception) for two representative physiological signal prediction tasks: the classification for predicting hypotension and the regression for predicting cardiac output (CO). We evaluated multiple combinations for performance and convergence of physiological signal deep learning model. Accordingly, the CNN models with the spatial attention mechanism showed the best performance in the classification problem, whereas the channel attention mechanism achieved the lowest error in the regression problem. Moreover, the performance and convergence of the CNN models with attention mechanisms were better than stand-alone self-attention models in both problems. Hence, we verified that convolutional operation and attention mechanisms are complementary and provide faster convergence time, despite the stand-alone self-attention models requiring fewer parameters.
abstract_zh: 注意力机制被广泛用于显着提高各个领域的深度学习模型性能。然而，他们提高生理信号深度学习模型性能的总体能力还不成熟。在本研究中，我们针对两个代表性的生理信号预测任务：预测低血压的分类和预测心输出量（CO）的回归，实验分析了四种注意力机制（例如，挤压和激励、非局部、卷积块注意力模块和多头自注意力）和三种卷积神经网络（CNN）架构（例如，VGG、ResNet和Inception）。我们评估了生理信号深度学习模型的性能和收敛性的多种组合。因此，具有空间注意力机制的CNN模型在分类问题中表现出最好的性能，而通道注意力机制在回归问题中实现了最低的误差。此外，在这两个问题上，具有注意力机制的 CNN 模型的性能和收敛性均优于独立的自注意力模型。因此，我们验证了卷积运算和注意力机制是互补的，并且提供更快的收敛时间，尽管独立的自注意力模型需要更少的参数。

AI.tldr: 实验分析四种注意力机制与三种CNN架构在生理信号预测任务中的效果，确定最优组合。
AI.motivation: 尽管注意力机制在多个领域有效，但其在生理信号深度学习中的效果尚未成熟，需验证不同机制对模型性能的影响。
AI.method: 实验比较四种注意力机制与三种CNN架构在低血压分类和心输出量回归任务中的性能及收敛情况。
AI.result: 空间注意力提升分类准确率，通道注意力降低回归误差，且结合CNN的注意力模型收敛更快。
AI.conclusion: 卷积操作与注意力机制互补，提升模型性能及收敛速度，优于参数更少的自注意力模型。

ai_content.tldr: 实验分析四种注意力机制与三种CNN架构在生理信号预测任务中的效果，确定最优组合。

authors_text: Eran Vertzberger,Itzik Klein
title: Adaptive Attitude Estimation Using a Hybrid Model-Learning Approach
title_zh: 使用混合模型学习方法的自适应态度估计
abstract: Attitude determination using the smartphone's inertial sensors poses a major challenge due to the sensor low-performance grade and variate nature of the walking pedestrian. In this paper, data-driven techniques are employed to address that challenge. To that end, a hybrid deep learning and model based solution for attitude estimation is proposed. Here, classical model based equations are applied to form an adaptive complementary filter structure. Instead of using constant or model based adaptive weights, the accelerometer weights in each axis are determined by a unique neural network. The performance of the proposed hybrid approach is evaluated relative to popular model based approaches using experimental data.
summary: Attitude determination using the smartphone's inertial sensors poses a major challenge due to the sensor low-performance grade and variate nature of the walking pedestrian. In this paper, data-driven techniques are employed to address that challenge. To that end, a hybrid deep learning and model based solution for attitude estimation is proposed. Here, classical model based equations are applied to form an adaptive complementary filter structure. Instead of using constant or model based adaptive weights, the accelerometer weights in each axis are determined by a unique neural network. The performance of the proposed hybrid approach is evaluated relative to popular model based approaches using experimental data.
abstract_zh: 由于传感器的低性能等级和步行行人的多变性质，使用智能手机惯性传感器进行姿态确定提出了重大挑战。在本文中，采用数据驱动技术来应对这一挑战。为此，提出了一种混合深度学习和基于模型的态度估计解决方案。这里，应用基于经典模型的方程来形成自适应互补滤波器结构。每个轴上的加速度计权重由独特的神经网络确定，而不是使用基于常数或模型的自适应权重。使用实验数据相对于流行的基于模型的方法来评估所提出的混合方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种混合模型学习方法进行自适应姿态估计，以解决智能手机惯性传感器在行人导航中的精度问题。
AI.motivation: 智能手机惯性传感器性能有限且行人运动模式多变，导致传统模型方法在姿态估计中存在较大误差，需寻求更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合经典模型方程构建自适应互补滤波器，利用独特神经网络动态调整加速度计各轴权重，替代传统固定或模型自适应权重。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该混合方法在姿态估计精度上优于传统模型方法，尤其在复杂运动场景下表现更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 混合模型-学习方法有效融合了模型先验知识与数据驱动优势，在复杂环境下提升姿态估计精度，为低性能传感器应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Boming Zhao,Bangbang Yang,Zhenyang Li,Zuoyue Li,Guofeng Zhang,Jiashu Zhao,Dawei Yin,Zhaopeng Cui,Hujun Bao
title: Factorized and Controllable Neural Re-Rendering of Outdoor Scene for Photo Extrapolation
title_zh: 用于照片外推的室外场景分解且可控的神经重新渲染
comment: Accepted to ACM Multimedia 2022. Project Page: https://zju3dv.github.io/neural_outdoor_rerender/
comments: Accepted to ACM Multimedia 2022. Project Page: https://zju3dv.github.io/neural_outdoor_rerender/
abstract: Expanding an existing tourist photo from a partially captured scene to a full scene is one of the desired experiences for photography applications. Although photo extrapolation has been well studied, it is much more challenging to extrapolate a photo (i.e., selfie) from a narrow field of view to a wider one while maintaining a similar visual style. In this paper, we propose a factorized neural re-rendering model to produce photorealistic novel views from cluttered outdoor Internet photo collections, which enables the applications including controllable scene re-rendering, photo extrapolation and even extrapolated 3D photo generation. Specifically, we first develop a novel factorized re-rendering pipeline to handle the ambiguity in the decomposition of geometry, appearance and illumination. We also propose a composited training strategy to tackle the unexpected occlusion in Internet images. Moreover, to enhance photo-realism when extrapolating tourist photographs, we propose a novel realism augmentation process to complement appearance details, which automatically propagates the texture details from a narrow captured photo to the extrapolated neural rendered image. The experiments and photo editing examples on outdoor scenes demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed method in both photo-realism and downstream applications.
summary: Expanding an existing tourist photo from a partially captured scene to a full scene is one of the desired experiences for photography applications. Although photo extrapolation has been well studied, it is much more challenging to extrapolate a photo (i.e., selfie) from a narrow field of view to a wider one while maintaining a similar visual style. In this paper, we propose a factorized neural re-rendering model to produce photorealistic novel views from cluttered outdoor Internet photo collections, which enables the applications including controllable scene re-rendering, photo extrapolation and even extrapolated 3D photo generation. Specifically, we first develop a novel factorized re-rendering pipeline to handle the ambiguity in the decomposition of geometry, appearance and illumination. We also propose a composited training strategy to tackle the unexpected occlusion in Internet images. Moreover, to enhance photo-realism when extrapolating tourist photographs, we propose a novel realism augmentation process to complement appearance details, which automatically propagates the texture details from a narrow captured photo to the extrapolated neural rendered image. The experiments and photo editing examples on outdoor scenes demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed method in both photo-realism and downstream applications.
abstract_zh: 将现有的旅游照片从部分捕捉的场景扩展到完整的场景是摄影应用程序期望的体验之一。尽管照片外推法已经得到了很好的研究，但在保持相似的视觉风格的同时将照片（即自拍照）从狭窄的视野外推到更宽的视野更具挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种因式分解神经重新渲染模型，可以从杂乱的户外互联网照片集中生成逼真的新颖视图，从而实现包括可控场景重新渲染、照片外推甚至外推 3D 照片生成在内的应用。具体来说，我们首先开发一种新颖的分解重新渲染管道来处理几何、外观和照明分解中的歧义。我们还提出了一种综合训练策略来解决互联网图像中的意外遮挡问题。此外，为了在推断旅游照片时增强照片真实感，我们提出了一种新颖的真实感增强过程来补充外观细节，该过程自动将纹理细节从狭窄捕获的照片传播到推断的神经渲染图像。户外场景的实验和照片编辑示例证明了我们提出的方法在照片写实和下游应用中的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可分解和可控的神经重渲染模型，用于从狭窄视角扩展户外场景照片至更宽视角，同时保持视觉风格。
AI.motivation: 现有照片扩展技术难以在保持视觉风格的同时，将狭窄视角的自拍扩展为更宽视角的户外场景，且需处理几何、外观和光照的分解模糊性及网络图像中的遮挡问题。
AI.method: 设计分阶段重渲染流水线分解几何、外观与光照；采用组合训练策略应对遮挡；提出真实感增强过程，自动传播纹理细节至扩展图像。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在户外场景的图像真实感和下游应用（如可控重渲染、3D照片生成）中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过分解渲染与真实感增强技术，本文方法有效解决了复杂户外场景的可控扩展问题，推动了照片编辑与生成的应用发展。

authors_text: Zhiqiang Lang,Chongxing Song,Lei Zhang,Wei Wei
title: E2FIF: Push the limit of Binarized Deep Imagery Super-resolution using End-to-end Full-precision Information Flow
title_zh: E2FIF：使用端到端全精度信息流突破二值化深度图像超分辨率的极限
comment: Simple but Stronge baseline for binarized SR networks. Code is available at https://github.com/pppLang/E2FIF
comments: Simple but Stronge baseline for binarized SR networks. Code is available at https://github.com/pppLang/E2FIF
abstract: Binary neural network (BNN) provides a promising solution to deploy parameter-intensive deep single image super-resolution (SISR) models onto real devices with limited storage and computational resources. To achieve comparable performance with the full-precision counterpart, most existing BNNs for SISR mainly focus on compensating the information loss incurred by binarizing weights and activations in the network through better approximations to the binarized convolution. In this study, we revisit the difference between BNNs and their full-precision counterparts and argue that the key for good generalization performance of BNNs lies on preserving a complete full-precision information flow as well as an accurate gradient flow passing through each binarized convolution layer. Inspired by this, we propose to introduce a full-precision skip connection or its variant over each binarized convolution layer across the entire network, which can increase the forward expressive capability and the accuracy of back-propagated gradient, thus enhancing the generalization performance. More importantly, such a scheme is applicable to any existing BNN backbones for SISR without introducing any additional computation cost. To testify its efficacy, we evaluate it using four different backbones for SISR on four benchmark datasets and report obviously superior performance over existing BNNs and even some 4-bit competitors.
summary: Binary neural network (BNN) provides a promising solution to deploy parameter-intensive deep single image super-resolution (SISR) models onto real devices with limited storage and computational resources. To achieve comparable performance with the full-precision counterpart, most existing BNNs for SISR mainly focus on compensating the information loss incurred by binarizing weights and activations in the network through better approximations to the binarized convolution. In this study, we revisit the difference between BNNs and their full-precision counterparts and argue that the key for good generalization performance of BNNs lies on preserving a complete full-precision information flow as well as an accurate gradient flow passing through each binarized convolution layer. Inspired by this, we propose to introduce a full-precision skip connection or its variant over each binarized convolution layer across the entire network, which can increase the forward expressive capability and the accuracy of back-propagated gradient, thus enhancing the generalization performance. More importantly, such a scheme is applicable to any existing BNN backbones for SISR without introducing any additional computation cost. To testify its efficacy, we evaluate it using four different backbones for SISR on four benchmark datasets and report obviously superior performance over existing BNNs and even some 4-bit competitors.
abstract_zh: 二元神经网络 (BNN) 提供了一种有前景的解决方案，可将参数密集型深度单图像超分辨率 (SISR) 模型部署到存储和计算资源有限的真实设备上。为了获得与全精度对应物相当的性能，大多数现有的 SISR BNN 主要侧重于通过更好地逼近二值化卷积来补偿二值化网络中的权重和激活所带来的信息损失。在本研究中，我们重新审视了 BNN 与全精度对应物之间的差异，并认为 BNN 良好泛化性能的关键在于保留完整的全精度信息流以及通过每个二值化卷积层的准确梯度流。受此启发，我们建议在整个网络的每个二值化卷积层上引入全精度跳跃连接或其变体，这可以增加前向表达能力和反向传播梯度的准确性，从而增强泛化性能。更重要的是，这种方案适用于 SISR 的任何现有 BNN 主干，而不会引入任何额外的计算成本。为了证明其功效，我们在四个基准数据集上使用 SISR 的四种不同主干对其进行了评估，并报告了明显优于现有 BNN 甚至某些 4 位竞争对手的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出E2FIF方法，通过端到端全精度信息流提升二值化深度图像超分辨率性能。
AI.motivation: 现有二值神经网络（BNN）在图像超分辨率任务中因信息损失导致性能不足，需通过全精度信息流与梯度流保持提升泛化能力。
AI.method: 在每个二值化卷积层引入全精度跳跃连接或其变体，增强前向表达与反向梯度准确性，且不增加计算成本。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上，使用四种不同主干结构的实验表明，该方法优于现有BNN及部分4位量化模型。
